abandon.en: They had to abandon their picnic because of the sudden rain.
abandon.zh: 因为突然下雨，他们不得不放弃野餐。

abroad.en: My sister is studying abroad in France this year.
abroad.zh: 我姐姐今年在法国留学。

absent.en: Tom was absent from school because he had a cold.
absent.zh: 汤姆因为感冒没来上学。

absorb.en: Use a paper towel to absorb the spilled juice on the table.
absorb.zh: 用纸巾吸干桌上洒的果汁。

abstract.en: The painting on the wall was too abstract for me to understand.
abstract.zh: 墙上那幅画太抽象了，我看不懂。

abuse.en: You should not abuse your phone by using it all night long.
abuse.zh: 你不应该整晚玩手机，那样太不爱惜了。

academy.en: She enrolled her daughter in a dance academy near their home.
academy.zh: 她给女儿报了家附近的一个舞蹈学校。

accent.en: I could tell he was from the south by his accent.
accent.zh: 从他的口音我能听出他是南方人。

accept.en: She was happy to accept the birthday gift from her friend.
accept.zh: 她高兴地接受了朋友送的生日礼物。

access.en: This coffee shop offers free access to Wi-Fi for all customers.
access.zh: 这家咖啡店为所有顾客提供免费Wi-Fi。

accident.en: There was a car accident on the highway this morning.
accident.zh: 今天早上高速公路上发生了一起车祸。

accomplish.en: She felt proud after accomplishing all her tasks for the day.
accomplish.zh: 完成了一天的所有任务后，她感到很自豪。

according.en: According to the weather forecast, it will snow tomorrow.
according.zh: 根据天气预报，明天会下雪。

account.en: I need to check my bank account before we go shopping.
account.zh: 去购物之前我需要查一下银行账户。

accumulate.en: Dust can accumulate quickly if you don't clean your room regularly.
accumulate.zh: 如果不定期打扫房间，灰尘会很快积起来。

accurate.en: Make sure the delivery address is accurate before you place the order.
accurate.zh: 下单前确保收货地址是准确的。

accuse.en: She accused her brother of eating her chocolate without asking.
accuse.zh: 她指责弟弟没经过允许就吃了她的巧克力。

achieve.en: He worked hard to achieve his goal of running a marathon.
achieve.zh: 他努力训练，终于实现了跑马拉松的目标。

achievement.en: Graduating from college was her greatest achievement so far.
achievement.zh: 大学毕业是她迄今为止最大的成就。

acid.en: Lemon juice contains acid, so it tastes very sour.
acid.zh: 柠檬汁含有酸，所以尝起来很酸。

acknowledge.en: He acknowledged his mistake and apologized to everyone.
acknowledge.zh: 他承认了自己的错误，并向大家道歉。

acquire.en: She acquired a taste for coffee after living in Italy.
acquire.zh: 在意大利生活后，她爱上了喝咖啡。

acre.en: My grandparents own a small farm on about five acres of land.
acre.zh: 我祖父母拥有一个大约五英亩的小农场。

act.en: You need to act quickly if you want to catch the last bus.
act.zh: 你要想赶上末班车就得赶紧行动。

action.en: The firefighters took immediate action to put out the fire.
action.zh: 消防员立即采取行动灭火。

active.en: My grandmother is very active and walks in the park every morning.
active.zh: 我奶奶非常活跃，每天早上都去公园散步。

activity.en: Swimming is my favorite outdoor activity during the summer.
activity.zh: 游泳是我夏天最喜欢的户外活动。

actual.en: The actual price was much lower than I had expected.
actual.zh: 实际价格比我预想的低很多。

adapt.en: It took me a few weeks to adapt to the new school.
adapt.zh: 我花了几周时间才适应新学校。

add.en: Don't forget to add some salt when you cook the soup.
add.zh: 煮汤的时候别忘了加点盐。

addition.en: In addition to English, she also speaks French and Japanese.
addition.zh: 除了英语，她还会说法语和日语。

additional.en: We need additional chairs because more guests are coming.
additional.zh: 我们需要多加几把椅子，因为还有更多客人要来。

address.en: Could you write down your address so I can mail you the package?
address.zh: 你能写下你的地址吗，这样我好给你寄包裹。

adequate.en: Make sure you drink an adequate amount of water every day.
adequate.zh: 确保你每天喝足够的水。

adjust.en: She had to adjust the mirror before driving the car.
adjust.zh: 她开车前需要调一下后视镜。

adjustment.en: A small adjustment to the recipe made the cake taste much better.
adjustment.zh: 对配方做了一点小调整，蛋糕味道就好多了。

admire.en: I really admire my mother for working so hard for our family.
admire.zh: 我非常敬佩妈妈为家庭如此辛勤地工作。

admit.en: He finally admitted that he forgot to buy the groceries.
admit.zh: 他终于承认忘记买菜了。

adolescent.en: Many adolescents feel pressure from school and social media.
adolescent.zh: 很多青少年感受到来自学业和社交媒体的压力。

adopt.en: They decided to adopt a puppy from the animal shelter.
adopt.zh: 他们决定从动物收容所领养一只小狗。

adult.en: As an adult, you have to pay your own bills.
adult.zh: 作为成年人，你得自己付账单。

advance.en: You should book your tickets in advance to get a better price.
advance.zh: 你应该提前订票，这样能买到更便宜的。

advanced.en: This phone has many advanced features like face recognition.
advanced.zh: 这款手机有很多高级功能，比如人脸识别。

advantage.en: Living close to the office is a big advantage for saving time.
advantage.zh: 住在公司附近的一大优势是节省时间。

affair.en: Planning the wedding was a complicated affair that took months.
affair.zh: 筹备婚礼是一件复杂的事情，花了好几个月。

affect.en: The bad weather will affect our travel plans this weekend.
affect.zh: 恶劣天气会影响我们这个周末的旅行计划。

afford.en: We can't afford to eat out every night this month.
afford.zh: 这个月我们负担不起每晚在外面吃饭。

afraid.en: My little sister is afraid of the dark and sleeps with a nightlight.
afraid.zh: 我妹妹怕黑，睡觉时开着小夜灯。

afterward.en: We watched a movie and went for ice cream afterward.
afterward.zh: 我们看了场电影，之后去吃了冰淇淋。

age.en: Children of all ages enjoy playing in the park.
age.zh: 各个年龄段的孩子都喜欢在公园里玩。

agency.en: We booked our vacation through a travel agency downtown.
agency.zh: 我们通过市中心的一家旅行社预订了假期。

agent.en: The real estate agent showed us three apartments this afternoon.
agent.zh: 房产中介今天下午带我们看了三套公寓。

aggressive.en: The dog became aggressive when a stranger approached the gate.
aggressive.zh: 当陌生人靠近大门时，那条狗变得很凶。

ago.en: I moved to this city about three years ago.
ago.zh: 我大约三年前搬到了这个城市。

agree.en: I agree with you that this restaurant has the best pizza.
agree.zh: 我同意你说的，这家餐厅的披萨最好吃。

agreement.en: They reached an agreement to share the cost of the trip equally.
agreement.zh: 他们达成协议，平摊旅行费用。

agriculture.en: Agriculture is the main source of income for many rural families.
agriculture.zh: 农业是很多农村家庭的主要收入来源。

ahead.en: Go ahead and order first, I need a few more minutes to decide.
ahead.zh: 你先点吧，我还需要几分钟考虑。

aid.en: A first aid kit is something every household should have.
aid.zh: 每个家庭都应该备一个急救箱。

aim.en: Her aim is to save enough money to travel around the world.
aim.zh: 她的目标是攒够钱环游世界。

alarm.en: I set my alarm for six o'clock so I won't be late.
alarm.zh: 我把闹钟定在六点，这样就不会迟到。

album.en: She made a photo album of all her family vacation pictures.
album.zh: 她把所有的家庭度假照片做成了一本相册。

alert.en: The weather service sent an alert about the coming storm.
alert.zh: 气象部门发布了即将到来的暴风雨预警。

alien.en: Moving to a new country can make you feel like an alien at first.
alien.zh: 搬到一个新国家一开始会让你觉得格格不入。

alike.en: The twin sisters look so alike that even their friends get confused.
alike.zh: 这对双胞胎姐妹长得太像了，连朋友都分不清。

alive.en: The music festival made the whole town feel alive and exciting.
alive.zh: 音乐节让整个小镇充满了活力和激情。

allow.en: My parents don't allow me to stay up past midnight.
allow.zh: 我父母不允许我熬夜超过十二点。

almost.en: I almost forgot to bring my umbrella, but grabbed it at the last second.
almost.zh: 我差点忘了带伞，在最后一秒拿上了。

alone.en: She enjoys eating alone at the café and reading a good book.
alone.zh: 她喜欢一个人在咖啡馆边吃东西边看书。

along.en: We walked along the river and enjoyed the beautiful sunset.
along.zh: 我们沿着河边散步，欣赏美丽的日落。

already.en: I've already had breakfast, so I'll just have some coffee.
already.zh: 我已经吃过早饭了，喝杯咖啡就行。

also.en: She speaks English and also knows a little bit of Spanish.
also.zh: 她会说英语，还懂一点西班牙语。

alternative.en: If the store is closed, we can find an alternative place to shop.
alternative.zh: 如果那家店关门了，我们可以找别的地方买。

although.en: Although it was raining, we still had a great time at the party.
although.zh: 虽然下着雨，我们在聚会上还是玩得很开心。

always.en: She always brings homemade cookies to share with her coworkers.
always.zh: 她总是带自制的饼干和同事们分享。

amaze.en: The magic show amazed all the children at the birthday party.
amaze.zh: 魔术表演让生日聚会上所有的孩子都惊叹不已。

ambition.en: His ambition is to open his own bakery before he turns thirty.
ambition.zh: 他的愿望是在三十岁之前开一家自己的面包店。

among.en: She is the tallest among all her friends in the group photo.
among.zh: 在合影中，她是所有朋友里最高的。

amount.en: I was surprised by the amount of food we ordered for just two people.
amount.zh: 我们两个人点了这么多食物，我很惊讶。

analyze.en: Let me analyze the bill to see if we were overcharged.
analyze.zh: 让我看看账单，检查一下有没有多收费。

ancient.en: We visited an ancient temple during our trip to Kyoto.
ancient.zh: 我们去京都旅行时参观了一座古寺。

anger.en: He tried to control his anger when the waiter got his order wrong.
anger.zh: 服务员上错菜时，他努力控制自己的怒气。

angle.en: Try holding the camera from a different angle to get a better photo.
angle.zh: 试试换个角度拍，照片可能会更好看。

angry.en: Mom got angry because we forgot to clean up the kitchen.
angry.zh: 妈妈生气了，因为我们忘了收拾厨房。

animal.en: The kids love visiting the animal shelter on weekends.
animal.zh: 孩子们喜欢周末去动物收容所。

announce.en: The teacher announced that the exam would be postponed to next week.
announce.zh: 老师宣布考试推迟到下周。

announcement.en: We heard the boarding announcement and rushed to the gate.
announcement.zh: 我们听到登机广播后赶紧跑向登机口。

annual.en: Our company has an annual party every December.
annual.zh: 我们公司每年十二月都有一场年会。

anxiety.en: She felt a lot of anxiety before her job interview.
anxiety.zh: 面试之前她感到非常焦虑。

anxious.en: He was anxious about meeting his girlfriend's parents for the first time.
anxious.zh: 他第一次见女朋友的父母，感到很紧张。

apart.en: The two best friends live far apart but talk on the phone every day.
apart.zh: 这两个好朋友住得很远，但每天都打电话。

apartment.en: We just moved into a new apartment with a nice balcony.
apartment.zh: 我们刚搬进一套带漂亮阳台的新公寓。

apologize.en: He called to apologize for being late to the dinner.
apologize.zh: 他打电话为晚餐迟到而道歉。

apology.en: She accepted his apology and they became friends again.
apology.zh: 她接受了他的道歉，他们又成了朋友。

apparent.en: It was apparent from her smile that she loved the surprise party.
apparent.zh: 从她的笑容可以看出她很喜欢这个惊喜派对。

appeal.en: The idea of a beach vacation really appeals to me right now.
appeal.zh: 去海滩度假这个主意现在对我很有吸引力。

appear.en: Dark clouds appeared in the sky just before the storm.
appear.zh: 暴风雨来临前，天空中出现了乌云。

appearance.en: She changed her appearance by cutting her hair short.
appearance.zh: 她把头发剪短了，改变了自己的形象。

appetite.en: The long hike gave everyone a huge appetite for dinner.
appetite.zh: 长途徒步让每个人晚餐时都胃口大开。

apple.en: I grabbed an apple from the kitchen before heading out the door.
apple.zh: 出门前我从厨房拿了一个苹果。

application.en: She submitted her job application online last night.
application.zh: 她昨晚在网上提交了求职申请。

apply.en: Remember to apply sunscreen before you go to the beach.
apply.zh: 去海滩之前记得涂防晒霜。

appoint.en: The company appointed her as the new manager of the store.
appoint.zh: 公司任命她为新的店长。

appointment.en: I have a dentist appointment at three o'clock this afternoon.
appointment.zh: 我今天下午三点有个牙医预约。

appreciate.en: I really appreciate you helping me move into my new apartment.
appreciate.zh: 非常感谢你帮我搬进新公寓。

approach.en: As we approached the restaurant, we could smell the delicious food.
approach.zh: 当我们走近餐厅时，就闻到了食物的香味。

appropriate.en: Wearing shorts to a wedding is not considered appropriate.
appropriate.zh: 穿短裤参加婚礼被认为是不合适的。

approve.en: My parents approved my plan to travel with friends this summer.
approve.zh: 爸妈同意了我今年夏天和朋友一起旅行的计划。

area.en: There are many good restaurants in this area of the city.
area.zh: 市区这一带有很多不错的餐厅。

argue.en: The couple often argues about what to watch on TV.
argue.zh: 这对夫妻经常为看什么电视节目争吵。

argument.en: They had a small argument over who should do the dishes.
argument.zh: 他们为谁该洗碗发生了小争执。

arise.en: A problem arose with our flight, so we had to wait at the airport.
arise.zh: 我们的航班出了问题，只好在机场等着。

army.en: His brother joined the army right after finishing high school.
army.zh: 他哥哥高中一毕业就参了军。

arrange.en: She arranged the flowers beautifully in a vase on the table.
arrange.zh: 她把花漂亮地插在桌上的花瓶里。

arrangement.en: We made arrangements to pick up grandma from the train station.
arrangement.zh: 我们安排好了去火车站接奶奶。

arrest.en: The police arrested the man who stole a bicycle from the park.
arrest.zh: 警察逮捕了那个从公园偷自行车的人。

arrival.en: We checked the arrival time of her flight on our phones.
arrival.zh: 我们在手机上查了她航班的到达时间。

arrive.en: Please arrive at the airport at least two hours before your flight.
arrive.zh: 请至少在航班起飞前两小时到达机场。

art.en: She spent the whole afternoon at the art gallery downtown.
art.zh: 她整个下午都在市中心的美术馆。

article.en: I read an interesting article about healthy eating habits online.
article.zh: 我在网上读了一篇关于健康饮食习惯的有趣文章。

artificial.en: The artificial flowers in the vase look surprisingly real.
artificial.zh: 花瓶里的人造花看起来出奇地逼真。

aside.en: She put aside some money every month for her vacation fund.
aside.zh: 她每个月都会存一些钱作为度假基金。

aspect.en: The best aspect of this job is the flexible working hours.
aspect.zh: 这份工作最好的方面是弹性工作时间。

assemble.en: It took us two hours to assemble the new bookshelf from the store.
assemble.zh: 我们花了两个小时组装从商店买的新书架。

assess.en: The mechanic assessed the damage to the car after the accident.
assess.zh: 事故后，修车师傅评估了车的损坏情况。

assessment.en: The doctor made a quick assessment of the child's condition.
assessment.zh: 医生迅速评估了孩子的状况。

asset.en: Speaking two languages is a great asset when looking for a job.
asset.zh: 会说两种语言在找工作时是一大优势。

assign.en: The teacher assigned each student a different topic for the project.
assign.zh: 老师给每个学生分配了不同的项目主题。

assist.en: The shop assistant helped me find the right size of shoes.
assist.zh: 店员帮我找到了合适尺码的鞋子。

assistance.en: If you need any assistance, please don't hesitate to ask.
assistance.zh: 如果你需要帮助，请不要犹豫，尽管问。

assistant.en: My assistant will schedule the meeting for next Monday.
assistant.zh: 我的助理会把会议安排在下周一。

associate.en: Most people associate summer with beach vacations and ice cream.
associate.zh: 大多数人把夏天和海滩度假、冰淇淋联系在一起。

association.en: She joined the neighborhood association to help improve the community.
association.zh: 她加入了社区协会，帮助改善社区环境。

assume.en: Don't assume the store is open on holidays without checking first.
assume.zh: 不要没确认就以为商店假日也开门。

assumption.en: My assumption was wrong—the restaurant actually closes at nine.
assumption.zh: 我猜错了——那家餐厅其实九点就关门了。

atmosphere.en: The café has a warm and cozy atmosphere that I really enjoy.
atmosphere.zh: 这家咖啡馆气氛温馨舒适，我很喜欢。

attach.en: Please attach your photo to the application form before submitting it.
attach.zh: 提交申请表之前，请附上你的照片。

attack.en: The dog attacked the mailman when he tried to deliver a package.
attack.zh: 邮递员送包裹时被狗咬了。

attempt.en: He made his first attempt at cooking dinner for his family.
attempt.zh: 他第一次尝试给家人做晚餐。

attend.en: Will you attend the school reunion this Saturday?
attend.zh: 这周六的同学聚会你参加吗？

attendance.en: The attendance at the concert was much higher than expected.
attendance.zh: 演唱会的出席人数比预期多很多。

attention.en: Pay attention to the road signs when you are driving.

attitude.en: A positive attitude can make a big difference at work.
attitude.zh: 积极的态度能在工作中带来很大改变。

attract.en: The new bakery attracted many customers with its fresh bread smell.
attract.zh: 新开的面包店用新鲜面包的香味吸引了很多顾客。

attractive.en: The hotel offers attractive discounts during the off-season.
attractive.zh: 这家酒店在淡季提供诱人的折扣。

audience.en: The audience clapped loudly after the band finished their last song.
audience.zh: 乐队演完最后一首歌后，观众热烈鼓掌。

authority.en: You need permission from the local authority to hold an outdoor event.
authority.zh: 举办户外活动需要获得当地政府的许可。

automobile.en: The automobile industry has changed a lot with electric cars.
automobile.zh: 随着电动汽车的出现，汽车行业发生了很大变化。

available.en: Is this table available, or is someone sitting here?
available.zh: 这张桌子有人吗，还是可以坐？

average.en: The average temperature in July is around thirty-five degrees here.
average.zh: 这里七月的平均气温大约三十五度。

avoid.en: I try to avoid eating too much sugar to stay healthy.
avoid.zh: 为了保持健康，我尽量避免吃太多糖。

award.en: She received an award for being the best employee of the year.
award.zh: 她获得了年度最佳员工奖。

aware.en: Are you aware that the supermarket closes early on Sundays?
aware.zh: 你知道超市周日提前关门吗？

awful.en: The weather has been awful all week with nonstop rain.
awful.zh: 这一整周天气都糟透了，一直在下雨。

baby.en: The baby fell asleep as soon as we started the car.
baby.zh: 我们一发动车，宝宝就睡着了。

back.en: I'll be back home by six o'clock for dinner.
back.zh: 我六点前会回到家吃晚饭。

background.en: The mountains in the background of the photo looked amazing.
background.zh: 照片背景中的山看起来美极了。

backward.en: He took a step backward to avoid bumping into the shelf.
backward.zh: 他向后退了一步，以免撞到架子。

bag.en: Don't forget to bring a shopping bag when you go to the store.
bag.zh: 去商店的时候别忘了带购物袋。

balance.en: It's important to find a good balance between work and family life.
balance.zh: 找到工作和家庭生活之间的平衡很重要。

ball.en: The kids are playing with a ball in the backyard.

ban.en: The city plans to ban plastic bags in all grocery stores.
ban.zh: 该市计划在所有杂货店禁止使用塑料袋。

band.en: My favorite band is playing at the music festival this weekend.
band.zh: 我最喜欢的乐队这个周末在音乐节上演出。

bank.en: I need to go to the bank to deposit my paycheck.

bar.en: We met some old friends at a bar near the beach last night.
bar.zh: 昨晚我们在海边的一家酒吧遇到了一些老朋友。

bare.en: The cupboard was bare because we hadn't gone grocery shopping yet.
bare.zh: 橱柜是空的，因为我们还没去买菜。

bargain.en: I found a great bargain on winter coats at the department store.
bargain.zh: 我在百货商店买到了一件很划算的冬装外套。

barrier.en: Language can be a barrier when traveling in a foreign country.
barrier.zh: 在国外旅行时，语言可能是一个障碍。

base.en: The company is based in Shanghai but has offices across the country.
base.zh: 公司总部在上海，但在全国各地都有办公室。

basic.en: You only need basic cooking skills to make this simple pasta dish.
basic.zh: 做这道简单的意面只需要基本的烹饪技能。

basis.en: She exercises on a daily basis to keep herself fit.
basis.zh: 她每天锻炼以保持身材。

basket.en: She filled the basket with fresh fruits from the farmers market.
basket.zh: 她在农贸市场装了满满一篮子新鲜水果。

bath.en: After a long day, I love taking a hot bath to relax.
bath.zh: 忙碌了一天后，我喜欢泡个热水澡放松一下。

battery.en: My phone battery is almost dead, do you have a charger?
battery.zh: 我手机快没电了，你有充电器吗？

battle.en: Getting the kids to eat vegetables is a daily battle in our house.
battle.zh: 让孩子们吃蔬菜在我们家是一场每天的战斗。

beach.en: We spent the whole afternoon building sandcastles on the beach.
beach.zh: 我们整个下午都在海滩上堆沙堡。

bear.en: I can't bear the heat in summer without air conditioning.
bear.zh: 夏天没有空调我受不了这种热。

beat.en: Our team beat the other school in the basketball game last night.
beat.zh: 昨晚篮球赛我们队赢了另一所学校。

beautiful.en: The garden looks beautiful with all the flowers blooming in spring.
beautiful.zh: 春天百花盛开，花园看起来美极了。

beauty.en: The beauty of the lake at sunset took my breath away.
beauty.zh: 日落时湖泊的美景让我惊叹不已。

become.en: She has become much more confident since starting her new job.
become.zh: 自从开始新工作后，她变得自信多了。

bed.en: I usually go to bed around eleven o'clock on weeknights.
bed.zh: 工作日晚上我通常十一点左右上床睡觉。

bedroom.en: We painted the bedroom walls light blue to make it feel calm.
bedroom.zh: 我们把卧室墙壁刷成了浅蓝色，让人感觉很安静。

before.en: Make sure you wash your hands before eating dinner.

begin.en: The movie will begin in ten minutes, so let's find our seats.
begin.zh: 电影十分钟后开始，我们去找座位吧。

behalf.en: I'm calling on behalf of my mother to cancel her appointment.
behalf.zh: 我代替我妈妈打电话取消她的预约。

behave.en: The children behaved very well during the long car ride.
behave.zh: 孩子们在长途车程中表现得很乖。

behavior.en: His kind behavior towards strangers always impresses me.
behavior.zh: 他对陌生人的友善举止总是让我印象深刻。

behind.en: I left my keys behind at the coffee shop this morning.
behind.zh: 今天早上我把钥匙落在咖啡店了。

belief.en: It's my belief that hard work always pays off in the end.
belief.zh: 我相信努力最终总会有回报。

believe.en: I can't believe how fast the kids have grown this year.
believe.zh: 我不敢相信今年孩子们长得这么快。

belong.en: These books belong to the library, so we need to return them.
belong.zh: 这些书是图书馆的，我们需要还回去。

below.en: The temperature dropped below zero last night for the first time.
below.zh: 昨晚气温第一次降到了零度以下。

bend.en: Be careful not to bend the photos when you put them in the envelope.
bend.zh: 把照片放进信封时小心别折弯了。

beneath.en: We found the spare key hidden beneath the doormat.
beneath.zh: 我们在门垫下面找到了备用钥匙。

benefit.en: One of the benefits of this job is free lunch every day.
benefit.zh: 这份工作的好处之一是每天有免费午餐。

beside.en: She sat beside her best friend during the school concert.
beside.zh: 学校音乐会上她坐在好朋友旁边。

best.en: This is the best coffee I've ever had in my life.
best.zh: 这是我这辈子喝过的最好的咖啡。

bet.en: I bet it will rain this afternoon based on those dark clouds.
bet.zh: 看那些乌云，我敢打赌今天下午会下雨。

better.en: You'll feel better after a good night's sleep.
better.zh: 好好睡一觉你会感觉好些的。

between.en: The pharmacy is located between the bakery and the bookstore.
between.zh: 药店在面包店和书店之间。

beyond.en: The view from the hilltop stretched far beyond the city limits.
beyond.zh: 从山顶看去，景色远远延伸到城市之外。

bid.en: She placed a bid on a vintage lamp at the online auction.
bid.zh: 她在网上拍卖会上对一盏复古台灯出了价。

bill.en: Let's split the bill equally since we all ordered the same thing.
bill.zh: 既然我们都点了一样的，就平分账单吧。

bind.en: She used a ribbon to bind the gift box together neatly.
bind.zh: 她用丝带把礼品盒整齐地扎了起来。

birth.en: The birth of their first child was the happiest day of their lives.
birth.zh: 第一个孩子的出生是他们一生中最幸福的一天。

bit.en: Can I have a bit of your cake to see how it tastes?
bit.zh: 我能尝一小口你的蛋糕吗？

bite.en: The mosquito bite on my arm has been itching all day.
bite.zh: 胳膊上的蚊子叮咬处痒了一整天。

bitter.en: This coffee is too bitter for me without any sugar.
bitter.zh: 不加糖的话，这咖啡对我来说太苦了。

blame.en: Don't blame your sister for the broken vase—it was an accident.
blame.zh: 别怪你妹妹打碎了花瓶——那是意外。

blank.en: She stared at the blank page, not knowing what to write.
blank.zh: 她盯着空白的纸页，不知道该写什么。

blanket.en: It was cold, so I grabbed an extra blanket from the closet.
blanket.zh: 天冷了，我从衣柜里拿了一条额外的毯子。

blast.en: The kids had a blast at the amusement park yesterday.
blast.zh: 孩子们昨天在游乐园玩得非常开心。

bleed.en: He cut his finger while chopping vegetables and it started to bleed.
bleed.zh: 他切菜时割到了手指，开始流血了。

blend.en: Blend the bananas and milk together to make a smoothie.
blend.zh: 把香蕉和牛奶混合在一起做成冰沙。

bless.en: My grandmother always blesses the food before we start eating.
bless.zh: 我奶奶总是在我们开始吃饭前做祷告。

blind.en: Close the blinds so the morning sun doesn't wake us up too early.
blind.zh: 把百叶窗拉上，免得早晨的阳光把我们太早叫醒。

block.en: The supermarket is just two blocks away from our apartment.
block.zh: 超市离我们的公寓只有两个街区。

blood.en: She went to the hospital to have a blood test this morning.
blood.zh: 她今天早上去医院做了血液检查。

blow.en: The wind blew so hard that it knocked over the trash cans.
blow.zh: 风刮得很大，把垃圾桶都吹倒了。

blue.en: She wore a beautiful blue dress to her friend's wedding.
blue.zh: 她穿了一件漂亮的蓝色裙子参加朋友的婚礼。

board.en: Passengers for flight 302, please proceed to board the plane now.

boat.en: We rented a small boat and spent the day fishing on the lake.
boat.zh: 我们租了一条小船，在湖上钓了一天鱼。

body.en: Swimming is one of the best exercises for your whole body.
body.zh: 游泳是最好的全身运动之一。

boil.en: Boil some water first, then add the noodles to the pot.
boil.zh: 先把水烧开，然后把面条放进锅里。

bold.en: It was a bold decision to quit her job and start her own business.
bold.zh: 辞职创业是一个大胆的决定。

bomb.en: The police cleared the area after someone reported a bomb threat.
bomb.zh: 有人报告了炸弹威胁后，警方疏散了该地区。

bond.en: The bond between the two sisters grew stronger over the years.
bond.zh: 两姐妹之间的感情多年来越来越深厚。

bone.en: He broke a bone in his wrist while playing basketball.
bone.zh: 他打篮球时摔断了手腕的骨头。

bonus.en: She used her year-end bonus to buy a new laptop.
bonus.zh: 她用年终奖买了一台新笔记本电脑。

book.en: I need to book a hotel room for our trip next month.
book.zh: 我需要为下个月的旅行预订酒店房间。

boom.en: The online shopping boom has changed the way people buy things.
boom.zh: 网购热潮改变了人们的购物方式。

boost.en: A cup of coffee in the morning gives me an energy boost.
boost.zh: 早上一杯咖啡能让我精力充沛。

boot.en: Don't forget to wear your rain boots—it's pouring outside.
boot.zh: 别忘了穿雨靴——外面下大雨呢。

border.en: We crossed the border into Canada during our road trip.
border.zh: 自驾游途中我们越过了加拿大边境。

bore.en: The long meeting bored everyone and some people fell asleep.
bore.zh: 冗长的会议让大家都无聊了，有些人甚至睡着了。

born.en: She was born in a small town but grew up in a big city.
born.zh: 她出生在一个小镇，但在大城市长大。

borrow.en: Can I borrow your umbrella? I forgot mine at home.
borrow.zh: 我能借你的伞用一下吗？我把我的忘在家里了。

boss.en: My boss gave me the day off because I worked overtime last week.
boss.zh: 因为上周加了班，老板让我休息一天。

both.en: Both of my parents enjoy cooking dinner together on weekends.
both.zh: 我爸妈周末都喜欢一起做晚饭。

bother.en: Sorry to bother you, but could you help me carry these bags?
bother.zh: 不好意思打扰你，你能帮我拎一下这些袋子吗？

bottle.en: Always carry a bottle of water with you when you go hiking.
bottle.zh: 去徒步时随身带一瓶水。

bottom.en: I found my earring at the bottom of my handbag.
bottom.zh: 我在手提包底部找到了我的耳环。

bound.en: With her talent, she is bound to succeed in the music industry.
bound.zh: 以她的才华，她在音乐行业一定会成功的。

boundary.en: We planted a fence along the boundary of our backyard.
boundary.zh: 我们沿着后院的边界种了一圈围栏。

bowl.en: She poured some cereal into a bowl and added cold milk.
bowl.zh: 她往碗里倒了些麦片，加了冷牛奶。

box.en: We packed all the old toys into a box for donation.
box.zh: 我们把所有旧玩具装进一个箱子准备捐赠。

brain.en: Reading is a great way to keep your brain sharp as you age.
brain.zh: 阅读是随着年龄增长保持大脑敏锐的好方法。

branch.en: The nearest branch of our bank is just around the corner.
branch.zh: 我们银行最近的分行就在拐角处。

brand.en: I always buy the same brand of toothpaste because I like the taste.
brand.zh: 我总是买同一个牌子的牙膏，因为我喜欢那个味道。

brave.en: The brave little boy rescued a kitten from the top of a tree.
brave.zh: 那个勇敢的小男孩从树顶救下了一只小猫。

bread.en: We stopped by the bakery to buy some fresh bread for breakfast.
bread.zh: 我们顺路去面包店买了些新鲜面包当早餐。

break.en: Let's take a short break and grab some coffee.
break.zh: 我们休息一会儿去喝杯咖啡吧。

breakfast.en: I usually have eggs and toast for breakfast before going to work.
breakfast.zh: 上班前我通常吃鸡蛋和吐司当早餐。

breath.en: Take a deep breath and try to relax before the presentation.
breath.zh: 演讲前深吸一口气，试着放松一下。

breathe.en: It's hard to breathe in the room when it gets too crowded.
breathe.zh: 房间太挤的时候很难呼吸。

breed.en: What breed of dog is that? It's so cute and fluffy.
breed.zh: 那是什么品种的狗？好可爱好毛茸茸的。

brick.en: Their house is made of red brick and looks very charming.
brick.zh: 他们的房子是红砖砌的，看起来很有韵味。

bridge.en: We walked across the old bridge to reach the other side of the river.
bridge.zh: 我们走过那座老桥到达了河的对岸。

brief.en: He gave a brief explanation of the recipe before we started cooking.
brief.zh: 我们开始做菜前，他简单说明了一下食谱。

bright.en: The living room feels bright and cheerful with the new yellow curtains.
bright.zh: 换了新的黄色窗帘后，客厅感觉明亮又温馨。

brilliant.en: She came up with a brilliant idea for our weekend trip.
brilliant.zh: 她想出了一个绝妙的周末旅行主意。

bring.en: Can you bring some snacks to the movie night at my place?
bring.zh: 你能带些零食来我家看电影吗？

broad.en: The hotel has a broad selection of dishes for breakfast.
broad.zh: 这家酒店早餐有很多种菜品可以选择。

broadcast.en: The football game will be broadcast live on television tonight.
broadcast.zh: 今晚的足球比赛将在电视上直播。

brother.en: My brother and I play video games together every weekend.
brother.zh: 我和哥哥每个周末一起玩电子游戏。

brown.en: She ordered a pair of brown leather boots from the online store.
brown.zh: 她在网上商店订了一双棕色皮靴。

brush.en: Don't forget to brush your teeth before you go to bed.

bubble.en: The children love blowing soap bubbles in the backyard.
bubble.zh: 孩子们喜欢在后院吹肥皂泡。

budget.en: We need to plan our budget carefully before the vacation.
budget.zh: 度假前我们需要认真规划预算。

build.en: They plan to build a new playground for the kids in the neighborhood.
build.zh: 他们计划在社区为孩子们建一个新的游乐场。

building.en: The tallest building in our city has fifty floors.
building.zh: 我们城市最高的大楼有五十层。

bulk.en: Buying rice in bulk saves us a lot of money every month.
bulk.zh: 批量买大米每个月能省不少钱。

burden.en: She didn't want to be a burden to her children when she got older.
burden.zh: 她不想老了以后成为孩子们的负担。

burn.en: Be careful not to burn yourself when taking the pan out of the oven.
burn.zh: 从烤箱里拿烤盘时小心别烫着。

burst.en: The kids burst into laughter when the clown fell off the stage.
burst.zh: 小丑从台上掉下来时，孩子们哄堂大笑。

bury.en: The dog likes to bury its bones in the garden.
bury.zh: 那只狗喜欢把骨头埋在花园里。

bus.en: I take the bus to work every morning because parking is too expensive.
bus.zh: 我每天早上坐公交车上班，因为停车费太贵了。

bush.en: The cat likes to hide behind the bush in the front yard.
bush.zh: 那只猫喜欢躲在前院的灌木丛后面。

business.en: She started her own business selling handmade jewelry online.
business.zh: 她开始了自己的生意，在网上卖手工首饰。

busy.en: I've been so busy this week that I barely had time to eat.
busy.zh: 这周我忙得几乎没时间吃饭。

butter.en: Spread some butter on the toast while it's still warm.
butter.zh: 趁吐司还热的时候抹一些黄油。

button.en: Press the button on the elevator to go to the third floor.

buy.en: I want to buy a new pair of running shoes this weekend.
buy.zh: 这个周末我想买一双新的跑步鞋。

cabin.en: We rented a cozy cabin in the mountains for our winter vacation.
cabin.zh: 我们在山里租了一间温馨的小木屋度寒假。

cable.en: We cancelled our cable subscription and now only use streaming services.
cable.zh: 我们取消了有线电视订阅，现在只用流媒体服务。

cake.en: Mom baked a chocolate cake for my birthday party yesterday.
cake.zh: 妈妈昨天为我的生日派对烤了一个巧克力蛋糕。

calculate.en: Let me calculate how much we need to pay for the groceries.
calculate.zh: 让我算算我们买菜需要付多少钱。

call.en: I'll call you tonight after I finish cooking dinner.
call.zh: 我做完晚饭后今晚给你打电话。

calm.en: The lake was so calm and peaceful early in the morning.
calm.zh: 清晨的湖面非常平静、宁静。

camera.en: Don't forget to bring your camera to capture the sunset today.
camera.zh: 别忘了带相机拍今天的日落。

camp.en: The kids went to summer camp and learned how to swim.
camp.zh: 孩子们去了夏令营，学会了游泳。

campaign.en: The store launched a big sales campaign for the holiday season.
campaign.zh: 这家商店在节假日推出了大型促销活动。

campus.en: The university campus has a beautiful garden with cherry blossom trees.
campus.zh: 大学校园里有一个种满樱花树的漂亮花园。

cancel.en: We had to cancel our flight because of the typhoon warning.
cancel.zh: 因为台风预警，我们不得不取消航班。

cancer.en: She volunteers at a cancer research center every Saturday.
cancer.zh: 她每个周六在一个癌症研究中心做志愿者。

candidate.en: He is a strong candidate for the sales manager position.
candidate.zh: 他是销售经理职位的有力人选。

capable.en: She is very capable and can handle any task given to her.
capable.zh: 她非常能干，什么任务都能应付。

capacity.en: The stadium has a capacity of fifty thousand people.
capacity.zh: 这个体育场能容纳五万人。

capital.en: We visited the capital city and saw many historical landmarks.
capital.zh: 我们参观了首都，看了许多历史地标。

captain.en: The captain of our soccer team scored the winning goal.
captain.zh: 我们足球队的队长踢进了制胜一球。

capture.en: I tried to capture the perfect moment with my phone camera.
capture.zh: 我试着用手机拍下那个完美瞬间。

carbon.en: We should try to reduce our carbon footprint by driving less.
carbon.zh: 我们应该少开车以减少碳排放。

card.en: She sent a thank-you card to her friend for the lovely gift.
card.zh: 她给朋友寄了一张感谢卡，感谢那份美好的礼物。

care.en: She takes great care of her elderly parents who live nearby.
care.zh: 她悉心照顾住在附近的年迈父母。

career.en: She decided to change her career and become a pastry chef.
career.zh: 她决定转行成为一名糕点师。

careful.en: Be careful crossing the street—there's a lot of traffic today.
careful.zh: 过马路小心——今天车很多。

carry.en: Can you help me carry these grocery bags into the kitchen?
carry.zh: 你能帮我把这些购物袋拎到厨房吗？

case.en: Bring a jacket just in case the weather gets cold tonight.
case.zh: 带一件外套以防今晚天气变冷。

cash.en: I don't have enough cash on me—can I pay by card?
cash.zh: 我身上没带够现金——可以刷卡吗？

cast.en: The doctor put a cast on his broken arm for six weeks.
cast.zh: 医生给他骨折的手臂打了六周的石膏。

casual.en: You can wear casual clothes to the barbecue this Saturday.
casual.zh: 这周六的烧烤派对你可以穿休闲装。

catch.en: We need to hurry if we want to catch the 7 o'clock train.
catch.zh: 如果我们想赶上七点的火车就得快点。

category.en: This product falls under the category of kitchen appliances.
category.zh: 这个产品属于厨房电器类。

cause.en: The heavy rain caused flooding in several neighborhoods.
cause.zh: 大雨导致好几个社区发生了洪水。

celebrate.en: We are going to celebrate my mom's birthday at a nice restaurant.
celebrate.zh: 我们打算在一家好餐厅为妈妈庆祝生日。

celebration.en: The New Year celebration lasted until midnight with fireworks.
celebration.zh: 新年庆祝活动伴着烟花一直持续到午夜。

cell.en: I left my cell phone on the kitchen counter this morning.
cell.zh: 今天早上我把手机落在厨房台面上了。

center.en: The shopping center is just a ten-minute drive from our house.
center.zh: 购物中心离我们家只有十分钟车程。

central.en: Their apartment is in a central location close to shops and restaurants.
central.zh: 他们的公寓位于市中心，靠近商店和餐厅。

century.en: This old house was built at the beginning of the last century.
century.zh: 这栋老房子建于上世纪初。

ceremony.en: The wedding ceremony was held in a beautiful garden by the lake.
ceremony.zh: 婚礼仪式在湖边一个美丽的花园举行。

certain.en: I'm certain that I locked the front door before we left.
certain.zh: 我确信我们走之前我锁了前门。

certainly.en: I will certainly help you move to your new apartment next week.
certainly.zh: 下周我一定会帮你搬新家。

certificate.en: She received a certificate after completing the cooking course.
certificate.zh: 完成烹饪课程后，她获得了一张证书。

chain.en: She wore a gold chain around her neck that her mother gave her.
chain.zh: 她脖子上戴着妈妈送的金项链。

chair.en: Please pull up a chair and join us for dinner.
chair.zh: 请拉把椅子过来和我们一起吃晚饭。

chairman.en: The chairman welcomed everyone to the annual company dinner.
chairman.zh: 主席在公司年度晚宴上欢迎了每一位来宾。

challenge.en: Learning to cook was a real challenge for him at first.
challenge.zh: 一开始学做饭对他来说确实是个挑战。

champion.en: Our school basketball team became the city champion this year.
champion.zh: 我们学校的篮球队今年成为了全市冠军。

championship.en: We watched the championship game at a sports bar with friends.
championship.zh: 我们和朋友在体育酒吧看了冠军赛。

chance.en: I got the chance to visit Paris during my business trip.
chance.zh: 出差期间我有机会去了巴黎。

change.en: I need to change my clothes before going to the party.
change.zh: 去派对之前我需要换身衣服。

channel.en: What channel is the cooking show on tonight?
channel.zh: 今晚那个烹饪节目在哪个频道播？

chapter.en: I read three chapters of my book before falling asleep last night.
chapter.zh: 昨晚睡觉前我看了三章书。

character.en: My favorite character in the movie is the funny best friend.
character.zh: 电影里我最喜欢的角色是那个搞笑的好朋友。

characteristic.en: Patience is an important characteristic for anyone who works with children.
characteristic.zh: 耐心是从事儿童工作的人的一项重要品质。

charge.en: How much do they charge for delivery to our neighborhood?
charge.zh: 送货到我们小区收多少钱？

charity.en: She donates part of her salary to a children's charity every month.
charity.zh: 她每个月都把部分工资捐给一个儿童慈善机构。

chart.en: The doctor showed me a chart of my blood pressure results.
chart.zh: 医生给我看了一张我的血压检测结果图表。

chase.en: The dog loves to chase squirrels around the park every morning.
chase.zh: 那只狗每天早上都喜欢在公园里追松鼠。

cheap.en: We found a cheap but comfortable hotel near the train station.
cheap.zh: 我们在火车站附近找到了一家便宜又舒适的酒店。

check.en: Let me check the weather forecast before we plan the picnic.
check.zh: 我们计划野餐之前让我先看看天气预报。

cheek.en: She kissed her baby on the cheek before putting him to bed.
cheek.zh: 她亲了亲宝宝的脸颊，然后哄他睡觉。

cheese.en: Would you like some extra cheese on your pizza?
cheese.zh: 你的披萨要加些额外的芝士吗？

chemical.en: Always read the label before using any chemical cleaning product.
chemical.zh: 使用任何化学清洁产品前都要先看标签。

chest.en: He felt a tightness in his chest after running up the stairs.
chest.zh: 跑上楼梯后他感到胸口发闷。

chicken.en: We're having roasted chicken with vegetables for dinner tonight.
chicken.zh: 今晚我们吃烤鸡配蔬菜。

chief.en: The chief reason I moved here was to be closer to my family.
chief.zh: 我搬到这里的主要原因是为了离家人近一些。

child.en: Every child in the class received a small gift on the last day.
child.zh: 最后一天班上每个孩子都收到了一份小礼物。

childhood.en: She has many happy memories of her childhood in the countryside.
childhood.zh: 她对在农村度过的童年有许多美好的回忆。

chip.en: We shared a big bag of chips while watching the movie.
chip.zh: 看电影时我们一起吃了一大袋薯片。

chocolate.en: I bought a box of chocolate for my girlfriend on Valentine's Day.
chocolate.zh: 情人节我给女朋友买了一盒巧克力。

choice.en: There are so many flavors that I can't make a choice.
choice.zh: 口味太多了，我选不过来。

choose.en: You can choose any color you want for the bedroom walls.
choose.zh: 卧室墙壁你想选什么颜色都行。

church.en: The whole family goes to church together every Sunday morning.
church.zh: 每个周日早上全家人一起去教堂。

circle.en: The children sat in a circle and played a game together.
circle.zh: 孩子们围成一圈一起做游戏。

circuit.en: He runs a five-kilometer circuit around the park every morning.
circuit.zh: 他每天早上绕公园跑五公里。

circumstance.en: Under normal circumstances, the flight takes about two hours.
circumstance.zh: 正常情况下，飞行大约需要两个小时。

citizen.en: As a good citizen, you should always follow the traffic rules.
citizen.zh: 作为一个好市民，你应该时刻遵守交通规则。

city.en: We moved to the city because there are more job opportunities here.
city.zh: 我们搬到城市，因为这里工作机会更多。

civil.en: Please keep the discussion civil even if you disagree with each other.
civil.zh: 即使意见不同，也请保持礼貌的讨论。

claim.en: She claimed that her suitcase was damaged during the flight.
claim.zh: 她说她的行李箱在飞行途中被损坏了。

class.en: I'm taking a yoga class every Tuesday evening after work.
class.zh: 我每周二晚上下班后去上瑜伽课。

classic.en: A white shirt and jeans is a classic outfit that never goes out of style.
classic.zh: 白衬衫配牛仔裤是永不过时的经典搭配。

classroom.en: The classroom was decorated with colorful drawings by the students.
classroom.zh: 教室里装饰着学生们画的五颜六色的画。

clean.en: We spent the whole Saturday morning cleaning the house.
clean.zh: 我们整个周六上午都在打扫房子。

clear.en: The instructions on the package are very clear and easy to follow.
clear.zh: 包装上的说明非常清楚，容易操作。

clerk.en: The clerk at the front desk helped us check into the hotel.
clerk.zh: 前台的服务员帮我们办理了酒店入住。

client.en: I have a meeting with an important client at noon today.
client.zh: 我今天中午要和一个重要客户开会。

climate.en: The climate here is warm all year round, which is perfect for gardening.
climate.zh: 这里气候全年温暖，非常适合种花。

climb.en: We plan to climb the mountain early in the morning to see the sunrise.
climb.zh: 我们计划一大早爬山去看日出。

clock.en: The clock on the wall says it's almost time for lunch.
clock.zh: 墙上的钟显示快到吃午饭的时间了。

close.en: The bookstore closes at nine o'clock, so we'd better hurry.
close.zh: 书店九点关门，我们最好快点。

closely.en: She looked closely at the map to find the right street.
closely.zh: 她仔细看地图寻找正确的街道。

closet.en: I need to organize my closet because it's full of old clothes.
closet.zh: 我需要整理一下衣柜，里面全是旧衣服。

cloth.en: Use a damp cloth to wipe down the kitchen table.
cloth.zh: 用湿布擦一下厨房的桌子。

clothes.en: She packed her clothes into the suitcase the night before the trip.
clothes.zh: 旅行前一晚她把衣服装进了行李箱。

cloud.en: There are no clouds in the sky today—it's perfect for a picnic.
cloud.zh: 今天天空万里无云——非常适合野餐。

club.en: He joined a running club to meet people and stay in shape.
club.zh: 他加入了一个跑步俱乐部，既可以认识朋友又能保持健康。

clue.en: I have no clue where I put my car keys this morning.
clue.zh: 我完全不知道今早把车钥匙放哪了。

coach.en: The basketball coach taught us some new moves during practice today.
coach.zh: 今天训练时篮球教练教了我们一些新动作。

coal.en: Some older houses in the village still use coal for heating.
coal.zh: 村里一些老房子还在用煤取暖。

coast.en: We drove along the coast and stopped at a seafood restaurant.
coast.zh: 我们沿着海岸开车，在一家海鲜餐厅停下来吃饭。

coat.en: Put on your coat before you go outside—it's freezing today.
coat.zh: 出门之前穿上外套——今天冷得要命。

code.en: You need to enter a code to unlock the door of the building.
code.zh: 你需要输入密码才能打开大楼的门。

coffee.en: Let's grab a coffee at the café down the street.
coffee.zh: 我们去街那头的咖啡馆喝杯咖啡吧。

coin.en: She found an old coin in the pocket of her vintage jacket.
coin.zh: 她在复古夹克的口袋里发现了一枚老硬币。

cold.en: I caught a cold last week and had to stay in bed for two days.
cold.zh: 上周我感冒了，不得不卧床两天。

collapse.en: He was so tired after the marathon that he nearly collapsed.
collapse.zh: 跑完马拉松后他累得差点倒下。

colleague.en: A colleague brought homemade soup for everyone in the office.
colleague.zh: 一位同事给办公室每个人带了自制的汤。

collect.en: My little brother loves to collect stamps from different countries.
collect.zh: 我弟弟喜欢收集不同国家的邮票。

collection.en: She has an amazing collection of vintage dresses in her closet.
collection.zh: 她的衣柜里收藏了一批令人惊叹的复古裙子。

collective.en: The collective effort of the whole team made the event a success.
collective.zh: 全团队的集体努力使活动取得了成功。

college.en: My daughter will start college in September and I'm so proud.
college.zh: 我女儿九月就要上大学了，我很自豪。

colony.en: We discovered a colony of ants living under the garden stones.
colony.zh: 我们发现花园石头下面有一窝蚂蚁。

color.en: What color do you want to paint the living room walls?
color.zh: 你想把客厅的墙刷成什么颜色？

column.en: I read her advice column in the newspaper every Sunday.
column.zh: 每个星期天我都读报纸上她的专栏。

combine.en: Combine the flour, eggs, and sugar to make the cake batter.
combine.zh: 把面粉、鸡蛋和糖混合在一起做蛋糕糊。

combination.en: The combination of chocolate and strawberry is my favorite ice cream flavor.
combination.zh: 巧克力和草莓的组合是我最喜欢的冰淇淋口味。

come.en: Can you come to my house for dinner this Friday?
come.zh: 这周五你能来我家吃晚饭吗？

comfort.en: She tried to comfort her friend who was feeling sad about the breakup.
comfort.zh: 她试着安慰因分手而难过的朋友。

comfortable.en: This sofa is so comfortable that I could fall asleep on it.
comfortable.zh: 这个沙发太舒服了，我都能在上面睡着。

command.en: The dog learned to follow basic commands like sit and stay.
command.zh: 那只狗学会了坐下和待着等基本指令。

comment.en: She left a nice comment on my photo on social media.
comment.zh: 她在社交媒体上给我的照片留了一条很好的评论。

commerce.en: The growth of online commerce has made shopping much more convenient.
commerce.zh: 电子商务的发展让购物方便多了。

commercial.en: I saw a funny commercial for a new phone during the show.
commercial.zh: 看节目时我看到了一个新手机的搞笑广告。

commission.en: The salesperson earns a commission on every car she sells.
commission.zh: 那位销售员每卖一辆车都能拿到提成。

commit.en: She committed herself to exercising at least three times a week.
commit.zh: 她承诺每周至少锻炼三次。

commitment.en: Marriage is a big commitment that requires love and patience.
commitment.zh: 婚姻是一个重大承诺，需要爱和耐心。

committee.en: The school committee decided to organize a spring festival for families.
committee.zh: 学校委员会决定为家庭们举办一场春季活动。

common.en: It's common to bring a small gift when visiting someone's home.
common.zh: 去别人家做客时带份小礼物是很常见的。

communicate.en: We communicate with our overseas relatives through video calls.
communicate.zh: 我们通过视频通话和海外亲戚联系。

communication.en: Good communication between parents and children is very important.
communication.zh: 父母和孩子之间良好的沟通非常重要。

community.en: Our community organized a weekend cleanup event at the local park.
community.zh: 我们社区在本地公园组织了一次周末清洁活动。

companion.en: My dog has been my loyal companion for the past eight years.
companion.zh: 过去八年来，我的狗一直是我忠实的伙伴。

company.en: She enjoys the company of her friends over a cup of tea.
company.zh: 她喜欢和朋友一起喝茶聊天。

compare.en: I always compare prices online before buying anything expensive.
compare.zh: 买贵重物品之前我总是先在网上比较价格。

comparison.en: In comparison to last year, this summer has been much cooler.
comparison.zh: 与去年相比，今年夏天凉快了很多。

compete.en: The two bakeries compete for customers by offering fresh daily specials.
compete.zh: 两家面包店通过每日特价来争夺顾客。

competition.en: She won first place in the school cooking competition.
competition.zh: 她在学校的烹饪比赛中获得了第一名。

competitive.en: The prices at this store are very competitive compared to other shops.
competitive.zh: 这家店的价格和其他商店比起来很有竞争力。

competitor.en: The new restaurant is a strong competitor to the café next door.
competitor.zh: 新开的餐厅是隔壁咖啡馆的强力竞争对手。

complain.en: The neighbors complained about the loud music from our party.
complain.zh: 邻居们投诉了我们聚会时放的大声音乐。

complaint.en: The hotel manager handled our complaint about the noisy room quickly.
complaint.zh: 酒店经理很快处理了我们对房间噪音的投诉。

complete.en: She managed to complete the jigsaw puzzle in just two hours.
complete.zh: 她仅用两个小时就完成了拼图。

complex.en: The recipe looked complex, but it was actually quite easy to follow.
complex.zh: 这个菜谱看起来复杂，但其实很容易操作。

complexity.en: I was surprised by the complexity of assembling the furniture.
complexity.zh: 组装家具的复杂程度让我很吃惊。

component.en: Fresh vegetables are a key component of a healthy diet.
component.zh: 新鲜蔬菜是健康饮食的关键组成部分。

compose.en: She sat at the piano and composed a short melody for her daughter.
compose.zh: 她坐在钢琴前为女儿创作了一段小曲。

composition.en: The composition of the salad includes lettuce, tomatoes, and cucumbers.
composition.zh: 这份沙拉的组成包括生菜、西红柿和黄瓜。

comprehensive.en: The travel guide provides a comprehensive list of things to do in the city.
comprehensive.zh: 这本旅游指南提供了该城市详尽的游玩清单。

computer.en: My computer suddenly crashed and I lost all my photos.
computer.zh: 我的电脑突然崩了，所有照片都丢了。

concentrate.en: I can't concentrate on my work when the TV is on.
concentrate.zh: 电视开着的时候我无法集中精力工作。

concentration.en: Reading in a noisy café requires a lot of concentration.
concentration.zh: 在嘈杂的咖啡馆看书需要很强的注意力。

concept.en: The concept of sharing meals with strangers is popular in some cities.
concept.zh: 和陌生人一起吃饭的概念在一些城市很流行。

concern.en: Her main concern is finding a safe neighborhood for her children.
concern.zh: 她最关心的是为孩子找到一个安全的社区。

conclude.en: The meeting concluded with everyone agreeing on the vacation schedule.
conclude.zh: 会议在大家就假期安排达成一致后结束了。

conclusion.en: After trying both restaurants, I came to the conclusion that the first one is better.
conclusion.zh: 两家餐厅都试过后，我得出结论还是第一家更好。

condition.en: The used car was in excellent condition and had low mileage.
condition.zh: 这辆二手车状况很好，里程数也低。

conduct.en: The hotel conducts a fire drill once every three months.
conduct.zh: 酒店每三个月进行一次消防演习。

conference.en: He attended a business conference in Beijing last week.
conference.zh: 他上周去北京参加了一个商务会议。

confidence.en: Practicing in front of a mirror helped build her confidence.
confidence.zh: 对着镜子练习帮助她建立了自信。

confident.en: She feels confident about passing the driving test this time.
confident.zh: 这次她对通过驾照考试很有信心。

confirm.en: Please confirm your reservation by calling the restaurant tonight.
confirm.zh: 请今晚给餐厅打电话确认你的预订。

conflict.en: There was a conflict between the two roommates about cleaning duties.
conflict.zh: 两个室友之间因为打扫卫生的事产生了矛盾。

confront.en: She finally confronted her neighbor about the loud music at night.
confront.zh: 她终于就晚上放大声音乐的事去找邻居当面说了。

confuse.en: The complicated menu confused us, so we asked the waiter for help.
confuse.zh: 复杂的菜单把我们搞糊涂了，我们只好请服务员帮忙。

confusion.en: There was some confusion about the meeting time, so half the team showed up late.
confusion.zh: 大家对开会时间有些搞混了，结果一半人迟到了。

congress.en: The international food congress will be held in our city this fall.
congress.zh: 国际食品大会今年秋天将在我们城市举行。

connect.en: I can't connect to the Wi-Fi—do you know the password?
connect.zh: 我连不上Wi-Fi——你知道密码吗？

connection.en: We missed our connection at the airport because our first flight was delayed.
connection.zh: 因为第一趟航班延误，我们在机场错过了转机。

conscious.en: She is very conscious about what she eats and avoids processed food.
conscious.zh: 她非常注意饮食，避免吃加工食品。

consequence.en: One consequence of sleeping late is feeling tired the next morning.
consequence.zh: 晚睡的一个后果是第二天早上会很累。

conservative.en: My grandfather is very conservative and prefers traditional home cooking.
conservative.zh: 我爷爷很传统，更喜欢传统家常菜。

consider.en: We should consider taking the train instead of driving to save money.
consider.zh: 我们应该考虑坐火车而不是开车去，这样能省钱。

considerable.en: Moving to a new city requires a considerable amount of planning.
considerable.zh: 搬到一个新城市需要做大量的规划。

consideration.en: Please take the weather into consideration when planning the outdoor party.
consideration.zh: 策划户外派对时请把天气因素考虑进去。

consist.en: A healthy breakfast should consist of protein, fruit, and whole grains.
consist.zh: 健康的早餐应该包含蛋白质、水果和全谷物。

consistent.en: She has been consistent with her workout routine for three months now.
consistent.zh: 她坚持锻炼已经三个月了，一直没有中断。

constant.en: The constant noise from the construction site is really bothering us.
constant.zh: 建筑工地持续不断的噪音真的很烦人。

constantly.en: He is constantly checking his phone for messages during dinner.
constantly.zh: 吃饭时他不停地看手机有没有消息。

constitute.en: Women constitute more than half of the students in our class.
constitute.zh: 女生占我们班学生的一半以上。

construct.en: They plan to construct a new swimming pool in the community center.
construct.zh: 他们计划在社区中心建一个新游泳池。

construction.en: The road is closed because of the construction work on the bridge.
construction.zh: 因为桥梁施工，这条路封了。

consult.en: You should consult a doctor if the pain doesn't go away soon.
consult.zh: 如果疼痛不快点好，你应该去看医生。

consultant.en: We hired a design consultant to help us redecorate the living room.
consultant.zh: 我们请了一位设计顾问帮忙重新装修客厅。

consume.en: People tend to consume more snacks while watching TV at night.
consume.zh: 人们晚上看电视时往往会吃更多零食。

consumer.en: As a smart consumer, you should always compare prices before buying.
consumer.zh: 作为一个聪明的消费者，购买前应该货比三家。

consumption.en: Reducing water consumption is important for protecting the environment.
consumption.zh: 减少用水量对保护环境很重要。

contact.en: Please contact me if you have any questions about the order.
contact.zh: 如果你对订单有任何问题，请联系我。

contain.en: This soup contains no artificial flavors—it's all natural.
contain.zh: 这道汤不含人工调味料——全是天然的。

container.en: Put the leftover food in a container and store it in the fridge.
container.zh: 把剩下的饭菜放进容器里，存到冰箱。

contemporary.en: The apartment has a contemporary design with clean lines and open spaces.
contemporary.zh: 这套公寓是现代风格的设计，线条简洁、空间开阔。

content.en: She felt content sitting on the porch and watching the sunset.
content.zh: 她坐在门廊上看日落，感到很满足。

contest.en: My daughter entered a drawing contest at school and won second place.
contest.zh: 我女儿参加了学校的绘画比赛，获得了第二名。

context.en: You need to understand the context before judging someone's behavior.
context.zh: 在评判别人的行为之前，你需要了解背景情况。

continent.en: She dreams of visiting every continent before she turns forty.
continent.zh: 她梦想在四十岁之前去到每一个大洲。

continue.en: Let's continue this conversation over dinner tonight.
continue.zh: 我们今晚吃饭时继续聊这个话题吧。

contract.en: Read the rental contract carefully before signing it.
contract.zh: 签字之前仔细阅读租房合同。

contrast.en: The contrast between city life and country life surprised her.
contrast.zh: 城市生活和乡村生活之间的反差让她很吃惊。

contribute.en: Everyone in the family contributes to cooking and cleaning at home.
contribute.zh: 家里每个人都参与做饭和打扫卫生。

contribution.en: Her contribution to the team project was the most creative part.
contribution.zh: 她对团队项目的贡献是最有创意的部分。

control.en: You can control the air conditioner with this remote.
control.zh: 你可以用这个遥控器控制空调。

controversial.en: The decision to cut down the old trees in the park was very controversial.
controversial.zh: 砍掉公园里的老树的决定引起了很大争议。

controversy.en: The new parking rules caused a controversy among the residents.
controversy.zh: 新的停车规定在居民中引起了争议。

convenient.en: It's very convenient to have a grocery store right next to our building.
convenient.zh: 我们楼旁边就有一家超市，非常方便。

convention.en: They attended a comic book convention and bought lots of collectibles.
convention.zh: 他们参加了动漫展，买了很多收藏品。

conventional.en: She prefers conventional cooking methods over using a microwave.
conventional.zh: 比起用微波炉，她更喜欢传统的烹饪方式。

conversation.en: We had a long conversation over coffee about our travel plans.
conversation.zh: 我们一边喝咖啡一边长聊了我们的旅行计划。

convert.en: They converted the spare bedroom into a home office.
convert.zh: 他们把空余的卧室改造成了家庭办公室。

convince.en: I tried to convince my mom to let me adopt a cat.
convince.zh: 我试着说服妈妈让我养一只猫。

cook.en: My dad loves to cook Italian food on Sunday afternoons.
cook.zh: 我爸爸喜欢在周日下午做意大利菜。

cool.en: The weather is getting cooler now that autumn is here.
cool.zh: 秋天来了，天气开始变凉了。

cooperate.en: The two families cooperated to organize a big neighborhood barbecue.
cooperate.zh: 两家人合作组织了一场大型社区烧烤。

cooperation.en: Thanks to everyone's cooperation, the school event was a big success.
cooperation.zh: 多亏了大家的配合，学校活动取得了巨大的成功。

cope.en: She learned to cope with stress by taking long walks in the evening.
cope.zh: 她学会了通过晚上散步来应对压力。

copy.en: Can you make a copy of this recipe for me before you go?
copy.zh: 你走之前能帮我抄一份这个菜谱吗？

core.en: Spending time with family is at the core of our holiday traditions.
core.zh: 和家人在一起是我们节日传统的核心。

corner.en: There's a nice little flower shop on the corner of our street.
corner.zh: 我们街角有一家不错的小花店。

corporate.en: She left her corporate job to open a small café in the countryside.
corporate.zh: 她辞去了公司的工作，在乡下开了一家小咖啡馆。

correct.en: Make sure you enter the correct password to access your account.
correct.zh: 确保你输入正确的密码来登录账户。

correspond.en: The number on your ticket should correspond to the seat number on the plane.
correspond.zh: 你机票上的号码应该和飞机上的座位号一致。

correspondent.en: The news correspondent reported live from the scene of the festival.
correspondent.zh: 新闻记者从节日现场进行了直播报道。

cost.en: The cost of living in this city has gone up a lot recently.
cost.zh: 这个城市的生活成本最近涨了很多。

couch.en: After a long day, I just want to lie on the couch and relax.
couch.zh: 忙碌了一天后，我只想躺在沙发上放松。

could.en: Could you please pass me the salt from the other side of the table?
could.zh: 你能把桌子那边的盐递给我吗？

council.en: The city council voted to build a new park in our neighborhood.
council.zh: 市议会投票决定在我们社区建一个新公园。

count.en: Let me count how many eggs we have left in the fridge.
count.zh: 让我数数冰箱里还剩多少个鸡蛋。

counter.en: She left the car keys on the kitchen counter this morning.
counter.zh: 今天早上她把车钥匙放在厨房台面上了。

country.en: We spent our vacation in the country, away from the busy city.
country.zh: 我们在乡下度假，远离繁忙的城市。

county.en: The county fair has rides, games, and lots of delicious food.
county.zh: 县博览会有游乐设施、游戏和各种美食。

couple.en: The couple next door just had their first baby last week.
couple.zh: 隔壁那对夫妇上周刚生了第一个宝宝。

courage.en: It took a lot of courage for her to speak in front of the whole school.
courage.zh: 在全校面前发言需要她鼓起很大的勇气。

course.en: I signed up for a cooking course to learn how to make French food.
course.zh: 我报了一个烹饪课程，学习做法国菜。

court.en: The kids play basketball at the court near the school every afternoon.
court.zh: 孩子们每天下午在学校旁边的球场打篮球。

cousin.en: My cousin is coming to visit us from Shanghai this summer.
cousin.zh: 我表哥今年夏天从上海来看我们。

cover.en: She used a blanket to cover the baby while he was sleeping.
cover.zh: 宝宝睡觉时她用毯子把他盖好。

crack.en: There's a crack in my phone screen from dropping it yesterday.
crack.zh: 昨天手机摔了一下，屏幕裂了一道缝。

craft.en: The children made beautiful crafts with paper and glue in art class.
craft.zh: 孩子们在美术课上用纸和胶水做了漂亮的手工。

crash.en: We heard a loud crash in the kitchen and ran to see what happened.
crash.zh: 我们听到厨房传来一声巨响，赶紧跑去看怎么了。

crazy.en: The store was crazy busy during the holiday sale last weekend.
crazy.zh: 上周末节日促销时，那家店忙疯了。

cream.en: She likes to add cream and sugar to her morning coffee.
cream.zh: 她喜欢在早上的咖啡里加奶油和糖。

create.en: She used old photos to create a beautiful scrapbook for her parents.
create.zh: 她用旧照片给父母做了一本精美的相册。

creation.en: The chef's latest creation is a dessert made with mango and coconut.
creation.zh: 这位厨师的最新创作是一款芒果椰子甜点。

creative.en: My daughter is very creative and loves drawing pictures of animals.
creative.zh: 我女儿很有创意，喜欢画各种动物。

creature.en: We saw many interesting sea creatures at the aquarium yesterday.
creature.zh: 昨天我们在水族馆看到了很多有趣的海洋生物。

credit.en: She paid for the new furniture with her credit card.
credit.zh: 她用信用卡买了新家具。

crew.en: The flight crew served drinks and snacks during the two-hour flight.
crew.zh: 两小时的飞行途中机组人员提供了饮料和零食。

crime.en: The crime rate in our neighborhood has dropped a lot this year.
crime.zh: 我们社区今年的犯罪率下降了很多。

criminal.en: The police caught the criminal who had been stealing bicycles.
criminal.zh: 警察抓住了那个一直偷自行车的罪犯。

crisis.en: We kept extra water at home in case of an emergency or crisis.
crisis.zh: 我们在家里多备了些水以防紧急情况或危机。

criteria.en: The main criteria for choosing a school were location and class size.
criteria.zh: 选学校的主要标准是位置和班级人数。

critic.en: The food critic gave the new Italian restaurant a five-star review.
critic.zh: 美食评论家给那家新的意大利餐厅打了五星好评。

critical.en: Getting enough sleep is critical for your health and well-being.
critical.zh: 充足的睡眠对你的健康和幸福至关重要。

criticism.en: He took the criticism about his cooking as a chance to improve.
criticism.zh: 他把对他厨艺的批评当作提升的机会。

crop.en: The farmer's crops were damaged by the heavy rain last month.
crop.zh: 上个月的暴雨损坏了农民的庄稼。

cross.en: Be sure to look both ways before you cross the street.
cross.zh: 过马路之前一定要左右看。

crowd.en: There was a huge crowd at the shopping mall during the holiday sale.
crowd.zh: 假日促销期间商场里人山人海。

crucial.en: It's crucial to arrive on time for your job interview.
crucial.zh: 面试准时到达是至关重要的。

cry.en: The baby started to cry when she couldn't find her favorite toy.
cry.zh: 宝宝找不到最喜欢的玩具时开始哭了。

crystal.en: The lake water was crystal clear and we could see the fish swimming.
crystal.zh: 湖水清澈见底，我们能看到鱼在游动。

cultural.en: We enjoyed many cultural activities during our trip to Japan.
cultural.zh: 去日本旅行时我们体验了很多文化活动。

culture.en: Learning about different cultures helps you understand people better.
culture.zh: 了解不同的文化能帮助你更好地理解他人。

cup.en: Would you like a cup of tea before you head home?
cup.zh: 回家之前要不要喝杯茶？

cure.en: Grandma says that chicken soup is the best cure for a cold.
cure.zh: 奶奶说鸡汤是治感冒最好的良方。

curiosity.en: The child's curiosity about everything around her made us all smile.
curiosity.zh: 孩子对周围一切事物的好奇心让我们都笑了。

curious.en: The cat was curious about the new puppy we brought home.
curious.zh: 猫对我们带回家的新小狗感到很好奇。

current.en: Her current job is at a bookstore, but she wants to become a teacher.
current.zh: 她目前在一家书店工作，但她想当老师。

currently.en: We are currently looking for a bigger apartment for our growing family.
currently.zh: 我们目前正在找一套更大的公寓，因为家庭成员增加了。

curriculum.en: The school added cooking classes to the curriculum this year.
curriculum.zh: 学校今年在课程中增加了烹饪课。

curtain.en: She opened the curtains to let the morning sunlight into the room.
curtain.zh: 她拉开窗帘让早晨的阳光照进房间。

curve.en: Slow down when you approach the sharp curve on this road.
curve.zh: 开到这条路的急弯处时请减速。

custom.en: It's a local custom to take off your shoes before entering a home.
custom.zh: 进门前脱鞋是当地的习惯。

customer.en: The restaurant treats every customer like a member of the family.
customer.zh: 这家餐厅把每位顾客都当作家人一样对待。

cut.en: Can you help me cut the vegetables for tonight's stir-fry?
cut.zh: 你能帮我切今晚炒菜用的蔬菜吗？

cycle.en: I cycle to work every day to save money and stay healthy.
cycle.zh: 我每天骑车上班，既省钱又健康。

damage.en: The storm caused serious damage to our roof last night.
damage.zh: 昨晚暴风雨对我们的屋顶造成了严重损坏。

dance.en: She loves to dance at parties with her friends.
dance.zh: 她喜欢在派对上和朋友们跳舞。

danger.en: Swimming alone in the ocean can be a real danger.
danger.zh: 独自在海里游泳可能是真正的危险。

dangerous.en: It's dangerous to cross the street without looking.
dangerous.zh: 过马路不看路是很危险的。

dare.en: I dare you to try the spiciest dish on the menu.
dare.zh: 我敢打赌你不敢点菜单上最辣的菜。

dark.en: It gets dark very early in winter.

data.en: I need to back up all my data before changing phones.
data.zh: 换手机前我需要备份所有数据。

date.en: We set a date for the family reunion next month.
date.zh: 我们定了下个月家庭聚会的日期。

daughter.en: My daughter just started kindergarten this year.
daughter.zh: 我女儿今年刚上幼儿园。

deal.en: I got a great deal on these shoes at the sale.
deal.zh: 我在打折时买到了这双鞋，很划算。

dear.en: She is a very dear friend of mine.
dear.zh: 她是我非常亲密的朋友。

death.en: The death of his grandfather made him very sad.
death.zh: 祖父的去世让他非常难过。

debate.en: We had a friendly debate about which movie to watch.
debate.zh: 我们友好地讨论了看哪部电影。

debt.en: He finally paid off all his student debt last year.
debt.zh: 他去年终于还清了所有学生贷款。

decade.en: My parents have lived in this city for over a decade.
decade.zh: 我父母在这个城市住了十多年了。

decent.en: The restaurant serves decent food at reasonable prices.
decent.zh: 这家餐厅以合理的价格提供不错的食物。

decide.en: We need to decide where to go for vacation.
decide.zh: 我们需要决定去哪里度假。

decision.en: Choosing a college was the hardest decision of my life.
decision.zh: 选择大学是我一生中最难的决定。

declare.en: He declared his love for her at the party.
declare.zh: 他在派对上向她表白了。

decline.en: She politely declined the dinner invitation.
decline.zh: 她礼貌地拒绝了晚餐邀请。

decorate.en: We spent all weekend decorating the house for Christmas.
decorate.zh: 我们花了整个周末装饰房子迎接圣诞节。

decrease.en: The price of vegetables decreased after the harvest season.
decrease.zh: 收获季节后蔬菜价格下降了。

deep.en: The swimming pool is two meters deep at the far end.

defeat.en: Our team defeated the champions in the final game.
defeat.zh: 我们队在决赛中击败了卫冕冠军。

defend.en: A mother will always defend her children.
defend.zh: 母亲总会保护自己的孩子。

define.en: Can you define what happiness means to you?
define.zh: 你能定义幸福对你意味着什么吗？

definition.en: Look up the definition of this word in the dictionary.
definition.zh: 在字典里查一下这个词的定义。

degree.en: She earned a degree in computer science from college.
degree.zh: 她在大学获得了计算机科学学位。

delay.en: The flight was delayed by two hours due to heavy rain.
delay.zh: 因为大雨，航班延误了两个小时。

deliberate.en: It was a deliberate choice to move closer to family.
deliberate.zh: 搬到离家人更近的地方是一个深思熟虑的选择。

delicate.en: Be careful with that vase, it's very delicate.
delicate.zh: 小心那个花瓶，它很易碎。

deliver.en: The pizza shop can deliver to your door in thirty minutes.
deliver.zh: 披萨店可以在三十分钟内送到你家门口。

delivery.en: I'm waiting for a package delivery this afternoon.
delivery.zh: 我今天下午在等一个快递。

demand.en: The demand for fresh fruit increases in summer.
demand.zh: 夏天对新鲜水果的需求增加了。

demonstrate.en: The chef demonstrated how to make dumplings step by step.
demonstrate.zh: 厨师一步步示范了如何包饺子。

deny.en: He denied eating the last piece of cake.
deny.zh: 他否认吃了最后一块蛋糕。

department.en: She works in the marketing department of a tech company.
department.zh: 她在一家科技公司的市场部工作。

depend.en: Whether we go hiking depends on the weather.
depend.zh: 我们是否去徒步取决于天气。

deposit.en: You need to pay a deposit when renting an apartment.

depression.en: Talking to friends can help when you feel depression.
depression.zh: 感到抑郁时和朋友聊聊会有帮助。

depth.en: The depth of the lake surprised all the swimmers.
depth.zh: 湖的深度让所有游泳者都很吃惊。

describe.en: Can you describe what the thief looked like?
describe.zh: 你能描述一下小偷长什么样吗？

description.en: The product description says it's waterproof.
description.zh: 产品描述说它是防水的。

desert.en: We drove through the desert for hours without seeing anyone.
desert.zh: 我们在沙漠中开了几个小时没看到一个人。

deserve.en: You worked so hard, you deserve a nice vacation.
deserve.zh: 你工作这么辛苦，值得好好度个假。

design.en: She designed the logo for our family business.
design.zh: 她为我们的家族企业设计了标志。

desire.en: His greatest desire is to travel around the world.
desire.zh: 他最大的愿望是环游世界。

desk.en: I keep my laptop and books on my desk.
desk.zh: 我把笔记本电脑和书放在书桌上。

desperate.en: I was desperate to find a bathroom during the road trip.
desperate.zh: 公路旅行中我急切地想找个卫生间。

despite.en: Despite the rain, we still had a great picnic.
despite.zh: 尽管下雨，我们的野餐仍然很愉快。

destination.en: Our vacation destination this year is Thailand.
destination.zh: 我们今年的度假目的地是泰国。

destroy.en: The earthquake destroyed many buildings in the city.
destroy.zh: 地震摧毁了城市里的许多建筑。

detail.en: Please tell me all the details about the party.
detail.zh: 请告诉我关于派对的所有细节。

detect.en: The smoke detector can detect fire early.
detect.zh: 烟雾探测器可以及早发现火灾。

determine.en: Your effort will determine your final exam results.
determine.zh: 你的努力将决定你的期末考试成绩。

develop.en: The city has developed rapidly in the last ten years.
develop.zh: 这个城市在过去十年里发展迅速。

development.en: The development of this neighborhood brought many new shops.
development.zh: 这个社区的开发带来了许多新商店。

device.en: This device can charge your phone wirelessly.
device.zh: 这个设备可以给你的手机无线充电。

devote.en: She devotes every Sunday to spending time with family.
devote.zh: 她每个周日都用来陪伴家人。

dialogue.en: Good dialogue between parents and kids is very important.
dialogue.zh: 父母和孩子之间良好的对话非常重要。

diamond.en: He bought a diamond ring for the proposal.
diamond.zh: 他为求婚买了一枚钻戒。

diet.en: A balanced diet is important for staying healthy.
diet.zh: 均衡饮食对保持健康很重要。

difference.en: Can you tell the difference between these two colors?
difference.zh: 你能分辨出这两种颜色的区别吗？

different.en: My sister and I have very different tastes in music.
different.zh: 我和姐姐的音乐品味非常不同。

difficult.en: Learning to cook was difficult at first, but now I love it.
difficult.zh: 刚开始学做饭很困难，但现在我很喜欢。

difficulty.en: She had difficulty finding a parking spot downtown.
difficulty.zh: 她在市中心很难找到停车位。

dig.en: The kids love to dig in the sand at the beach.
dig.zh: 孩子们喜欢在沙滩上挖沙子。

digital.en: Most people read news on digital devices now.
digital.zh: 现在大多数人在电子设备上看新闻。

dinner.en: We usually have dinner together as a family at seven.
dinner.zh: 我们通常七点一家人一起吃晚饭。

direct.en: Is there a direct flight from Beijing to New York?
direct.zh: 有从北京到纽约的直飞航班吗？

direction.en: Can you give me directions to the nearest subway station?
direction.zh: 你能告诉我最近的地铁站怎么走吗？

director.en: The director of the movie won an award last night.
director.zh: 这部电影的导演昨晚获奖了。

dirty.en: Please put your dirty clothes in the laundry basket.
dirty.zh: 请把你的脏衣服放进洗衣篮里。

disappear.en: My keys seem to disappear every time I need them.
disappear.zh: 每次我需要钥匙时它们似乎都会消失。

disappoint.en: I don't want to disappoint my parents, so I study hard.
disappoint.zh: 我不想让父母失望，所以我努力学习。

disaster.en: The dinner I cooked last night was a total disaster.
disaster.zh: 我昨晚做的晚餐完全是一场灾难。

discipline.en: Good discipline helps children develop healthy habits.
discipline.zh: 良好的纪律帮助孩子养成健康习惯。

discount.en: Students can get a ten percent discount at this bookstore.
discount.zh: 学生在这家书店可以打九折。

discover.en: I discovered a lovely little cafe near my office.
discover.zh: 我发现了办公室附近一家可爱的小咖啡馆。

discovery.en: The discovery of a new restaurant made our weekend.
discovery.zh: 发现一家新餐厅让我们的周末很开心。

discuss.en: Let's discuss our travel plans over coffee.
discuss.zh: 我们喝咖啡时讨论一下旅行计划吧。

discussion.en: We had a long discussion about where to move.
discussion.zh: 我们讨论了很久要搬到哪里。

disease.en: Washing your hands often can prevent many diseases.
disease.zh: 经常洗手可以预防很多疾病。

dish.en: This spicy tofu dish is my favorite at this restaurant.
dish.zh: 这道麻辣豆腐是我在这家餐厅最喜欢的菜。

dismiss.en: Don't dismiss his idea — it might actually work.
dismiss.zh: 别否定他的想法——也许真的可行。

display.en: The store has a beautiful display of holiday decorations.
display.zh: 商店有漂亮的节日装饰展示。

distance.en: The distance from my home to work is about five kilometers.
distance.zh: 我家到公司的距离大约五公里。

distant.en: We could see the distant mountains from the hotel window.
distant.zh: 我们能从酒店窗户看到远处的山。

distinct.en: Each season has its own distinct flavor of food.
distinct.zh: 每个季节都有自己独特的食物风味。

distinguish.en: It's hard to distinguish between the twins.

distribute.en: The teacher distributed the exam papers to all students.
distribute.zh: 老师把试卷分发给了所有学生。

district.en: The shopping district is always busy on weekends.
district.zh: 购物区周末总是很热闹。

disturb.en: Please don't disturb me while I'm studying.
disturb.zh: 我学习的时候请不要打扰我。

diverse.en: Our neighborhood is very diverse with people from many countries.
diverse.zh: 我们的社区非常多元化，有来自许多国家的人。

divide.en: Let's divide the pizza equally among the four of us.
divide.zh: 我们四个人平分这个披萨吧。

divorce.en: After the divorce, she moved back to her hometown.

doctor.en: I need to see a doctor about my headache.
doctor.zh: 我需要看医生治疗我的头痛。

document.en: Please bring all the necessary documents for the interview.
document.zh: 请带上面试所需的所有文件。

domestic.en: Domestic flights are usually cheaper than international ones.
domestic.zh: 国内航班通常比国际航班便宜。

dominate.en: This brand dominates the smartphone market.
dominate.zh: 这个品牌在智能手机市场占主导地位。

donate.en: She donates old clothes to charity every year.
donate.zh: 她每年都把旧衣服捐给慈善机构。

door.en: Please close the door when you leave the room.

double.en: The price of eggs has almost doubled this year.
double.zh: 鸡蛋的价格今年几乎翻了一倍。

doubt.en: I have no doubt that she will pass the exam.
doubt.zh: 我毫不怀疑她会通过考试。

download.en: I need to download this app for ordering food.
download.zh: 我需要下载这个点餐应用。

downtown.en: Let's go downtown to check out the new shopping mall.
downtown.zh: 我们去市中心看看那个新商场吧。

draft.en: I finished the first draft of my essay last night.
draft.zh: 我昨晚完成了论文的初稿。

drag.en: He helped me drag the heavy suitcase up the stairs.
drag.zh: 他帮我把沉重的行李箱拖上楼。

drama.en: My mom watches Korean drama every evening.
drama.zh: 我妈妈每天晚上看韩剧。

dramatic.en: The sunset over the ocean was absolutely dramatic.

draw.en: My daughter loves to draw pictures of our family.
draw.zh: 我女儿喜欢画我们家人的画。

dream.en: Her dream is to open a bakery someday.
dream.zh: 她的梦想是有一天开一家面包店。

dress.en: She bought a beautiful dress for the wedding.
dress.zh: 她为婚礼买了一件漂亮的裙子。

drink.en: Would you like something to drink? Coffee or tea?
drink.zh: 你想喝点什么？咖啡还是茶？

drive.en: It takes about an hour to drive to the airport.
drive.zh: 开车到机场大约需要一个小时。

drop.en: I accidentally dropped my phone in the water.
drop.zh: 我不小心把手机掉进了水里。

drug.en: The doctor prescribed a new drug for his allergy.
drug.zh: 医生给他开了一种治过敏的新药。

dry.en: The weather has been very dry this summer.
dry.zh: 今年夏天天气非常干燥。

due.en: The homework is due tomorrow morning.

during.en: Please turn off your phone during the movie.

dust.en: I need to dust the shelves — they're covered in dust.
dust.zh: 我需要擦书架上的灰尘——都落满灰了。

duty.en: It's my duty to take care of my elderly parents.
duty.zh: 照顾年迈的父母是我的责任。

dynamic.en: Shanghai is a very dynamic and exciting city.
dynamic.zh: 上海是一个非常有活力和令人兴奋的城市。

each.en: Each student received a certificate at the ceremony.
each.zh: 每个学生在典礼上都收到了证书。

earn.en: She earns enough money to support her family.

earth.en: We should all do our part to protect the earth.
earth.zh: 我们都应该尽自己的力量保护地球。

ease.en: This app makes online shopping so much easier with ease.
ease.zh: 这个应用让网购变得轻松多了。

east.en: The sun rises in the east every morning.
east.zh: 太阳每天早上从东方升起。

easy.en: This recipe is very easy to follow.
easy.zh: 这个食谱非常容易操作。

eat.en: Let's eat lunch together at the new noodle shop.
eat.zh: 我们一起去那家新面馆吃午饭吧。

economy.en: The local economy depends heavily on tourism.
economy.zh: 当地经济严重依赖旅游业。

edge.en: Be careful near the edge of the swimming pool.

edit.en: I need to edit my photos before posting them online.
edit.zh: 我需要在发布照片前先编辑一下。

educate.en: Parents and teachers work together to educate children.
educate.zh: 父母和老师共同教育孩子。

education.en: A good education can change a person's life.
education.zh: 良好的教育可以改变一个人的一生。

effect.en: The medicine had a positive effect on her health.
effect.zh: 这种药对她的健康有积极作用。

effective.en: Exercise is an effective way to reduce stress.
effective.zh: 运动是减轻压力的有效方法。

efficient.en: This washing machine is very energy efficient.

effort.en: With enough effort, you can achieve anything.
effort.zh: 只要足够努力，你可以实现任何目标。

elderly.en: We should always offer our seats to elderly people on the bus.
elderly.zh: 在公交车上我们应该给老人让座。

elect.en: The students elected a new class president today.
elect.zh: 学生们今天选了一个新的班长。

electric.en: We bought an electric car to save on gas.
electric.zh: 我们买了一辆电动车来省油钱。

element.en: Trust is an essential element of any good friendship.
element.zh: 信任是任何良好友谊的基本要素。

eliminate.en: We need to eliminate sugar from our daily diet.
eliminate.zh: 我们需要从日常饮食中去除糖分。

email.en: I'll send you an email with all the meeting details.
email.zh: 我会给你发一封邮件，附上所有会议细节。

embrace.en: She embraced her daughter after not seeing her for a year.
embrace.zh: 一年没见后，她拥抱了女儿。

emerge.en: The sun emerged from behind the clouds after the rain.
emerge.zh: 雨后太阳从云层后面露了出来。

emergency.en: Call 120 immediately in case of a medical emergency.
emergency.zh: 遇到医疗紧急情况立即拨打120。

emotion.en: The movie brought out so many emotions in the audience.
emotion.zh: 这部电影引发了观众很多情感。

emphasis.en: Our school puts great emphasis on reading skills.
emphasis.zh: 我们学校非常重视阅读能力。

employ.en: The new factory will employ over two hundred workers.
employ.zh: 新工厂将雇用两百多名工人。

employee.en: Every employee gets two weeks of paid vacation.
employee.zh: 每位员工有两周带薪假期。

empty.en: The fridge is empty — we need to go grocery shopping.
empty.zh: 冰箱空了——我们需要去买菜。

enable.en: This feature enables you to share files with friends.
enable.zh: 这个功能让你可以和朋友分享文件。

encounter.en: I encountered an old friend at the supermarket yesterday.
encounter.zh: 我昨天在超市遇到了一个老朋友。

encourage.en: My parents always encourage me to try new things.
encourage.zh: 我父母总是鼓励我尝试新事物。

end.en: The movie has a happy ending that everyone loved.
end.zh: 这部电影有一个大家都喜欢的美好结局。

enemy.en: Sugar is the number one enemy of healthy teeth.
enemy.zh: 糖是健康牙齿的头号敌人。

energy.en: I don't have enough energy to exercise after work.
energy.zh: 下班后我没有足够的精力去锻炼。

engage.en: The teacher knows how to engage students in learning.
engage.zh: 这位老师知道如何让学生投入学习。

engine.en: The car engine makes a strange noise when I start it.
engine.zh: 启动时汽车发动机发出奇怪的声音。

engineer.en: My brother works as a software engineer in Beijing.
engineer.zh: 我哥哥在北京做软件工程师。

enjoy.en: I really enjoy cooking dinner for my family.
enjoy.zh: 我真的很享受为家人做晚餐。

enormous.en: The shopping mall is enormous — it has over 500 stores.
enormous.zh: 这个商场非常大——有500多家店铺。

enough.en: Do we have enough rice for dinner tonight?
enough.zh: 今晚晚饭我们的米饭够吗？

ensure.en: Please ensure all windows are closed before leaving.
ensure.zh: 离开前请确保所有窗户都关好了。

enter.en: Please enter your password to unlock the phone.

enterprise.en: She started a small enterprise selling handmade jewelry.
enterprise.zh: 她创办了一家卖手工首饰的小企业。

entertainment.en: Movies are my favorite form of entertainment.
entertainment.zh: 电影是我最喜欢的娱乐方式。

entire.en: We spent the entire weekend cleaning the house.
entire.zh: 我们整个周末都在打扫房子。

entrance.en: The entrance to the park is on the east side.

environment.en: We should protect the environment for future generations.
environment.zh: 我们应该为后代保护环境。

equal.en: Everyone should receive equal treatment regardless of gender.
equal.zh: 每个人不论性别都应受到平等对待。

equipment.en: You need proper equipment for hiking in the mountains.
equipment.zh: 在山里徒步需要合适的装备。

era.en: We are living in the era of artificial intelligence.
era.zh: 我们生活在人工智能时代。

error.en: I made an error when filling out the form.
error.zh: 我填表时犯了一个错误。

escape.en: Reading is my favorite way to escape from daily stress.
escape.zh: 阅读是我逃避日常压力的最好方式。

especially.en: I love fruit, especially strawberries and mangoes.
especially.zh: 我喜欢水果，尤其是草莓和芒果。

essay.en: I need to write a 500-word essay for English class.
essay.zh: 我需要为英语课写一篇500字的作文。

essential.en: Water is essential for all living things.
essential.zh: 水对所有生物都是必不可少的。

establish.en: They established a small restaurant in the neighborhood.
establish.zh: 他们在社区里开了一家小餐馆。

estate.en: Real estate prices keep going up in this city.
estate.zh: 这个城市的房价一直在涨。

estimate.en: Can you estimate how much the repair will cost?
estimate.zh: 你能估计一下维修要花多少钱吗？

evaluate.en: Teachers evaluate students through tests and homework.
evaluate.zh: 老师通过考试和作业来评估学生。

even.en: Even my grandmother knows how to use a smartphone.
even.zh: 连我奶奶都会用智能手机。

evening.en: We like to take a walk in the park every evening.
evening.zh: 我们喜欢每天傍晚在公园散步。

event.en: The school is organizing a sports event next Friday.
event.zh: 学校下周五要组织一场运动会。

eventually.en: If you keep practicing, you will eventually get better.
eventually.zh: 如果你坚持练习，最终会越来越好。

ever.en: Have you ever been to Japan?

every.en: I drink a glass of warm water every morning.
every.zh: 我每天早上喝一杯温水。

evidence.en: There is strong evidence that exercise improves sleep.
evidence.zh: 有充分证据表明运动能改善睡眠。

evil.en: The villain in the movie was truly evil.
evil.zh: 电影里的反派真的很邪恶。

evolution.en: The evolution of smartphones has changed how we communicate.
evolution.zh: 智能手机的演变改变了我们的沟通方式。

exact.en: What is the exact time of the meeting tomorrow?
exact.zh: 明天会议的确切时间是几点？

exactly.en: That's exactly what I was thinking!

exam.en: I'm studying hard for the final exam next week.
exam.zh: 我在为下周的期末考试努力学习。

examine.en: The doctor examined her eyes carefully.
examine.zh: 医生仔细检查了她的眼睛。

example.en: Can you give me an example of how to use this word?
example.zh: 你能给我一个这个词的用法例子吗？

excellent.en: The service at this hotel is truly excellent.
excellent.zh: 这家酒店的服务真的非常棒。

except.en: Everyone came to the party except Tom.
except.zh: 除了汤姆，每个人都来参加了派对。

exchange.en: I need to exchange some dollars for local currency.
exchange.zh: 我需要把一些美元换成当地货币。

excite.en: The news about the trip excited all the children.
excite.zh: 旅行的消息让所有孩子都很兴奋。

exclude.en: The price excludes tax and delivery fees.

excuse.en: Excuse me, could you tell me where the restroom is?
excuse.zh: 请问，能告诉我卫生间在哪里吗？

exercise.en: I try to exercise at least three times a week.
exercise.zh: 我尽量每周至少锻炼三次。

exhibit.en: The museum is exhibiting paintings by local artists.
exhibit.zh: 博物馆正在展出当地艺术家的画作。

exist.en: Do you believe that aliens exist somewhere in the universe?
exist.zh: 你相信宇宙中某个地方存在外星人吗？

expand.en: The company plans to expand into new markets next year.
expand.zh: 公司计划明年拓展新市场。

expect.en: I expect the package to arrive by Friday.
expect.zh: 我预计包裹周五前到达。

expense.en: Traveling abroad can be a big expense.
expense.zh: 出国旅行可能是一笔很大的开销。

expensive.en: This restaurant is too expensive for everyday dining.
expensive.zh: 这家餐厅太贵了，不适合每天去吃。

experience.en: Traveling gives you a lot of valuable life experience.
experience.zh: 旅行给你很多宝贵的人生经验。

experiment.en: The kids did a fun science experiment at school today.
experiment.zh: 孩子们今天在学校做了一个有趣的科学实验。

expert.en: My uncle is an expert at fixing old cars.
expert.zh: 我叔叔是修理老车的专家。

explain.en: Can you explain how to get to the train station?
explain.zh: 你能解释一下怎么去火车站吗？

explore.en: We love to explore new neighborhoods in the city.
explore.zh: 我们喜欢探索城市里的新社区。

export.en: China exports tea to many countries around the world.
export.zh: 中国向世界许多国家出口茶叶。

expose.en: Don't expose your skin to the sun for too long.
expose.zh: 不要让皮肤在阳光下暴露太久。

express.en: He expressed his gratitude with a heartfelt thank-you card.
express.zh: 他用一张真诚的感谢卡表达了他的感激。

extend.en: We decided to extend our vacation by two more days.
extend.zh: 我们决定把假期再延长两天。

extent.en: To what extent does weather affect your mood?
extent.zh: 天气在多大程度上影响你的心情？

extra.en: I always carry an extra umbrella in my bag.
extra.zh: 我包里总是多带一把雨伞。

extreme.en: The extreme heat made it impossible to go outside.
extreme.zh: 极度高温让人无法出门。

eye.en: She has beautiful blue eyes like her mother.
eye.zh: 她有一双像妈妈一样美丽的蓝眼睛。

face.en: Wash your face before going to bed every night.

facility.en: The gym facility in our apartment building is really nice.
facility.zh: 我们公寓楼里的健身设施非常好。

fact.en: In fact, she is the best student in our class.
fact.zh: 事实上，她是我们班最好的学生。

factor.en: Price is an important factor when choosing a restaurant.
factor.zh: 价格是选择餐厅时的一个重要因素。

factory.en: My father works at a car factory outside the city.
factory.zh: 我爸爸在城外的一家汽车工厂工作。

fail.en: Don't be afraid to fail — everyone makes mistakes.
fail.zh: 不要害怕失败——每个人都会犯错。

fair.en: It's not fair that he gets a bigger piece of cake.
fair.zh: 他拿更大一块蛋糕不公平。

faith.en: I have faith that everything will work out fine.
faith.zh: 我相信一切都会好起来的。

fall.en: Be careful not to fall on the wet floor.
fall.zh: 小心别在湿地板上滑倒。

false.en: The rumor about the store closing is completely false.
false.zh: 关于商店关门的谣言完全是假的。

familiar.en: This song sounds very familiar to me.
familiar.zh: 这首歌听起来我很熟悉。

family.en: I have a big family with three brothers and two sisters.
family.zh: 我家很大，有三个兄弟和两个姐妹。

famous.en: This city is famous for its delicious street food.
famous.zh: 这座城市以美味的街头小吃而闻名。

fan.en: I'm a big fan of basketball and watch every game.
fan.zh: 我是篮球的超级粉丝，每场比赛都看。

fancy.en: We went to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.
fancy.zh: 我们去了一家高档餐厅庆祝纪念日。

fantastic.en: The view from the top of the mountain was fantastic.

far.en: How far is the nearest hospital from here?
far.zh: 最近的医院离这里有多远？

farm.en: We visited a farm and picked fresh strawberries.
farm.zh: 我们参观了一个农场，摘了新鲜草莓。

fashion.en: She keeps up with the latest fashion trends.
fashion.zh: 她紧跟最新的时尚潮流。

fast.en: Don't eat too fast — it's bad for your stomach.

fat.en: Too much fat in your diet is not healthy.
fat.zh: 饮食中脂肪过多不健康。

father.en: My father taught me how to ride a bicycle.

fault.en: It's not your fault — don't blame yourself.
fault.zh: 这不是你的错——别责怪自己。

favor.en: Can you do me a favor and pick up some milk?
favor.zh: 你能帮我个忙买些牛奶吗？

favorite.en: Pizza is my favorite food in the whole world.
favorite.zh: 披萨是我全世界最喜欢的食物。

fear.en: She overcame her fear of flying and took a trip abroad.
fear.zh: 她克服了对飞行的恐惧，去国外旅行了。

feature.en: The best feature of this phone is its camera.
feature.zh: 这部手机最好的功能是它的摄像头。

fee.en: The entrance fee for the museum is fifty yuan.
fee.zh: 博物馆的门票是五十元。

feed.en: Don't forget to feed the cat before you leave.

feel.en: I feel much better after a good night's sleep.
feel.zh: 睡了一个好觉后我感觉好多了。

female.en: The company has more female employees than male.
female.zh: 公司女员工比男员工多。

fence.en: We built a wooden fence around the garden.
fence.zh: 我们在花园周围建了一道木栅栏。

few.en: There are only a few tickets left for the concert.

field.en: The children are playing soccer in the open field.
field.zh: 孩子们在空旷的场地上踢足球。

fight.en: The two boys got into a fight over a toy.
