fight.zh: 两个男孩因为一个玩具打了起来。

figure.en: I'm trying to figure out how to fix this problem.
figure.zh: 我在想办法解决这个问题。

fill.en: Please fill the water bottle before we go hiking.
fill.zh: 去徒步前请把水壶装满。

film.en: We watched an amazing film at the cinema last night.
film.zh: 我们昨晚在电影院看了一部很棒的电影。

final.en: This is the final chance to register for the class.
final.zh: 这是报名这门课的最后机会。

finally.en: I finally found my lost keys under the sofa.
finally.zh: 我终于在沙发下面找到了丢失的钥匙。

finance.en: She manages the finance for a small business.
finance.zh: 她为一家小公司管理财务。

financial.en: Good financial planning helps you save for the future.
financial.zh: 良好的财务规划帮助你为未来储蓄。

find.en: I can't find my phone — have you seen it?
find.zh: 我找不到手机了——你看到了吗？

fine.en: The weather is fine today, let's go to the beach.
fine.zh: 今天天气很好，我们去海滩吧。

finger.en: I cut my finger while chopping vegetables.

finish.en: I need to finish this report before five o'clock.
finish.zh: 我需要在五点前完成这份报告。

fire.en: Someone called the fire department when they saw smoke.
fire.zh: 有人看到烟雾后报了火警。

firm.en: She works at a law firm in the city center.
firm.zh: 她在市中心的一家律师事务所工作。

fish.en: We went fishing at the lake and caught three fish.
fish.zh: 我们去湖边钓鱼，钓到了三条鱼。

fit.en: These shoes don't fit me — they're too small.

fix.en: Can you fix my bicycle? The chain is broken.
fix.zh: 你能修一下我的自行车吗？链条断了。

flag.en: Every classroom has a national flag on the wall.
flag.zh: 每间教室墙上都有一面国旗。

flat.en: We got a flat tire on the way to the airport.
flat.zh: 去机场的路上我们爆胎了。

flavor.en: What flavor of ice cream would you like?
flavor.zh: 你想要什么口味的冰淇淋？

flight.en: Our flight to Shanghai departs at eight in the morning.
flight.zh: 我们去上海的航班早上八点起飞。

float.en: The leaves float gently on the surface of the water.
float.zh: 树叶轻轻地漂浮在水面上。

flood.en: The heavy rain caused a flood in the downtown area.
flood.zh: 大雨在市中心地区造成了洪水。

floor.en: Please mop the floor after dinner.

flow.en: The river flows through the center of the city.

flower.en: He bought a bouquet of flowers for his wife's birthday.
flower.zh: 他为妻子的生日买了一束花。

fly.en: It takes twelve hours to fly from Beijing to New York.
fly.zh: 从北京飞到纽约需要十二个小时。

focus.en: I need to focus on my studies this semester.
focus.zh: 这学期我需要专注于学习。

follow.en: Follow me, I'll show you where the restaurant is.
follow.zh: 跟我来，我带你去看餐厅在哪里。

food.en: Chinese food is popular all around the world.
food.zh: 中国菜在全世界都很受欢迎。

foot.en: My foot hurts after walking all day.
foot.zh: 走了一整天，我的脚好痛。

force.en: You can't force a child to eat vegetables.
force.zh: 你不能强迫孩子吃蔬菜。

foreign.en: She speaks three foreign languages fluently.
foreign.zh: 她能流利地说三门外语。

forest.en: We went camping in the forest last weekend.
forest.zh: 上周末我们去森林露营了。

forget.en: Don't forget to bring your umbrella — it might rain.
forget.zh: 别忘了带雨伞——可能会下雨。

forgive.en: Please forgive me, I didn't mean to hurt your feelings.
forgive.zh: 请原谅我，我不是故意伤害你的感情的。

form.en: Please fill out this form with your personal information.
form.zh: 请用你的个人信息填写这份表格。

former.en: She is a former teacher who now works in business.
former.zh: 她以前是老师，现在从事商业工作。

fortune.en: He made a fortune by investing in real estate.
fortune.zh: 他通过投资房地产赚了一大笔钱。

forward.en: I'm looking forward to seeing you at the party.
forward.zh: 我期待在派对上见到你。

found.en: She founded a charity to help children in need.
found.zh: 她创立了一个帮助有需要的孩子的慈善机构。

foundation.en: A strong foundation is needed for any successful career.
foundation.zh: 任何成功的事业都需要坚实的基础。

free.en: Children under five can enter the zoo for free.
free.zh: 五岁以下的儿童可以免费进入动物园。

freedom.en: Freedom of speech is important in a democratic society.
freedom.zh: 言论自由在民主社会中很重要。

freeze.en: The lake will freeze if the temperature drops below zero.
freeze.zh: 如果气温降到零度以下，湖面就会结冰。

fresh.en: I always buy fresh vegetables from the farmers market.
fresh.zh: 我总是在农贸市场买新鲜蔬菜。

friend.en: My best friend and I have known each other since childhood.
friend.zh: 我和最好的朋友从小就认识。

front.en: There's a beautiful garden in front of the house.
front.zh: 房子前面有一个美丽的花园。

fruit.en: Eating more fruit is good for your health.
fruit.zh: 多吃水果对健康有好处。

fuel.en: Gas prices are the lowest they've been in months.
fuel.zh: 油价是几个月来最低的。

full.en: The restaurant was full, so we had to wait for a table.
full.zh: 餐厅满了，我们不得不等位。

fun.en: We had so much fun at the amusement park today.
fun.zh: 我们今天在游乐园玩得很开心。

function.en: What is the main function of this button?
function.zh: 这个按钮的主要功能是什么？

fund.en: They are raising funds to build a new school library.
fund.zh: 他们正在筹集资金建造新的学校图书馆。

funny.en: He told a funny joke that made everyone laugh.
funny.zh: 他讲了一个有趣的笑话，逗得大家都笑了。

furniture.en: We need to buy some new furniture for the living room.
furniture.zh: 我们需要给客厅买一些新家具。

future.en: I hope my children will have a bright future.
future.zh: 我希望我的孩子们有一个光明的未来。

galaxy.en: We looked up at the galaxy on our camping trip.
galaxy.zh: 我们在露营时抬头看银河。

garage.en: Dad parked the car in the garage before dinner.
garage.zh: 爸爸在晚饭前把车停进了车库。

gauge.en: Check the fuel gauge before we leave for the trip.
gauge.zh: 出发旅行前检查一下油表。

gender.en: The form asked me to fill in my gender.

gene.en: My mom says I got the cooking gene from grandma.
gene.zh: 我妈说我的烹饪基因遗传自奶奶。

genealogy.en: Grandpa spent years researching our family genealogy.
genealogy.zh: 爷爷花了好几年研究我们家的家谱。

general.en: In general, I prefer to cook at home.
general.zh: 一般来说，我更喜欢在家做饭。

generalize.en: You should not generalize about people from one experience.
generalize.zh: 你不应该凭一次经历就对人以偏概全。

generate.en: Solar panels on our roof generate electricity for the house.
generate.zh: 我们屋顶的太阳能板为家里发电。

generation.en: Every generation has its own style of music.
generation.zh: 每一代人都有自己的音乐风格。

generator.en: We bought a generator in case of power outages.
generator.zh: 我们买了一台发电机以防停电。

generosity.en: Her generosity made the school fundraiser a big success.
generosity.zh: 她的慷慨使学校的筹款活动非常成功。

generous.en: My neighbor is generous and always shares fresh vegetables.
generous.zh: 我的邻居很慷慨，总是分享新鲜蔬菜。

genetic.en: The doctor said my eye color is genetic.
genetic.zh: 医生说我的眼睛颜色是遗传的。

genetics.en: She is studying genetics at the university this semester.
genetics.zh: 她这学期在大学学习遗传学。

genius.en: My little sister is a genius at solving puzzles.

genocide.en: The museum reminds visitors of the horrors of genocide.
genocide.zh: 博物馆提醒参观者种族灭绝的恐怖。

genome.en: Scientists mapped the human genome to understand our health better.
genome.zh: 科学家绘制了人类基因组图谱以更好地了解健康。

genre.en: My favorite movie genre is comedy.
genre.zh: 我最喜欢的电影类型是喜剧。

gentle.en: Be gentle when you hold the baby.

gentleman.en: The gentleman held the door open for us.
gentleman.zh: 那位绅士为我们扶着门。

gentrification.en: Gentrification raised the rents in our old neighborhood.
gentrification.zh: 城市改造使我们老街区的房租上涨了。

genuine.en: She gave me a genuine smile when I walked in.
genuine.zh: 我走进来时她给了我一个真诚的微笑。

geographic.en: The geographic location of our town makes winters very cold.
geographic.zh: 我们镇的地理位置使冬天非常寒冷。

geography.en: We learned about world geography in class today.
geography.zh: 我们今天在课上学了世界地理。

geology.en: He picked up rocks during the hike to study geology.
geology.zh: 他在徒步时捡石头来研究地质学。

geopolitical.en: Geopolitical changes can affect the price of everyday goods.
geopolitical.zh: 地缘政治变化会影响日常商品的价格。

geothermal.en: Iceland uses geothermal energy to heat most homes.
geothermal.zh: 冰岛利用地热能为大多数家庭供暖。

gigabyte.en: My phone only has two gigabytes of storage left.
gigabyte.zh: 我的手机只剩两个G的存储空间了。

ginger.en: I added fresh ginger to the soup for extra flavor.
ginger.zh: 我在汤里加了新鲜的姜来增加风味。

glacier.en: We saw a beautiful glacier during our trip to Alaska.
glacier.zh: 我们在阿拉斯加旅行时看到了一座美丽的冰川。

glare.en: The glare from the sun made it hard to drive.
glare.zh: 阳光的刺眼光线让开车变得很困难。

globalization.en: Globalization lets us buy products from all over the world.
globalization.zh: 全球化让我们可以购买世界各地的产品。

governance.en: Good governance keeps our community safe and organized.
governance.zh: 良好的治理使我们的社区安全有序。

grace.en: She handled the difficult situation with grace and patience.
grace.zh: 她以优雅和耐心处理了那个困难的局面。

graceful.en: The dancer was so graceful on stage last night.
graceful.zh: 昨晚那位舞者在舞台上非常优雅。

gracious.en: Our host was gracious and made us feel at home.
gracious.zh: 主人很亲切，让我们有宾至如归的感觉。

grade.en: My son got a good grade on his math test.
grade.zh: 我儿子数学考试取得了好成绩。

gradual.en: The gradual change in weather signals that spring is coming.
gradual.zh: 天气的逐渐变化预示着春天要来了。

graduate.en: She will graduate from college next month.
graduate.zh: 她下个月将从大学毕业。

graphic.en: He used a graphic design app to make the party poster.
graphic.zh: 他用图形设计应用制作了派对海报。

graphics.en: The graphics in this new video game look amazing.
graphics.zh: 这款新游戏的画面看起来太棒了。

grateful.en: I am grateful for my family and good health.
grateful.zh: 我感恩拥有家人和健康的身体。

gratification.en: Finishing a home project gives me great gratification.
gratification.zh: 完成一个家居项目让我感到非常满足。

gratify.en: It gratifies me to see my children doing well in school.
gratify.zh: 看到孩子们在学校表现出色让我很欣慰。

gratitude.en: I wrote a card to express my gratitude to the teacher.
gratitude.zh: 我写了一张卡片来表达对老师的感激之情。

gravity.en: The apple fell from the tree because of gravity.
gravity.zh: 苹果因为重力从树上掉了下来。

greenhouse.en: Grandma grows tomatoes in her greenhouse all year round.
greenhouse.zh: 奶奶在她的温室里全年种西红柿。

gregarious.en: My gregarious uncle loves hosting big family dinners.
gregarious.zh: 我那合群的叔叔喜欢办大型家庭聚餐。

grief.en: She felt deep grief after losing her beloved pet.
grief.zh: 她在失去心爱的宠物后感到深深的悲伤。

grievance.en: He filed a grievance about the noisy construction next door.
grievance.zh: 他就隔壁嘈杂的施工提出了投诉。

grieve.en: The whole family gathered to grieve together.
grieve.zh: 全家人聚在一起共同悼念。

grocery.en: I need to stop at the grocery store after work.
grocery.zh: 我下班后需要去杂货店。

groundwater.en: Our village gets drinking water from clean groundwater.
groundwater.zh: 我们村子的饮用水来自干净的地下水。

habit.en: Reading before bed is a good habit to develop.
habit.zh: 睡前阅读是一个值得培养的好习惯。

habitat.en: We saw birds in their natural habitat at the park.
habitat.zh: 我们在公园里看到了鸟类在自然栖息地的样子。

hacker.en: A hacker tried to steal my email password last week.
hacker.zh: 上周一个黑客试图盗取我的邮箱密码。

hallway.en: Please hang your coat on the hook in the hallway.
hallway.zh: 请把外套挂在走廊的挂钩上。

hamper.en: Put your dirty clothes in the laundry hamper.
hamper.zh: 把脏衣服放进洗衣篮里。

handbag.en: She left her handbag on the chair at the restaurant.
handbag.zh: 她把手提包落在了餐厅的椅子上。

harassment.en: The company has a strict policy against workplace harassment.
harassment.zh: 公司有严格的反职场骚扰政策。

hardware.en: We went to the hardware store to buy paint and nails.
hardware.zh: 我们去五金店买了油漆和钉子。

harmony.en: Our family lives together in peace and harmony.
harmony.zh: 我们一家人和睦地生活在一起。

harness.en: Make sure the child wears a safety harness on the ride.
harness.zh: 确保孩子在游乐设施上系好安全带。

haunt.en: That old song still haunts me whenever I hear it.
haunt.zh: 每次听到那首老歌，我都会想起往事。

havoc.en: The storm wreaked havoc on our garden last night.
havoc.zh: 昨晚的暴风雨把我们的花园搞得一团糟。

headquarters.en: The company moved its headquarters to a bigger building.
headquarters.zh: 公司把总部搬到了一栋更大的楼里。

heal.en: The cut on my finger took a week to heal.
heal.zh: 我手指上的伤口花了一周才愈合。

health.en: Eating fresh fruit is good for your health.
health.zh: 吃新鲜水果对你的健康有好处。

healthy.en: We try to cook healthy meals for the whole family.
healthy.zh: 我们尽量为全家人做健康的饭菜。

hedge.en: Dad trimmed the hedge in our front yard this morning.
hedge.zh: 爸爸今天早上修剪了前院的树篱。

hedonism.en: A life of pure hedonism left him feeling empty inside.
hedonism.zh: 纯粹享乐的生活让他内心感到空虚。

helmet.en: Always wear a helmet when you ride your bicycle.
helmet.zh: 骑自行车时一定要戴头盔。

hemisphere.en: Australia is in the southern hemisphere of the Earth.
hemisphere.zh: 澳大利亚位于地球的南半球。

herald.en: The first flowers of spring herald warmer days ahead.
herald.zh: 春天的第一朵花预示着温暖的日子即将到来。

herbicide.en: The farmer used herbicide to remove weeds from the field.
herbicide.zh: 农民用除草剂清除田里的杂草。

heredity.en: Heredity explains why I look so much like my mother.
heredity.zh: 遗传解释了为什么我长得像我妈妈。

heritage.en: We visited a heritage site during our family vacation.
heritage.zh: 我们在家庭度假期间参观了一个遗产景点。

hierarchy.en: There is a clear hierarchy of tasks on my to-do list.
hierarchy.zh: 我的待办事项清单上有明确的任务层级。

highway.en: We took the highway to save time on our road trip.
highway.zh: 我们走高速公路以节省自驾游的时间。

hinder.en: Heavy rain may hinder our plans for the picnic.
hinder.zh: 大雨可能会妨碍我们的野餐计划。

hologram.en: The museum displayed a hologram of an ancient artifact.
hologram.zh: 博物馆展示了一件古代文物的全息影像。

household.en: Everyone in our household helps with the chores.
household.zh: 我们家里每个人都帮忙做家务。

humanism.en: Humanism values kindness and respect for every person.
humanism.zh: 人文主义重视对每个人的善良和尊重。

humanitarian.en: She volunteered for a humanitarian mission after the flood.
humanitarian.zh: 洪水过后她参加了一次人道主义志愿活动。

humidity.en: The humidity in summer makes it hard to sleep at night.
humidity.zh: 夏天的湿气让人晚上很难入睡。

humiliation.en: He felt humiliation when he tripped on stage at school.
humiliation.zh: 他在学校舞台上绊倒时感到很丢脸。

hurricane.en: We stocked up on food and water before the hurricane.
hurricane.zh: 飓风来临前我们囤了食物和水。

hybrid.en: We bought a hybrid car to save money on gas.
hybrid.zh: 我们买了一辆混合动力车来省油钱。

hydrogen.en: Some new buses in our city run on hydrogen fuel.
hydrogen.zh: 我们城市的一些新公交车使用氢燃料。

hyperlink.en: Click the hyperlink in the email to see the photos.
hyperlink.zh: 点击邮件中的超链接查看照片。

hypothesis.en: My hypothesis is that plants grow faster with more sunlight.
hypothesis.zh: 我的假设是植物在更多阳光下长得更快。

idealism.en: Her idealism inspired her to volunteer at the shelter.
idealism.zh: 她的理想主义激励她去收容所做志愿者。

ideological.en: They had an ideological disagreement about how to raise kids.
ideological.zh: 他们在如何教育孩子上有观念上的分歧。

ideology.en: His cooking ideology is to always use fresh local ingredients.
ideology.zh: 他的烹饪理念是始终使用新鲜的本地食材。

illiquid.en: The house is an illiquid asset that is hard to sell quickly.
illiquid.zh: 房子是一种很难快速变卖的非流动资产。

illiteracy.en: The community center offers classes to fight illiteracy.
illiteracy.zh: 社区中心开设课程来消除文盲。

illiterate.en: My great-grandmother was illiterate but very wise.
illiterate.zh: 我的曾祖母不识字但非常有智慧。

illuminate.en: Candles illuminate the dining room during our holiday dinner.
illuminate.zh: 蜡烛在节日晚餐时照亮了餐厅。

illumination.en: The soft illumination from the lamp made the room cozy.
illumination.zh: 台灯柔和的光线让房间很温馨。

illustration.en: The children's book had a beautiful illustration on every page.
illustration.zh: 那本儿童书每一页都有精美的插图。

immediate.en: The doctor said I needed immediate rest after the injury.
immediate.zh: 医生说我受伤后需要立即休息。

immediately.en: Please call me immediately when you arrive at the airport.
immediately.zh: 你到机场后请立刻给我打电话。

immemorial.en: Families have gathered here for festivals since time immemorial.
immemorial.zh: 自古以来，家家户户都在这里聚会过节。

immerse.en: I like to immerse myself in a good book on weekends.
immerse.zh: 我喜欢在周末沉浸在一本好书中。

immigration.en: We waited in the immigration line at the airport for an hour.
immigration.zh: 我们在机场的入境队伍中等了一个小时。

imminent.en: Dark clouds suggest that a thunderstorm is imminent.
imminent.zh: 乌云暗示暴风雨即将来临。

immortal.en: Grandma's recipes feel immortal because we keep passing them on.
immortal.zh: 奶奶的食谱感觉是不朽的，因为我们一直在传承。

immortality.en: Some people search for immortality through their children.
immortality.zh: 有些人通过子女寻求一种永恒。

immune.en: Getting enough sleep helps keep your immune system strong.
immune.zh: 充足的睡眠有助于保持免疫系统强健。

immunity.en: Eating vegetables can help build your immunity against colds.
immunity.zh: 吃蔬菜可以帮助增强你对感冒的免疫力。

impair.en: Lack of sleep can impair your ability to focus at work.
impair.zh: 睡眠不足会损害你在工作中集中注意力的能力。

impartiality.en: The judge showed impartiality throughout the neighborhood dispute.
impartiality.zh: 法官在整个邻里纠纷中表现出了公正。

impeachment.en: The impeachment was the main topic at the dinner table.
impeachment.zh: 弹劾案是晚餐桌上的主要话题。

impede.en: Construction on the road will impede traffic for two weeks.
impede.zh: 道路施工将阻碍交通两周。

impediment.en: The broken bridge was an impediment to our morning commute.
impediment.zh: 断裂的桥梁是我们早晨通勤的障碍。

impetus.en: The new baby gave us the impetus to buy a bigger home.
impetus.zh: 新生儿给了我们买更大房子的动力。

implement.en: The school will implement a new lunch menu next month.
implement.zh: 学校下个月将实施新的午餐菜单。

implementation.en: The implementation of the recycling program started this week.
implementation.zh: 回收计划的实施从本周开始。

implication.en: Moving to a new city has many implications for the family.
implication.zh: 搬到新城市对家庭有很多影响。

implicit.en: There was an implicit agreement that Mom chooses the restaurant.
implicit.zh: 有一个默认的约定，由妈妈来选餐厅。

implore.en: I implore you to lock the door when you leave.
implore.zh: 我恳求你出门时锁好门。

imply.en: Her tone seemed to imply that she was unhappy with the plan.
imply.zh: 她的语气似乎暗示她对这个计划不满意。

import.en: This store likes to import cheese from France and Italy.
import.zh: 这家店喜欢从法国和意大利进口奶酪。

importance.en: My parents taught me the importance of saving money early.
importance.zh: 我父母教会了我早期存钱的重要性。

important.en: It is important to eat breakfast every morning.
important.zh: 每天早上吃早餐很重要。

importation.en: The importation of exotic fruits has increased this year.
importation.zh: 今年异国水果的进口量增加了。

importer.en: That company is the biggest coffee importer in our city.
importer.zh: 那家公司是我们城市最大的咖啡进口商。

impose.en: The school decided to impose a new dress code policy.
impose.zh: 学校决定推行一项新的着装规定。

imposition.en: I hope my staying overnight is not an imposition on you.
imposition.zh: 我希望我留宿不会给你带来不便。

impossible.en: It seems impossible to find parking downtown on weekends.
impossible.zh: 周末在市中心找停车位似乎是不可能的。

impractical.en: Wearing high heels to a hiking trip is impractical.
impractical.zh: 穿高跟鞋去徒步旅行是不切实际的。

impress.en: She tried to impress the guests with a homemade cake.
impress.zh: 她试图用自制蛋糕给客人留下好印象。

impression.en: The new teacher made a great first impression on everyone.
impression.zh: 新老师给每个人都留下了很好的第一印象。

impressive.en: The sunset view from our hotel room was impressive.
impressive.zh: 从我们酒店房间看到的日落景色令人印象深刻。

improve.en: I want to improve my cooking skills this year.
improve.zh: 我今年想提高我的厨艺。

improvement.en: The new paint was a big improvement for the living room.
improvement.zh: 新的油漆让客厅有了很大的改善。

improvise.en: We had to improvise dinner with whatever was in the fridge.
improvise.zh: 我们只能用冰箱里现有的食材随便凑合一顿晚饭。

inadequate.en: The small umbrella was inadequate for the heavy rainstorm.
inadequate.zh: 小雨伞不足以应对大暴雨。

inaudible.en: His voice was nearly inaudible in the noisy restaurant.
inaudible.zh: 在嘈杂的餐厅里他的声音几乎听不到。

inaugural.en: We attended the inaugural opening of the new shopping mall.
inaugural.zh: 我们参加了新购物中心的首次开业活动。

inaugurate.en: The mayor will inaugurate the new community park tomorrow.
inaugurate.zh: 市长明天将为新的社区公园举行揭幕仪式。

incapable.en: The broken oven is incapable of reaching the right temperature.
incapable.zh: 坏掉的烤箱无法达到合适的温度。

incarnate.en: Grandma is patience incarnate when teaching kids to bake.
incarnate.zh: 奶奶教孩子们烘焙时简直是耐心的化身。

incentive.en: The store offered a discount as an incentive for early shoppers.
incentive.zh: 商店为早到的顾客提供折扣作为激励。

inception.en: Since its inception, this bakery has served the best bread.
inception.zh: 自创立以来，这家面包店一直提供最好的面包。

incite.en: Loud music next door can incite complaints from neighbors.
incite.zh: 隔壁的大声音乐会引起邻居的投诉。

incline.en: The steep incline of the hill made the walk tiring.
incline.zh: 陡峭的山坡让步行变得很累。

include.en: Does the hotel price include breakfast in the morning?

inclusion.en: The school promotes inclusion so every child feels welcome.
inclusion.zh: 学校倡导包容，让每个孩子都感到受欢迎。

inclusive.en: Our neighborhood park is inclusive and accessible to everyone.
inclusive.zh: 我们社区的公园是包容的，人人都可以使用。

incorporate.en: I try to incorporate more vegetables into my daily meals.
incorporate.zh: 我尝试在每天的饭菜中加入更多蔬菜。

incorporated.en: The family business was officially incorporated last year.
incorporated.zh: 家族企业去年正式注册成立了。

incorruptible.en: The old judge was known for being completely incorruptible.
incorruptible.zh: 那位老法官以完全清廉著称。

incredible.en: The view from the mountain top was absolutely incredible.
incredible.zh: 山顶的景色绝对令人难以置信。

incredibly.en: The homemade pasta tasted incredibly delicious.
incredibly.zh: 自制的意大利面味道好得不可思议。

incredulous.en: She was incredulous when she won the raffle at the fair.
incredulous.zh: 她在集市上中了抽奖时感到难以置信。

incur.en: Late returns will incur a small fee at the library.
incur.zh: 图书馆的逾期归还将产生小额费用。

indefinite.en: The road closure will last for an indefinite period.
indefinite.zh: 道路封闭将持续不确定的时间。

indemnity.en: The insurance indemnity covered the cost of the car repair.
indemnity.zh: 保险赔偿金覆盖了汽车修理的费用。

independence.en: Moving out gave her a new sense of independence.
independence.zh: 搬出去住让她有了新的独立感。

independent.en: My daughter is very independent and makes her own lunch.
independent.zh: 我女儿非常独立，自己做午饭。

indicate.en: The map colors indicate which trails are easy or hard.
indicate.zh: 地图上的颜色表示哪些步道容易或困难。

indication.en: The long line is an indication that the restaurant is popular.
indication.zh: 排长队说明这家餐厅很受欢迎。

indicator.en: A blinking light is an indicator that the battery is low.
indicator.zh: 闪烁的灯光表示电池电量低。

indict.en: The news reported that they might indict the corrupt official.
indict.zh: 新闻报道说他们可能会起诉那名腐败官员。

indictment.en: The indictment was a shock to everyone in town.
indictment.zh: 这份起诉书让镇上的每个人都感到震惊。

indifference.en: His indifference to housework frustrated his roommate.
indifference.zh: 他对家务的漠不关心让室友很沮丧。

indigenous.en: We learned about indigenous plants at the botanical garden.
indigenous.zh: 我们在植物园了解了本地原生植物。

indignation.en: She felt indignation when someone cut in line at the store.
indignation.zh: 有人在商店插队时她感到很气愤。

individual.en: Each individual in our family has a unique breakfast preference.
individual.zh: 我们家每个人都有各自独特的早餐偏好。

induce.en: A warm bath can induce a feeling of relaxation before bed.
induce.zh: 睡前洗个热水澡可以让人放松。

induction.en: We use an induction cooktop because it heats food quickly.
induction.zh: 我们用电磁炉，因为它加热食物很快。

indulge.en: I like to indulge in chocolate cake on my birthday.
indulge.zh: 我喜欢在生日时尽情享受巧克力蛋糕。

industrial.en: The old industrial area is now full of trendy cafes.
industrial.zh: 旧工业区现在到处都是时尚咖啡馆。

industrialization.en: Industrialization changed how people lived and worked in our town.
industrialization.zh: 工业化改变了我们镇上人们的生活和工作方式。

industry.en: The tourism industry brings many visitors to our small town.
industry.zh: 旅游业为我们的小镇带来了许多游客。

inequality.en: There is growing inequality in housing prices across the city.
inequality.zh: 全市房价的不平等现象日益加剧。

inertia.en: Inertia kept me on the couch instead of going for a run.
inertia.zh: 惰性让我赖在沙发上而不是去跑步。

inexpensive.en: We found an inexpensive restaurant near the train station.
inexpensive.zh: 我们在火车站附近找到了一家便宜的餐厅。

infect.en: Wash your hands often so germs do not infect you.
infect.zh: 经常洗手，这样细菌就不会感染你。

infection.en: The doctor treated the infection in my son's ear quickly.
infection.zh: 医生很快治好了我儿子的耳部感染。

infectious.en: Her laughter is so infectious that everyone starts smiling.
infectious.zh: 她的笑声很有感染力，每个人都开始微笑。

infer.en: I can infer from the mess that the kids had fun.
infer.zh: 从这片狼藉中我可以推断孩子们玩得很开心。

inference.en: My inference is that the store closed early because of the snow.
inference.zh: 我推断商店因为下雪提前关门了。

infinite.en: A mother's love for her children seems truly infinite.
infinite.zh: 母亲对孩子的爱似乎真的是无限的。

infinity.en: The ocean seemed to stretch to infinity from the beach.
infinity.zh: 从海滩望去，大海似乎延伸到了无穷远。

infirm.en: We visit our infirm neighbor to help with her groceries.
infirm.zh: 我们去看望体弱的邻居，帮她买菜。

inflammation.en: The doctor said the swelling was caused by inflammation.
inflammation.zh: 医生说肿胀是由炎症引起的。

inflation.en: Inflation made our weekly grocery bill much higher this year.
inflation.zh: 通货膨胀使我们今年每周的杂货账单高了很多。

influence.en: My grandmother had a big influence on my love of cooking.
influence.zh: 我奶奶对我热爱烹饪有很大的影响。

influential.en: She is one of the most influential parents in the school.
influential.zh: 她是学校里最有影响力的家长之一。

influx.en: The influx of tourists fills our town every summer.
influx.zh: 每年夏天游客的涌入让我们小镇变得热闹。

inform.en: Please inform me when the package arrives at the door.
inform.zh: 包裹到门口时请通知我。

information.en: I found useful information about the recipe online.
information.zh: 我在网上找到了关于这个食谱的有用信息。

informative.en: The cooking show was very informative and easy to follow.
informative.zh: 那个烹饪节目信息丰富，容易跟着学。

infrared.en: The infrared thermometer checks your temperature without contact.
infrared.zh: 红外测温仪无需接触就能测量体温。

infrastructure.en: Better roads and bridges improve the town's infrastructure.
infrastructure.zh: 更好的道路和桥梁改善了城镇的基础设施。

ingratitude.en: His ingratitude after all our help really hurt our feelings.
ingratitude.zh: 在我们帮了那么多忙后他的忘恩负义真的伤了我们的心。

ingredient.en: The secret ingredient in her soup is a pinch of cinnamon.
ingredient.zh: 她汤里的秘密配料是一小撮肉桂。

inhabit.en: Many birds inhabit the trees in our backyard.
inhabit.zh: 许多鸟栖息在我们后院的树上。

inherent.en: There is an inherent risk in trying a new recipe.
inherent.zh: 尝试新食谱本身就有一定的风险。

inherit.en: She will inherit the family house when her parents retire.
inherit.zh: 她父母退休后她将继承家里的房子。

inhibit.en: Too much noise can inhibit your ability to concentrate.
inhibit.zh: 太多噪音会抑制你集中注意力的能力。

initiate.en: She decided to initiate a weekend book club with friends.
initiate.zh: 她决定和朋友们发起一个周末读书会。

inject.en: The nurse will inject the vaccine into your upper arm.
inject.zh: 护士会把疫苗注射到你的上臂。

injection.en: The flu injection this year was quick and painless.
injection.zh: 今年的流感疫苗注射又快又不痛。

injure.en: Be careful not to injure yourself while chopping vegetables.
injure.zh: 切菜时小心不要伤到自己。

injury.en: He missed the school trip because of a knee injury.
injury.zh: 他因为膝盖受伤错过了学校的旅行。

injustice.en: The children protested the injustice of an early bedtime.
injustice.zh: 孩子们抗议早睡觉的不公正待遇。

innate.en: She has an innate talent for making people feel welcome.
innate.zh: 她有一种与生俱来的让人感到受欢迎的天赋。

innocent.en: The puppy looked innocent despite chewing up the shoes.
innocent.zh: 小狗虽然咬坏了鞋子，但看起来很无辜。

innovate.en: Small businesses must innovate to keep their customers happy.
innovate.zh: 小企业必须创新才能让客户满意。

innovation.en: The latest innovation in phones is the foldable screen.
innovation.zh: 手机的最新创新是折叠屏。

innovative.en: She came up with an innovative way to organize the kitchen.
innovative.zh: 她想出了一种创新的方法来整理厨房。

inquire.en: I called the hotel to inquire about room availability.
inquire.zh: 我打电话给酒店询问房间的空余情况。

inquiry.en: The teacher encouraged every inquiry from curious students.
inquiry.zh: 老师鼓励好奇学生提出的每一个问题。

insatiable.en: My son has an insatiable appetite for pizza.
insatiable.zh: 我儿子对披萨有着无法满足的食欲。

inscribe.en: We asked the jeweler to inscribe our names on the rings.
inscribe.zh: 我们请珠宝商在戒指上刻上我们的名字。

inscription.en: The old clock had a beautiful inscription on its back.
inscription.zh: 那个老钟的背面有一段美丽的铭文。

insect.en: An insect flew into the kitchen through the open window.
insect.zh: 一只虫子从开着的窗户飞进了厨房。

insecurity.en: Moving to a new school can cause feelings of insecurity.
insecurity.zh: 转到新学校会让人产生不安全感。

insert.en: Insert the key into the lock and turn it gently.
insert.zh: 把钥匙插入锁孔，轻轻转动。

insignificant.en: The scratch on the table was too insignificant to notice.
insignificant.zh: 桌子上的划痕小到不会被注意到。

insist.en: Grandma always insists that we eat more at dinner.
insist.zh: 奶奶总是坚持让我们晚饭多吃点。

insistence.en: Her insistence on fresh ingredients makes her cooking delicious.
insistence.zh: 她对新鲜食材的坚持使她的菜肴美味可口。

insolvency.en: The small shop faced insolvency after months of low sales.
insolvency.zh: 小店在数月销售低迷后面临破产。

insomnia.en: Drinking coffee at night gives me insomnia.
insomnia.zh: 晚上喝咖啡会让我失眠。

inspect.en: Dad likes to inspect the car before a long drive.
inspect.zh: 爸爸喜欢在长途驾驶前检查汽车。

inspection.en: The house passed the safety inspection without any issues.
inspection.zh: 房子顺利通过了安全检查。

inspector.en: The health inspector visited the restaurant this morning.
inspector.zh: 卫生检查员今天上午来餐厅检查了。

instance.en: In this instance, I think staying home is the better choice.
instance.zh: 在这种情况下，我认为待在家里是更好的选择。

instant.en: She made instant noodles for a quick lunch.
instant.zh: 她做了方便面当作快速午餐。

instigate.en: The kids tried to instigate a water fight in the yard.
instigate.zh: 孩子们试图在院子里发起一场水仗。

instruct.en: The recipe will instruct you on how to make the sauce.
instruct.zh: 食谱会指导你如何制作酱汁。

instruction.en: Follow the instruction on the box to assemble the shelf.
instruction.zh: 按照盒子上的说明组装书架。

instructor.en: The yoga instructor showed us a new pose today.
instructor.zh: 瑜伽教练今天教了我们一个新姿势。

instrument.en: My daughter wants to learn a musical instrument this summer.
instrument.zh: 我女儿今年夏天想学一种乐器。

instrumental.en: Her advice was instrumental in helping me find a new job.
instrumental.zh: 她的建议在帮助我找到新工作方面起了关键作用。

insulate.en: We need to insulate the attic to keep the house warm.
insulate.zh: 我们需要给阁楼做隔热以保持房子温暖。

insurgency.en: News about the insurgency overseas worried many families.
insurgency.zh: 海外叛乱的消息让许多家庭感到担忧。

integrate.en: We try to integrate exercise into our daily family routine.
integrate.zh: 我们尝试将锻炼融入家庭日常生活中。

integrity.en: My father taught me to always act with honesty and integrity.
integrity.zh: 我父亲教导我始终要诚实正直。

intellect.en: Reading books regularly helps to sharpen your intellect.
intellect.zh: 经常读书有助于提高你的智力。

intellectual.en: They enjoyed intellectual conversations over coffee every Sunday.
intellectual.zh: 他们每个星期天都喜欢边喝咖啡边进行知性对话。

interact.en: Children learn social skills when they interact with others.
interact.zh: 孩子们在与他人互动时学习社交技能。

interaction.en: Every interaction with the friendly barista brightens my morning.
interaction.zh: 每次和那位友善的咖啡师互动都让我的早晨更愉快。

interactive.en: The museum has many interactive exhibits for children.
interactive.zh: 博物馆有许多供儿童参与的互动展览。

intercede.en: Mom had to intercede when the siblings started arguing.
intercede.zh: 兄弟姐妹开始争吵时妈妈不得不出面调解。

intercept.en: The dog managed to intercept the ball before it hit the fence.
intercept.zh: 狗在球撞到围栏之前截住了它。

interest.en: My interest in gardening started when I was a child.
interest.zh: 我对园艺的兴趣从小时候就开始了。

interface.en: The new phone has a simple and clean user interface.
interface.zh: 这部新手机有一个简洁干净的用户界面。

interject.en: She tried to interject a comment during the family meeting.
interject.zh: 她试图在家庭会议上插话。

intermediate.en: I signed up for the intermediate cooking class this fall.
intermediate.zh: 我报名了今年秋天的中级烹饪课程。

intermittent.en: The intermittent rain ruined our plans for a barbecue.
intermittent.zh: 断断续续的雨毁了我们的烧烤计划。

intern.en: My niece is working as an intern at a local bakery.
intern.zh: 我侄女在一家本地面包店做实习生。

international.en: We love trying dishes from international restaurants in the city.
international.zh: 我们喜欢在城里的异国餐厅尝试各种菜肴。

internet.en: The internet went down just as I started watching a movie.
internet.zh: 我刚开始看电影，网络就断了。

interrogate.en: My kids always interrogate me about what is for dinner.
interrogate.zh: 我的孩子们总是追问我晚饭吃什么。

interrupt.en: Please do not interrupt me while I am on the phone.
interrupt.zh: 我打电话时请不要打断我。

interruption.en: The doorbell was an unexpected interruption during our dinner.
interruption.zh: 门铃声是我们晚餐时意外的打扰。

intersect.en: The two walking paths intersect near the playground.
intersect.zh: 两条步行小径在游乐场附近交叉。

intersection.en: Turn left at the intersection to reach the supermarket.
intersection.zh: 在十字路口左转就到超市了。

intervene.en: The teacher had to intervene to stop the argument.
intervene.zh: 老师不得不介入以制止争论。

intervention.en: Early intervention helped the child improve in reading quickly.
intervention.zh: 早期干预帮助孩子的阅读能力快速提高。

interview.en: She prepared all week for her job interview on Friday.
interview.zh: 她准备了一整周迎接周五的工作面试。

intimidation.en: Bullying and intimidation have no place in our school.
intimidation.zh: 欺凌和恐吓在我们学校是不被容许的。

intractable.en: The stain on the carpet proved to be intractable.
intractable.zh: 地毯上的污渍证明是很难去除的。

intricate.en: Grandma knitted an intricate pattern on the scarf.
intricate.zh: 奶奶在围巾上织了一个精致的图案。

intrigue.en: The old house at the end of the street always intrigues me.
intrigue.zh: 街尾那座老房子总是让我感到好奇。

introduce.en: Let me introduce you to my family at the party.
introduce.zh: 让我在派对上把你介绍给我的家人。

introduction.en: The introduction of a new menu excited all the regular customers.
introduction.zh: 新菜单的推出让所有的老顾客都很兴奋。

introspect.en: I like to introspect quietly before making big decisions.
introspect.zh: 我喜欢在做重大决定前安静地反省。

introvert.en: As an introvert, she prefers small gatherings over big parties.
introvert.zh: 作为一个内向的人，她喜欢小聚会而不是大派对。

intuitive.en: The cooking app has a very intuitive and easy layout.
intuitive.zh: 这个烹饪应用的界面非常直观且易于使用。

inundate.en: Orders inundate the flower shop every Valentine's Day.
inundate.zh: 每个情人节花店都会被订单淹没。

invalid.en: The coupon was invalid because it had already expired.
invalid.zh: 这张优惠券已经过期了，是无效的。

invaluable.en: Her cooking tips have been invaluable to me as a beginner.
invaluable.zh: 她的烹饪技巧对我这个初学者来说非常宝贵。

invent.en: My kids like to invent new games to play after school.
invent.zh: 我的孩子们喜欢放学后发明新游戏来玩。

invention.en: The washing machine is one of the greatest household inventions.
invention.zh: 洗衣机是最伟大的家用发明之一。

inventive.en: She is very inventive when it comes to decorating the house.
inventive.zh: 她在装饰房子方面非常有创意。

inventor.en: My son dreams of becoming a famous inventor someday.
inventor.zh: 我儿子梦想有一天成为一名著名的发明家。

inventory.en: The store manager checked the inventory before placing new orders.
inventory.zh: 店长在下新订单前检查了库存。

invert.en: Invert the cake onto a plate after it cools down.
invert.zh: 蛋糕冷却后把它倒扣在盘子上。

invisible.en: The stain on the dark shirt was almost invisible.
invisible.zh: 深色衬衫上的污渍几乎看不见。

invocation.en: The ceremony began with a short invocation for good fortune.
invocation.zh: 仪式以一段简短的祈福开始。

invoice.en: The plumber sent us an invoice for fixing the kitchen sink.
invoice.zh: 水管工给我们寄了一张修理厨房水槽的账单。

invoke.en: She likes to invoke family traditions during the holidays.
invoke.zh: 她喜欢在节日期间延续家庭传统。

involve.en: The recipe does not involve any complicated cooking steps.
involve.zh: 这个食谱不涉及任何复杂的烹饪步骤。

involvement.en: Parent involvement helps children do better at school.
involvement.zh: 家长的参与帮助孩子在学校表现更好。

irregular.en: The bus has an irregular schedule on holidays.
irregular.zh: 公交车在节假日时间不固定。

irrepressible.en: Her irrepressible laughter filled the room at family dinner.
irrepressible.zh: 她在家庭晚餐时忍不住的笑声充满了整个房间。

irrigation.en: The farmer set up an irrigation system for the dry season.
irrigation.zh: 农民为旱季建立了灌溉系统。

irrupt.en: Guests irrupt into cheers when the birthday cake arrives.
irrupt.zh: 生日蛋糕端上来时客人们突然欢呼起来。

isolate.en: We had to isolate the sick cat from the other pets.
isolate.zh: 我们不得不把生病的猫和其他宠物隔离开。

isotope.en: We learned about carbon isotopes in science class today.
isotope.zh: 我们今天在科学课上学了碳同位素。

iteration.en: Each iteration of the recipe tasted better than the last.
iteration.zh: 食谱每一次改进都比上一次更好吃。

itinerary.en: Mom planned a detailed itinerary for our family vacation.
itinerary.zh: 妈妈为我们的家庭度假制定了详细的行程。

jargon.en: The manual was full of technical jargon I couldn't understand.
jargon.zh: 这本手册满是我看不懂的技术术语。

jealousy.en: She felt a twinge of jealousy when her friend got promoted.
jealousy.zh: 朋友升职时她感到一丝嫉妒。

jeopardize.en: Skipping meals could jeopardize your health over time.
jeopardize.zh: 不吃饭时间长了会危害你的健康。

judge.en: Don't judge people by their appearance alone.
judge.zh: 不要仅凭外表来评判别人。

judgment.en: She trusted her own judgment when choosing a new car.
judgment.zh: 她在选新车时相信自己的判断。

judicial.en: The judicial process can take several months to complete.
judicial.zh: 司法程序可能需要几个月才能完成。

judicious.en: She made a judicious decision to save money for emergencies.
judicious.zh: 她明智地决定存钱以备不时之需。

junction.en: Turn left at the junction near the supermarket.
junction.zh: 在超市附近的路口左转。

jurisdiction.en: This matter falls under the jurisdiction of the local court.
jurisdiction.zh: 这件事属于地方法院的管辖范围。

jury.en: The jury reached a verdict after three days of discussion.
jury.zh: 陪审团经过三天讨论后做出了裁决。

just.en: I just finished cooking dinner for the family.
just.zh: 我刚给家人做好了晚饭。

justice.en: The community demanded justice after the unfair decision.
justice.zh: 社区在不公正的决定后要求公正。

justify.en: He tried to justify spending so much on a new phone.
justify.zh: 他试图为花那么多钱买新手机找理由。

kettle.en: She put the kettle on to make a cup of tea.
kettle.zh: 她烧上水壶准备泡杯茶。

kinetic.en: The children were full of kinetic energy at the playground.
kinetic.zh: 孩子们在操场上充满了动能。

kinetics.en: He studied the kinetics of how bread dough rises.
kinetics.zh: 他研究了面团发酵的动力学。

kingdom.en: The ancient kingdom once covered a vast area of land.
kingdom.zh: 这个古老的王国曾经覆盖了大片土地。

labor.en: Moving to the new house required a lot of physical labor.
labor.zh: 搬到新房子需要大量的体力劳动。

laboratory.en: The students conducted a simple experiment in the laboratory.
laboratory.zh: 学生们在实验室里做了一个简单的实验。

laborer.en: The laborer worked long hours building the new bridge.
laborer.zh: 那位工人长时间工作来建造新桥。

lament.en: She would often lament the loss of her childhood home.
lament.zh: 她常常感叹失去了童年的家。

landfill.en: Too much plastic waste ends up in the local landfill.
landfill.zh: 太多的塑料垃圾最终进了当地的垃圾填埋场。

landlord.en: Our landlord agreed to fix the broken heater this week.
landlord.zh: 房东同意这周修好坏了的暖气。

landmark.en: The old clock tower is a famous landmark in our city.
landmark.zh: 老钟楼是我们城市的著名地标。

language.en: Learning a new language opens doors to different cultures.
language.zh: 学习一门新语言能打开通往不同文化的大门。

laser.en: The doctor used a laser to correct her vision.
laser.zh: 医生用激光矫正了她的视力。

latency.en: The video call had high latency so our voices kept overlapping.
latency.zh: 视频通话延迟很高，我们的声音总是重叠。

latitude.en: Our city is located at a latitude of about thirty degrees north.
latitude.zh: 我们的城市位于北纬约三十度。

laundry.en: I need to do the laundry before we run out of clean clothes.
laundry.zh: 我得在干净衣服穿完之前洗衣服。

lawn.en: Dad spends every Saturday morning mowing the lawn.
lawn.zh: 爸爸每个周六早上都在修剪草坪。

lawsuit.en: The neighbor filed a lawsuit over the property boundary dispute.
lawsuit.zh: 邻居就地界纠纷提起了诉讼。

lead.en: She was chosen to lead the school fundraising event.
lead.zh: 她被选为学校筹款活动的负责人。

leader.en: A good leader listens to the opinions of the whole team.
leader.zh: 一个好的领导者会倾听整个团队的意见。

leadership.en: Her leadership helped the company through a difficult period.
leadership.zh: 她的领导力帮助公司度过了困难时期。

league.en: My son joined a local soccer league this spring.
league.zh: 我儿子今年春天加入了当地的足球联赛。

lease.en: We signed a one-year lease for the new apartment.
lease.zh: 我们签了新公寓一年的租约。

lecture.en: The professor gave an interesting lecture on world history.
lecture.zh: 教授做了一场关于世界历史的有趣讲座。

legacy.en: Grandma left a beautiful legacy of handmade quilts for us.
legacy.zh: 奶奶给我们留下了美丽的手工被子作为遗产。

legal.en: You should get legal advice before signing the contract.
legal.zh: 签合同之前你应该获得法律建议。

legislation.en: New legislation was passed to protect the environment.
legislation.zh: 通过了保护环境的新法规。

legitimate.en: His concern about safety was completely legitimate.
legitimate.zh: 他对安全的担忧是完全合理的。

lethargic.en: I always feel lethargic on rainy Monday mornings.
lethargic.zh: 每逢下雨的周一早晨我都感到无精打采。

level.en: The water level in the lake dropped during the dry summer.
level.zh: 干燥的夏天里湖水水位下降了。

lever.en: He pulled the lever to open the garage door.
lever.zh: 他拉动杠杆打开了车库门。

leverage.en: She used her experience to leverage a better job offer.
leverage.zh: 她利用自己的经验争取到了更好的工作机会。

liability.en: The broken sidewalk became a liability for the property owner.
liability.zh: 破损的人行道成了业主的一个责任隐患。

liberal.en: She took a liberal amount of cream cheese on her bagel.
liberal.zh: 她在百吉饼上抹了很多奶油芝士。

liberate.en: Cleaning out the closet helped liberate so much living space.
liberate.zh: 清理壁橱腾出了很多生活空间。

liberation.en: Retiring early gave him a sense of liberation and freedom.
liberation.zh: 提前退休让他有了一种解放和自由的感觉。

liberator.en: The volunteer was seen as a liberator by the rescued animals.
liberator.zh: 志愿者被获救的动物们视为解放者。

liberty.en: Everyone should have the liberty to express their opinions.
liberty.zh: 每个人都应该有表达自己意见的自由。

limit.en: There is a speed limit of sixty on this highway.
limit.zh: 这条高速公路限速六十。

linger.en: We decided to linger at the café and enjoy the sunshine.
linger.zh: 我们决定在咖啡馆多待一会儿，享受阳光。

lingo.en: It took me a while to learn the local lingo.
lingo.zh: 我花了一段时间才学会当地的行话。

linguistic.en: Her linguistic skills helped her communicate with foreign tourists.
linguistic.zh: 她的语言技能帮助她与外国游客交流。

linguistics.en: She studied linguistics in college and now teaches English abroad.
linguistics.zh: 她大学学的语言学，现在在国外教英语。

liquidation.en: The store held a liquidation sale before closing permanently.
liquidation.zh: 这家商店在永久关闭前举行了清仓大甩卖。

literacy.en: The school launched a program to improve childhood literacy.
literacy.zh: 学校启动了一个提高儿童识字率的项目。

literal.en: The literal meaning of the word is different from its slang use.
literal.zh: 这个词的字面意思和俚语用法不同。

literally.en: I was literally the last person to arrive at the party.
literally.zh: 我确实是最后一个到达聚会的人。

literary.en: She joined a literary club that meets every Thursday evening.
literary.zh: 她加入了一个每周四晚聚会的文学俱乐部。

literate.en: Being computer literate is essential for most jobs today.
literate.zh: 如今大多数工作都要求具备计算机素养。

literature.en: He enjoys reading classic literature before going to bed.
literature.zh: 他喜欢睡前阅读经典文学作品。

litigation.en: The litigation between the two companies lasted for three years.
litigation.zh: 两家公司之间的诉讼持续了三年。

lobby.en: We waited in the hotel lobby for our tour guide.
lobby.zh: 我们在酒店大厅等导游。

local.en: We prefer to buy vegetables from the local farmers market.
local.zh: 我们更喜欢从当地农贸市场买蔬菜。

locality.en: This locality is known for its excellent seafood restaurants.
locality.zh: 这个地区以其出色的海鲜餐厅闻名。

localize.en: The company plans to localize its app for the Chinese market.
localize.zh: 公司计划将应用本地化以适应中国市场。

locate.en: Can you help me locate the nearest gas station?
locate.zh: 你能帮我找到最近的加油站吗？

location.en: This location is perfect for a family picnic.
location.zh: 这个地方非常适合家庭野餐。

locomotive.en: The old steam locomotive is now displayed in the museum.
locomotive.zh: 那台老蒸汽机车现在陈列在博物馆里。

logic.en: His logic for choosing the shorter route made perfect sense.
logic.zh: 他选择较短路线的逻辑完全说得通。

logical.en: Packing light for the trip was the most logical choice.
logical.zh: 旅行轻装是最合理的选择。

logistics.en: Planning the wedding involved a lot of tricky logistics.
logistics.zh: 筹备婚礼涉及很多复杂的后勤工作。

longitude.en: The ship's captain recorded its exact longitude and latitude.
longitude.zh: 船长记录了船的确切经度和纬度。

loophole.en: He found a loophole in the store's return policy.
loophole.zh: 他发现了商店退货政策中的一个漏洞。

lucrative.en: Selling homemade cakes turned into a lucrative side business.
lucrative.zh: 卖自制蛋糕变成了一项赚钱的副业。

luggage.en: We packed our luggage the night before the flight.
luggage.zh: 我们在航班前一晚收拾好了行李。

luminary.en: The chef is considered a luminary in the world of cooking.
luminary.zh: 这位厨师被认为是烹饪界的杰出人物。

luminous.en: The luminous stars were beautiful on the clear night.
luminous.zh: 晴朗的夜晚，闪亮的星星非常美丽。

lyric.en: She memorized every lyric of her favorite song.
lyric.zh: 她记住了她最喜欢的歌的每一句歌词。

magistrate.en: The magistrate handled minor cases at the local courthouse.
magistrate.zh: 地方法官在当地法院处理轻微案件。

magnanimous.en: He was magnanimous enough to forgive his friend's mistake.
magnanimous.zh: 他很大度，原谅了朋友的过错。

magnate.en: The real estate magnate owns buildings all over the city.
magnate.zh: 那位房地产大亨在全城拥有楼宇。

magnet.en: The kids stuck colorful magnets on the refrigerator door.
magnet.zh: 孩子们在冰箱门上贴了五颜六色的磁铁。

magnetic.en: Her magnetic personality made everyone want to be her friend.
magnetic.zh: 她富有魅力的个性让每个人都想和她做朋友。

magnetism.en: The teacher explained magnetism using a simple bar magnet.
magnetism.zh: 老师用一块简单的条形磁铁解释了磁力。

magnificent.en: The sunset over the ocean was absolutely magnificent.
magnificent.zh: 海上的日落真是壮丽极了。

magnify.en: Use this glass to magnify the tiny print on the label.
magnify.zh: 用这个放大镜来看标签上的小字。

magnitude.en: They didn't realize the magnitude of the problem at first.
magnitude.zh: 他们一开始没有意识到问题的严重程度。

magnum.en: The artist considered that painting his magnum opus.
magnum.zh: 这位艺术家认为那幅画是他的巅峰之作。

mailbox.en: I found a package waiting in the mailbox this morning.
mailbox.zh: 今天早上我在邮箱里发现了一个包裹。

maintain.en: It costs a lot to maintain an old house properly.
maintain.zh: 好好维护一栋老房子要花不少钱。

maintenance.en: Regular car maintenance helps avoid expensive repairs later.
maintenance.zh: 定期汽车保养有助于避免日后昂贵的维修。

major.en: Getting a promotion was a major event in her career.
major.zh: 升职是她职业生涯中的重大事件。

majority.en: The majority of students voted for a longer lunch break.
majority.zh: 大多数学生投票赞成延长午休时间。

malcontent.en: The malcontent neighbor complained about every little noise.
malcontent.zh: 那个不满的邻居对每一点小噪音都抱怨。

malediction.en: He muttered a malediction under his breath after stubbing his toe.
malediction.zh: 踢到脚趾后他低声咒骂了一句。

malevolent.en: The villain in the movie had a truly malevolent grin.
malevolent.zh: 电影里的反派露出了真正邪恶的笑容。

malfunction.en: The washing machine started to malfunction during the spin cycle.
malfunction.zh: 洗衣机在甩干时开始出故障了。

malice.en: She said it without any malice, just honest concern.
malice.zh: 她说那话没有恶意，只是出于真心的关心。

malicious.en: Someone left a malicious review about the restaurant online.
malicious.zh: 有人在网上给那家餐厅留了恶意差评。

malignant.en: Thankfully the test showed the growth was not malignant.
malignant.zh: 幸好检查显示那个肿块不是恶性的。

malnutrition.en: Skipping breakfast every day can lead to malnutrition over time.
malnutrition.zh: 每天不吃早餐久了会导致营养不良。

malpractice.en: The patient filed a malpractice claim against the hospital.
malpractice.zh: 患者对医院提起了医疗事故索赔。

maltreat.en: No one should maltreat animals or leave them uncared for.
maltreat.zh: 任何人都不应该虐待动物或不管不顾。

malware.en: Be careful not to download malware from unknown websites.
malware.zh: 小心不要从不明网站下载恶意软件。

manage.en: She learned to manage her time better with a daily planner.
manage.zh: 她学会了用日程表更好地管理时间。

management.en: Good time management is the key to a balanced life.
management.zh: 良好的时间管理是平衡生活的关键。

manager.en: The store manager helped us find the right size shoes.
manager.zh: 店长帮我们找到了合适尺码的鞋。

mandate.en: The school issued a mandate requiring uniforms for all students.
mandate.zh: 学校发布了要求所有学生穿校服的命令。

mandatory.en: Wearing a seatbelt is mandatory for all passengers in the car.
mandatory.zh: 车上所有乘客都必须系安全带。

manifest.en: Her excitement was manifest in her bright smile and laughter.
manifest.zh: 她的兴奋从灿烂的笑容和笑声中显而易见。

manipulate.en: He tried to manipulate the schedule to get Fridays off.
manipulate.zh: 他试图操作排班表好让周五休息。

manipulation.en: The manipulation of the data led to incorrect conclusions.
manipulation.zh: 对数据的篡改导致了错误的结论。

manner.en: She greeted every guest in a warm and friendly manner.
manner.zh: 她以热情友好的方式迎接每一位客人。

manual.en: I had to read the manual to assemble the new bookshelf.
manual.zh: 我得看说明书才能组装新书架。

manufacture.en: This factory manufactures high-quality furniture from local wood.
manufacture.zh: 这家工厂用本地木材生产高品质家具。

manufacturer.en: The manufacturer offers a two-year warranty on all products.
manufacturer.zh: 厂家对所有产品提供两年质保。

manuscript.en: She finally finished the manuscript of her first novel.
manuscript.zh: 她终于完成了第一部小说的手稿。

market.en: We go to the farmers market every Sunday morning.
market.zh: 我们每个周日早上去农贸市场。

marketing.en: Good marketing helped the small bakery attract more customers.
marketing.zh: 好的营销帮助这家小面包店吸引了更多顾客。

mass.en: A mass of people gathered in the park for the concert.
mass.zh: 一大群人聚集在公园里听音乐会。

massive.en: They had a massive sale at the department store last weekend.
massive.zh: 上周末百货商店有一场大型促销。

master.en: It takes years of practice to master a musical instrument.
master.zh: 掌握一种乐器需要多年的练习。

masterpiece.en: Grandma's apple pie is a true culinary masterpiece.
masterpiece.zh: 奶奶的苹果派是真正的烹饪杰作。

material.en: She chose soft cotton material for the baby's clothes.
material.zh: 她为宝宝的衣服选了柔软的棉质面料。

materialism.en: He believed that materialism could not bring true happiness.
materialism.zh: 他认为物质主义不能带来真正的幸福。

maternal.en: She felt a strong maternal instinct when she held the baby.
maternal.zh: 抱着宝宝时她感受到了强烈的母性本能。

matriarch.en: Grandma was the matriarch who held the whole family together.
matriarch.zh: 奶奶是维系整个家庭的女家长。

matrix.en: The schedule was organized in a simple matrix on the wall.
matrix.zh: 日程表以简单的矩阵形式贴在墙上。

matter.en: It doesn't matter what we eat as long as we eat together.
matter.zh: 吃什么不重要，重要的是我们一起吃。

mattress.en: We bought a new mattress to get a better night's sleep.
mattress.zh: 我们买了新床垫以便晚上睡得更好。

mature.en: She has become much more mature since starting college.
mature.zh: 自从上大学以来她成熟了很多。

maturity.en: He handled the disagreement with surprising maturity for his age.
maturity.zh: 对于他的年龄来说，他处理分歧时表现得出奇地成熟。

maximum.en: The elevator has a maximum capacity of ten people.
maximum.zh: 电梯最多能容纳十个人。

mayhem.en: The kids caused complete mayhem in the living room.
mayhem.zh: 孩子们把客厅搞得一片混乱。

mayor.en: The mayor announced plans to build a new public library.
mayor.zh: 市长宣布了建造新公共图书馆的计划。

media.en: Social media has changed how people share daily moments.
media.zh: 社交媒体改变了人们分享日常的方式。

mediate.en: Mom had to mediate the argument between the two siblings.
mediate.zh: 妈妈不得不调解两个孩子之间的争吵。

mediation.en: The couple resolved their dispute through professional mediation.
mediation.zh: 这对夫妇通过专业调解解决了他们的纠纷。

mediator.en: The teacher acted as a mediator between the two students.
mediator.zh: 老师充当了两个学生之间的调解人。

medical.en: She went for her annual medical checkup last Tuesday.
medical.zh: 她上周二去做了年度体检。

medication.en: The doctor prescribed medication for her seasonal allergies.
medication.zh: 医生给她开了治疗季节性过敏的药。

medicine.en: Remember to take your medicine after breakfast every morning.

medieval.en: We visited a medieval castle during our trip to Europe.
medieval.zh: 我们在欧洲旅行时参观了一座中世纪城堡。

mediterranean.en: The Mediterranean diet includes lots of fresh vegetables and fish.
mediterranean.zh: 地中海饮食包括大量新鲜蔬菜和鱼。

medium.en: I ordered a medium coffee with milk and no sugar.
medium.zh: 我点了一杯中杯加奶不加糖的咖啡。

melancholy.en: Rainy autumn days always fill her with a gentle melancholy.
melancholy.zh: 秋天的雨天总让她感到淡淡的忧伤。

melody.en: That simple melody from the music box reminds me of childhood.
melody.zh: 音乐盒里那段简单的旋律让我想起了童年。

member.en: Every member of the family helped prepare the holiday dinner.
member.zh: 家里每个成员都帮忙准备了节日晚餐。

membership.en: She renewed her gym membership for another year.
membership.zh: 她续了一年的健身房会员。

membrane.en: The thin membrane on the egg cracked when I peeled it.
membrane.zh: 剥鸡蛋时上面那层薄膜破了。

memo.en: The boss sent a memo reminding everyone about the meeting.
memo.zh: 老板发了一份备忘录提醒大家开会。

memoir.en: She wrote a memoir about growing up in a small town.
memoir.zh: 她写了一本关于在小镇长大的回忆录。

memorable.en: Our family trip to the beach was truly memorable.
memorable.zh: 我们全家去海边的旅行真的很难忘。

memorial.en: They visited the war memorial in the center of town.
memorial.zh: 他们参观了市中心的战争纪念碑。

memorize.en: She tried to memorize all the vocabulary words before the test.
memorize.zh: 她在考试前努力记住所有的词汇。

memory.en: Playing in the snow is my favorite childhood memory.
memory.zh: 在雪地里玩耍是我最喜欢的童年记忆。

mental.en: Taking breaks during work is good for your mental health.
mental.zh: 工作时休息一下有益于心理健康。

mention.en: Did she mention what time the party starts tonight?
mention.zh: 她有提到今晚聚会几点开始吗？

merchandise.en: The store displayed new merchandise in the front window.
merchandise.zh: 商店在橱窗里展示了新商品。

merchant.en: The merchant at the market sold the freshest fruit in town.
merchant.zh: 市场上那个商贩卖的水果是镇上最新鲜的。

merger.en: The merger of the two companies created many new job openings.
merger.zh: 两家公司的合并创造了许多新的职位空缺。

meritocracy.en: She believes promotions should be based on meritocracy, not connections.
meritocracy.zh: 她认为晋升应该基于能力，而不是关系。

metabolism.en: Regular exercise can help boost your metabolism naturally.
metabolism.zh: 经常锻炼可以帮助自然地促进新陈代谢。

metadata.en: The photo's metadata showed it was taken last summer.
metadata.zh: 照片的元数据显示它是去年夏天拍的。

metamorphosis.en: The caterpillar's metamorphosis into a butterfly amazed the children.
metamorphosis.zh: 毛毛虫变成蝴蝶的过程让孩子们惊叹不已。

metaphor.en: Saying life is a journey is a common metaphor.
metaphor.zh: 说人生是一段旅程是一个常见的隐喻。

metaphysics.en: He enjoyed reading about metaphysics during quiet Sunday afternoons.
metaphysics.zh: 他喜欢在安静的周日下午读有关形而上学的书。

methodology.en: The teacher explained her methodology for grading student essays.
methodology.zh: 老师解释了她给学生作文评分的方法。

meticulous.en: She is meticulous about keeping her kitchen spotlessly clean.
meticulous.zh: 她非常注重保持厨房一尘不染。

metropolitan.en: Living in a metropolitan area means easy access to public transit.
metropolitan.zh: 住在大都市区意味着方便乘坐公共交通。

microscope.en: The students looked at plant cells under a microscope.
microscope.zh: 学生们在显微镜下观察了植物细胞。

microwave.en: I heated up leftover soup in the microwave for lunch.
microwave.zh: 我中午用微波炉加热了剩下的汤。

middleware.en: The app uses middleware to handle user login requests.
middleware.zh: 这个应用使用中间件来处理用户登录请求。

migraine.en: She gets a terrible migraine whenever the weather changes suddenly.
migraine.zh: 每当天气突变时她就会犯严重的偏头痛。

milestone.en: Finishing her first marathon was a major milestone in her life.
milestone.zh: 完成她的第一次马拉松是她人生中的重要里程碑。

millennium.en: The city held a huge celebration at the turn of the millennium.
millennium.zh: 千禧年之际，这座城市举办了盛大的庆祝活动。

mind.en: A good night's sleep helps clear your mind for the next day.
mind.zh: 睡个好觉有助于清醒头脑迎接新的一天。

mingle.en: The guests began to mingle and chat over drinks at the party.
mingle.zh: 客人们在聚会上开始边喝饮料边交流。

miniature.en: She collects miniature houses and displays them on a shelf.
miniature.zh: 她收集微型房屋模型并展示在架子上。

minimal.en: The damage from the storm was minimal thanks to the new roof.
minimal.zh: 多亏了新屋顶，暴风雨造成的损失很小。

minimize.en: Close the curtains to minimize the heat coming inside.
minimize.zh: 拉上窗帘以减少进入室内的热量。

minimum.en: You need a minimum of eight hours of sleep each night.
minimum.zh: 你每晚至少需要八小时的睡眠。

minister.en: The minister gave a hopeful speech at the community gathering.
minister.zh: 牧师在社区聚会上做了一次充满希望的演讲。

ministry.en: The Ministry of Education announced new school policies today.
ministry.zh: 教育部今天宣布了新的学校政策。

minor.en: It was just a minor scratch, nothing to worry about.
minor.zh: 只是一个小刮伤，不用担心。

minority.en: Only a minority of people in the office prefer tea over coffee.
minority.zh: 办公室里只有少数人喜欢喝茶而不是咖啡。

minute.en: Wait just a minute while I grab my coat and keys.
minute.zh: 等我一分钟，我拿件外套和钥匙。

mislead.en: The confusing road signs could easily mislead new drivers.
mislead.zh: 令人困惑的路标很容易误导新手司机。

missile.en: The kids pretended the paper airplane was a flying missile.
missile.zh: 孩子们假装纸飞机是一枚飞行的导弹。

mission.en: Her mission today was to find the perfect birthday gift.
mission.zh: 她今天的任务是找到完美的生日礼物。

missionary.en: The missionary spent years helping build schools in rural areas.
missionary.zh: 那位传教士花了多年时间帮助在农村建学校。

mitigate.en: Wearing sunscreen helps mitigate the risk of sunburn.
mitigate.zh: 涂防晒霜有助于降低晒伤的风险。

mob.en: A mob of excited fans waited outside the concert hall.
mob.zh: 一群兴奋的歌迷在音乐厅外面等候。

mobile.en: She checks her mobile phone first thing every morning.
mobile.zh: 她每天早上第一件事就是看手机。

mobility.en: The new wheelchair greatly improved his daily mobility.
mobility.zh: 新轮椅大大改善了他的日常活动能力。

mobilize.en: The community mobilized quickly to help after the flood.
mobilize.zh: 洪水过后社区迅速动员起来提供帮助。

modify.en: She decided to modify the recipe by adding more garlic.
modify.zh: 她决定在食谱中多加些大蒜来调整一下。

module.en: Each module of the online course takes about two weeks.
module.zh: 在线课程的每个模块大约需要两周。

molecule.en: A water molecule is made up of two hydrogen and one oxygen atom.
molecule.zh: 一个水分子由两个氢原子和一个氧原子组成。

moment.en: That was the happiest moment of my entire vacation.
moment.zh: 那是我整个假期最幸福的时刻。

momentum.en: The fundraising campaign gained momentum after the social media post.
momentum.zh: 社交媒体发帖后，筹款活动势头增强了。

monarchy.en: The country changed from a monarchy to a republic long ago.
monarchy.zh: 这个国家很久以前就从君主制变成了共和制。

monograph.en: The professor published a monograph on local plant species.
monograph.zh: 教授出版了一本关于本地植物种类的专著。

monopoly.en: The family spent the evening playing a game of Monopoly.
monopoly.zh: 一家人晚上玩了一局大富翁游戏。

monument.en: We took photos in front of the famous monument downtown.
monument.zh: 我们在市中心著名的纪念碑前拍了照。

morphology.en: In biology class, we studied the morphology of different leaves.
morphology.zh: 生物课上我们研究了不同叶子的形态。

mortal.en: Every mortal being must face the reality of growing old.
mortal.zh: 每个凡人都必须面对变老的现实。

mortality.en: A healthy diet can reduce the risk of early mortality.
mortality.zh: 健康的饮食可以降低早亡的风险。

mortgage.en: They finally paid off their thirty-year mortgage last month.
mortgage.zh: 他们上个月终于还清了三十年的房贷。

mortician.en: The mortician prepared everything respectfully for the ceremony.
mortician.zh: 殡仪师恭敬地为仪式准备好了一切。

mortify.en: It would mortify her to trip on stage during the performance.
mortify.zh: 在表演中在台上绊倒会让她非常尴尬。

motion.en: The gentle motion of the train made the baby fall asleep.
motion.zh: 火车轻柔的晃动让宝宝睡着了。

motivate.en: A good breakfast can motivate you for the rest of the day.
motivate.zh: 一顿好的早餐能激励你一整天。

motivation.en: Her children are her biggest motivation to work hard.
motivation.zh: 她的孩子们是她努力工作的最大动力。

motive.en: His motive for cooking dinner was to surprise his wife.
motive.zh: 他做晚饭的动机是想给妻子一个惊喜。

motor.en: The motor in the old fan started making a strange noise.
motor.zh: 旧电扇里的马达开始发出奇怪的声音。

mount.en: He used a bracket to mount the television on the wall.
mount.zh: 他用支架把电视机挂在了墙上。

mountain.en: We hiked up the mountain and enjoyed the view from the top.
mountain.zh: 我们爬上了山，欣赏了山顶的风景。

move.en: They plan to move to a bigger apartment next year.
move.zh: 他们计划明年搬到一个更大的公寓。

movement.en: The yoga instructor guided us through each slow movement.
movement.zh: 瑜伽教练指导我们做每一个缓慢的动作。

movie.en: We watched a funny movie together on Friday night.
movie.zh: 我们周五晚上一起看了一部搞笑电影。

multilingual.en: Growing up in a multilingual family, she speaks three languages.
multilingual.zh: 在多语言家庭长大的她会说三种语言。

multiplex.en: The new multiplex cinema has twelve screens and a food court.
multiplex.zh: 新的多厅影院有十二个放映厅和一个美食广场。

multiply.en: If you multiply three by four, you get twelve.

mundane.en: Doing the dishes is a mundane but necessary daily chore.
mundane.zh: 洗碗是一项平淡但必要的日常家务。

municipal.en: The municipal pool opens for free swimming every summer.
municipal.zh: 市政游泳池每年夏天免费开放游泳。

mural.en: A colorful mural of flowers was painted on the school wall.
mural.zh: 学校墙上画了一幅色彩鲜艳的花朵壁画。

muscle.en: My legs were sore from using muscles I hadn't used in months.
muscle.zh: 好几个月没用的肌肉让我腿很酸。

mutation.en: A mutation in the gene caused the flower to change color.
mutation.zh: 基因突变导致花改变了颜色。

mutual.en: They share a mutual love for Italian food and red wine.
mutual.zh: 他们对意大利菜和红酒有共同的喜爱。

mythology.en: She enjoys reading Greek mythology stories before bedtime.
mythology.zh: 她喜欢睡前读希腊神话故事。

nanometer.en: A human hair is about eighty thousand nanometers wide.
nanometer.zh: 一根人类头发大约有八万纳米宽。

nanotechnology.en: Nanotechnology may one day help deliver medicine inside the body.
nanotechnology.zh: 纳米技术有一天可能帮助在体内输送药物。

napkin.en: She placed a napkin on her lap before starting the meal.
napkin.zh: 她在开始吃饭前把餐巾放在腿上。

narrative.en: The book tells the narrative of a family across three generations.
narrative.zh: 这本书讲述了一个家庭三代人的故事。

natal.en: She returned to her natal city for the annual family reunion.
natal.zh: 她回到出生的城市参加一年一度的家庭聚会。

nation.en: People across the nation celebrated the holiday with fireworks.
nation.zh: 全国各地的人们放烟花庆祝节日。

national.en: We visited the national park and saw beautiful wildlife.
national.zh: 我们参观了国家公园，看到了美丽的野生动物。

nationality.en: Students of every nationality were welcome at the language school.
nationality.zh: 语言学校欢迎各国学生。

native.en: She is a native speaker of Chinese and also speaks English.
native.zh: 她的母语是中文，同时也说英语。

natural.en: This soap is made from all natural ingredients.
natural.zh: 这块肥皂由纯天然成分制成。

naturally.en: The fruit was naturally sweet without any added sugar.
naturally.zh: 这种水果天然甘甜，没有添加糖。

nature.en: Spending time in nature helps reduce stress and anxiety.
nature.zh: 在大自然中度过时光有助于减轻压力和焦虑。

navigate.en: She used her phone to navigate through the unfamiliar city.
navigate.zh: 她用手机在陌生的城市里导航。

navigation.en: Good navigation skills are essential when hiking in the mountains.
navigation.zh: 在山里徒步时良好的导航技能至关重要。

nebula.en: The telescope revealed a beautiful nebula in the night sky.
nebula.zh: 望远镜在夜空中展示了一个美丽的星云。

necessary.en: It is necessary to bring an umbrella during the rainy season.

necessity.en: A warm coat is a necessity during the cold winter months.
necessity.zh: 寒冷的冬天一件保暖的外套是必需品。

needle.en: She threaded the needle and began sewing the torn shirt.
needle.zh: 她穿好针线开始缝补破衬衫。

negate.en: Eating too much dessert can negate the benefits of exercise.
negate.zh: 吃太多甜食会抵消锻炼的好处。

neglect.en: Don't neglect to water the plants while I'm away.
neglect.zh: 我不在的时候别忘了给植物浇水。

negotiate.en: He managed to negotiate a lower price for the used car.
negotiate.zh: 他成功地把二手车的价格谈低了。

nemesis.en: Math has always been her academic nemesis since middle school.
nemesis.zh: 数学从初中起就一直是她的学业克星。

network.en: A strong professional network can help you find better jobs.
network.zh: 强大的职业人脉可以帮你找到更好的工作。

neurology.en: She went to the neurology department for her persistent headaches.
neurology.zh: 她因持续头痛去了神经科。

neutron.en: The teacher explained that a neutron has no electric charge.
neutron.zh: 老师解释说中子没有电荷。

nihilism.en: His teenage phase of nihilism faded as he found new hobbies.
nihilism.zh: 当他找到新爱好后，青少年时期的虚无主义消退了。

nitrogen.en: Plants need nitrogen in the soil to grow healthy and strong.
nitrogen.zh: 植物需要土壤中的氮元素才能健康生长。

node.en: Each node on the network connects to several other devices.
node.zh: 网络上的每个节点连接到其他几台设备。

nonchalant.en: He acted nonchalant about the surprise party, but he was thrilled.
nonchalant.zh: 他对惊喜派对表现得无所谓，但其实很激动。

nondescript.en: They lived in a nondescript building on a quiet side street.
nondescript.zh: 他们住在一条安静小巷里一栋不起眼的楼里。

norm.en: Working from home has become the norm for many people.
norm.zh: 在家办公已经成为许多人的常态。

normal.en: Everything returned to normal after the short power outage.
normal.zh: 短暂停电后一切恢复了正常。

normalize.en: We should normalize asking for help when we feel overwhelmed.
normalize.zh: 我们应该让在感到不堪重负时寻求帮助变得正常。

normative.en: The guidebook offers normative standards for healthy eating habits.
normative.zh: 这本指南提供了健康饮食习惯的规范标准。

nostalgia.en: Old photographs always fill her with a sense of nostalgia.
nostalgia.zh: 旧照片总是让她充满怀旧之情。

notorious.en: That restaurant is notorious for its extremely slow service.
notorious.zh: 那家餐厅以极其缓慢的服务而出名。

nourish.en: A balanced diet helps nourish both the body and the mind.
nourish.zh: 均衡的饮食有助于滋养身体和心灵。

novel.en: She finished reading the entire novel in just two days.
novel.zh: 她仅用两天就读完了整本小说。

novelist.en: The famous novelist signed copies of her latest book at the store.
novelist.zh: 那位著名小说家在书店为她的新书签名。

novelty.en: The novelty of the new toy wore off within a week.
novelty.zh: 新玩具的新鲜感在一周内就消失了。

novice.en: As a novice cook, she started with simple pasta recipes.
novice.zh: 作为烹饪新手，她从简单的意面食谱开始。

nuance.en: There is a subtle nuance between being firm and being rude.
nuance.zh: 坚定和粗鲁之间有微妙的差别。

nucleus.en: The family kitchen is the nucleus of their home life.
nucleus.zh: 厨房是他们家庭生活的核心。

nurture.en: Parents nurture their children with love, food, and education.
nurture.zh: 父母用爱、食物和教育来养育他们的孩子。

nutrition.en: Good nutrition is important for growing children and teenagers.
nutrition.zh: 良好的营养对成长中的儿童和青少年很重要。

object.en: She didn't object when he suggested ordering pizza for dinner.
object.zh: 他建议晚餐点披萨时她没有反对。

objection.en: Nobody raised an objection to the plan for a weekend trip.
objection.zh: 没有人对周末旅行的计划提出异议。

objective.en: Her main objective this year is to learn how to swim.
objective.zh: 她今年的主要目标是学会游泳。

obliterate.en: The heavy rain seemed to obliterate the chalk drawings on the sidewalk.
obliterate.zh: 大雨似乎把人行道上的粉笔画全冲掉了。

obscure.en: He found an obscure little bookshop hidden down a side alley.
obscure.zh: 他在一条小巷里发现了一家不起眼的小书店。

observation.en: Her observation about the weather forecast turned out to be correct.
observation.zh: 她对天气预报的观察结果是正确的。

observe.en: We sat quietly to observe the birds in the garden.
observe.zh: 我们安静地坐着观察花园里的鸟。

observer.en: As an observer, she noticed details that others often missed.
observer.zh: 作为一个观察者，她注意到别人常忽略的细节。

obsession.en: His obsession with collecting vintage records fills the whole room.
obsession.zh: 他对收藏老唱片的痴迷占满了整个房间。

obsolete.en: The old flip phone became obsolete after smartphones arrived.
obsolete.zh: 智能手机出现后，老翻盖手机就过时了。

obstacle.en: The biggest obstacle to exercising is finding the time.
obstacle.zh: 锻炼最大的障碍是找不到时间。

obstetrics.en: She chose to specialize in obstetrics to help deliver babies.
obstetrics.zh: 她选择专攻产科，帮助接生婴儿。

obstruct.en: Please don't obstruct the hallway with boxes and bags.
obstruct.zh: 请不要用箱子和袋子堵塞走廊。

obstruction.en: A fallen tree caused an obstruction on the main road.
obstruction.zh: 一棵倒下的树造成了主路上的路障。

obtain.en: She worked hard to obtain her driver's license last summer.
obtain.zh: 去年夏天她努力考取了驾照。

occupation.en: His occupation as a teacher keeps him busy during the school year.
occupation.zh: 他的教师职业让他在学年期间很忙。

occupy.en: The children occupy themselves with drawing and coloring after school.
occupy.zh: 孩子们放学后画画和涂色来打发时间。

occur.en: Accidents can occur if you don't pay attention while cooking.
occur.zh: 做饭时不注意就可能发生事故。

occurrence.en: Finding a four-leaf clover is a rare occurrence in our backyard.
occurrence.zh: 在我们后院找到四叶草是很少见的事。

offer.en: The store made a generous offer on the winter coat collection.
offer.zh: 商店对冬季外套系列给出了优惠的报价。

offering.en: The restaurant's new offering includes a vegan breakfast menu.
offering.zh: 餐厅新推出的菜品包括纯素早餐菜单。

ominous.en: The dark clouds looked ominous before the afternoon storm.
ominous.zh: 下午暴风雨来临前，乌云看起来很不祥。

omission.en: The omission of her name from the guest list was a mistake.
omission.zh: 嘉宾名单上遗漏她的名字是个失误。

omit.en: Don't omit any important details when filling out the form.
omit.zh: 填写表格时不要遗漏任何重要细节。

omniscient.en: Grandma sometimes seems omniscient about everything happening at home.
omniscient.zh: 奶奶有时似乎对家里发生的一切都了如指掌。

oncology.en: The hospital opened a new oncology center for cancer patients.
oncology.zh: 医院为癌症患者开设了新的肿瘤科中心。

ontology.en: The philosophy class discussed ontology and the nature of existence.
ontology.zh: 哲学课讨论了本体论和存在的本质。

operate.en: She learned how to operate the new coffee machine at work.
operate.zh: 她学会了如何操作工作中的新咖啡机。

operation.en: The operation of the dishwasher is explained in the user manual.
operation.zh: 洗碗机的操作方法在用户手册中有说明。

operator.en: The elevator operator greeted everyone with a friendly smile.
operator.zh: 电梯操作员用友好的微笑迎接每个人。

opportunity.en: Traveling abroad gave her the opportunity to try new foods.
opportunity.zh: 出国旅行给了她尝试新食物的机会。

oppose.en: Many residents oppose the plan to cut down the old oak tree.
oppose.zh: 许多居民反对砍伐那棵老橡树的计划。

opposite.en: The pharmacy is on the opposite side of the street.

opposition.en: There was strong opposition to building a factory near the school.
opposition.zh: 在学校附近建工厂遭到了强烈反对。

oppress.en: The summer heat seemed to oppress everyone in the city.
oppress.zh: 夏天的炎热似乎让城里的每个人都喘不过气。

oppression.en: The museum exhibit showed the history of oppression and resistance.
oppression.zh: 博物馆的展览展示了压迫和抵抗的历史。

opt.en: We decided to opt for the vegetarian meal at the restaurant.
opt.zh: 我们决定在餐厅选择素食餐。

optics.en: She studied optics to understand how lenses and light work.
optics.zh: 她学习光学以了解透镜和光的工作原理。

orchestra.en: The school orchestra performed beautifully at the spring concert.
orchestra.zh: 学校管弦乐队在春季音乐会上表演得很出色。

orchestrate.en: Mom had to orchestrate the entire holiday dinner by herself.
orchestrate.zh: 妈妈不得不独自策划整个节日晚宴。

order.en: She placed an order for groceries to be delivered tomorrow.
order.zh: 她下了一个明天送货的杂货订单。

ordinal.en: Children learn ordinal numbers like first, second, and third early.
ordinal.zh: 孩子们很早就学习第一、第二、第三等序数词。

ordinary.en: It started as an ordinary day but ended with a surprise.
ordinary.zh: 这天开始平平常常，但以惊喜结束。

organic.en: We buy organic fruits and vegetables from the local farm.
organic.zh: 我们从当地农场购买有机水果和蔬菜。

organism.en: Every living organism needs water to survive.
organism.zh: 每个活的有机体都需要水才能生存。

orthopedic.en: He visited the orthopedic doctor for his knee pain.
orthopedic.zh: 他因膝盖疼痛去看了骨科医生。

oscillation.en: The oscillation of the pendulum clock was steady and soothing.
oscillation.zh: 摆钟的摆动平稳而令人安心。

osmosis.en: She joked that she learned to cook by osmosis from watching Mom.
osmosis.zh: 她开玩笑说看妈妈做饭，自己不知不觉也学会了。

outweigh.en: The benefits of regular exercise far outweigh the effort required.
outweigh.zh: 经常锻炼的好处远大于所需的努力。

oven.en: She preheated the oven to bake a batch of chocolate cookies.
oven.zh: 她预热了烤箱准备烤一批巧克力饼干。

overflow.en: The bathtub started to overflow because he forgot to turn off the tap.
overflow.zh: 他忘了关水龙头，浴缸开始溢水了。

overlap.en: The two meetings overlap, so I can only attend one.
overlap.zh: 两个会议时间重叠，所以我只能参加一个。

override.en: She had to override the automatic settings on the thermostat.
override.zh: 她不得不手动覆盖恒温器的自动设置。

overthrow.en: The citizens wanted to overthrow the unfair parking regulations.
overthrow.zh: 市民们想推翻不公平的停车规定。

overtime.en: He worked overtime this week to finish the project on time.
overtime.zh: 他这周加班以按时完成项目。

overview.en: The teacher gave an overview of what the semester would cover.
overview.zh: 老师概述了这学期要学的内容。

overwhelm.en: The amount of homework can overwhelm students during finals week.
overwhelm.zh: 期末周的大量作业会让学生们不堪重负。

oxygen.en: Trees produce oxygen that we need to breathe every day.
oxygen.zh: 树木产生我们每天呼吸所需的氧气。

ozone.en: The ozone layer protects us from harmful rays of the sun.
ozone.zh: 臭氧层保护我们免受太阳有害射线的伤害。

pair.en: She bought a new pair of running shoes for the marathon.
pair.zh: 她为马拉松买了一双新跑鞋。

pajamas.en: The kids put on their pajamas and got ready for bed.
pajamas.zh: 孩子们穿上睡衣准备睡觉。

palette.en: The artist mixed colors on her palette before painting the sunset.
palette.zh: 艺术家在调色板上调色，准备画日落。

panacea.en: There is no panacea for the common cold, just rest and fluids.
panacea.zh: 感冒没有万灵药，只能靠休息和多喝水。

pandemic.en: The pandemic changed how people work, shop, and socialize.
pandemic.zh: 疫情改变了人们工作、购物和社交的方式。

paradigm.en: Working from home represents a new paradigm in office culture.
paradigm.zh: 居家办公代表了办公文化的新范式。

paradox.en: It is a paradox that the busiest people often find the most time.
paradox.zh: 最忙的人往往最能挤出时间，这真是个悖论。

paragraph.en: Each paragraph of the essay should contain one main idea.
paragraph.zh: 文章的每一段应包含一个主要观点。

parallel.en: The two roads run parallel to each other for several miles.
parallel.zh: 两条路平行延伸了好几英里。

parameter.en: We need to set the right parameters before starting the experiment.
parameter.zh: 我们需要在实验开始前设置好正确的参数。

paramount.en: Safety is of paramount importance when driving in bad weather.
paramount.zh: 恶劣天气开车时安全是最重要的。

paranoia.en: His paranoia about losing his keys made him check his pockets constantly.
paranoia.zh: 他对丢钥匙的偏执让他不停地检查口袋。

parasite.en: The vet found a parasite in the dog during the checkup.
parasite.zh: 兽医在检查时发现狗身上有寄生虫。

parent.en: Every parent wants the best education for their child.
parent.zh: 每位父母都想给孩子最好的教育。

parliament.en: Parliament voted on the new transportation bill yesterday.
parliament.zh: 议会昨天对新的交通法案进行了投票。

participate.en: All students are encouraged to participate in the school play.
participate.zh: 鼓励所有学生参加学校话剧演出。

participation.en: Her active participation in class impressed all the teachers.
participation.zh: 她在课堂上的积极参与给所有老师留下了深刻印象。

particular.en: Is there a particular flavor of ice cream you would like?
particular.zh: 你有想要的特定口味的冰淇淋吗？

pass.en: Could you please pass the salt across the dinner table?

passage.en: The narrow passage between the buildings led to a hidden courtyard.
passage.zh: 楼与楼之间的窄通道通向一个隐蔽的庭院。

passenger.en: Each passenger must fasten their seatbelt before takeoff.
passenger.zh: 每位乘客在起飞前必须系好安全带。

passion.en: Cooking has been her lifelong passion since she was a child.
passion.zh: 从小时候起，烹饪就是她一生的热情。

passive.en: He took a passive role and let others make the decisions.
passive.zh: 他采取了被动的角色，让别人做决定。

passport.en: Don't forget to check your passport expiry date before traveling.
passport.zh: 出行前别忘了检查护照的有效期。

patent.en: She filed a patent for her new kitchen gadget invention.
patent.zh: 她为自己发明的新厨房小工具申请了专利。

pathetic.en: The wilted flowers in the vase looked rather pathetic.
pathetic.zh: 花瓶里枯萎的花看起来挺可怜的。

pathogen.en: Washing hands regularly helps prevent the spread of pathogens.
pathogen.zh: 经常洗手有助于防止病原体传播。

pathological.en: Her pathological need for order kept the house perfectly tidy.
pathological.zh: 她对整洁的病态需求让房子始终一尘不染。

pathology.en: The lab sent the tissue sample to the pathology department.
pathology.zh: 实验室将组织样本送到了病理科。

pathos.en: The old man's story about losing his dog was full of pathos.
pathos.zh: 老人讲述失去爱犬的故事充满了悲情。

patience.en: Teaching a child to ride a bike requires a lot of patience.
patience.zh: 教孩子骑自行车需要很大的耐心。

patient.en: The doctor spent extra time with each patient to listen carefully.
patient.zh: 医生花额外时间仔细倾听每位病人。

patriarch.en: Grandpa was the patriarch who led our family gatherings every year.
patriarch.zh: 爷爷是每年主持家庭聚会的大家长。

patriarchy.en: The documentary explored how patriarchy has shaped modern society.
patriarchy.zh: 这部纪录片探讨了父权制如何塑造了现代社会。

payroll.en: The company processes payroll on the last Friday of every month.
payroll.zh: 公司在每月最后一个周五处理工资发放。

peculiar.en: There was a peculiar smell coming from the old refrigerator.
peculiar.zh: 旧冰箱里散发出一种奇怪的气味。

pedagogy.en: The new teacher studied modern pedagogy to improve her classes.
pedagogy.zh: 新老师学习了现代教育学来改进她的课堂。

pedal.en: She pressed the pedal harder to ride her bike up the hill.
pedal.zh: 她用力蹬踏板骑自行车上坡。

pedestrian.en: The city built a new pedestrian bridge over the busy highway.
pedestrian.zh: 城市在繁忙的高速公路上建了一座新人行天桥。

pediatrics.en: She works in pediatrics and loves caring for young children.
pediatrics.zh: 她在儿科工作，喜欢照顾小孩子。

pendant.en: He gave her a silver pendant shaped like a tiny heart.
pendant.zh: 他送给她一个心形的银吊坠。

pending.en: The approval of our loan application is still pending.
pending.zh: 我们贷款申请的审批仍在进行中。

penetrate.en: The cold wind seemed to penetrate right through my winter coat.
penetrate.zh: 寒风似乎直接穿透了我的冬衣。

pension.en: After forty years of teaching, she retired with a good pension.
pension.zh: 教了四十年书后，她带着丰厚的养老金退休了。

peptide.en: The skincare product contains a peptide that helps reduce wrinkles.
peptide.zh: 这款护肤品含有一种有助于减少皱纹的肽。

perceive.en: Children often perceive the world differently from adults.
perceive.zh: 孩子们对世界的感知往往与成人不同。

percent.en: About sixty percent of our household budget goes to food.
percent.zh: 我们家庭预算的大约百分之六十用于食物。

perception.en: His perception of the neighborhood changed after living there a year.
perception.zh: 在那里住了一年后，他对这个社区的看法改变了。

perennial.en: Traffic congestion is a perennial problem in big cities.
perennial.zh: 交通拥堵是大城市的老问题。

perfect.en: The weather was perfect for a family barbecue in the backyard.
perfect.zh: 天气非常适合在后院举办家庭烧烤。

perfection.en: She baked the cake to perfection for her daughter's birthday.
perfection.zh: 她为女儿的生日把蛋糕烤得完美无缺。

perform.en: The students will perform a short play at the school assembly.
perform.zh: 学生们将在学校集会上表演一出短剧。

performance.en: Her performance in the piano recital impressed the whole audience.
performance.zh: 她在钢琴独奏会上的表演让全场观众印象深刻。

performer.en: The street performer drew a large crowd with his magic tricks.
performer.zh: 街头表演者用魔术吸引了一大群人。

peripheral.en: She noticed something moving in her peripheral vision while driving.
peripheral.zh: 她开车时用余光注意到有东西在动。

permafrost.en: The melting of permafrost is a serious concern in Arctic regions.
permafrost.zh: 永久冻土的融化是北极地区的严重问题。

permission.en: You need permission from the landlord to keep a pet.
permission.zh: 你需要房东的许可才能养宠物。

permit.en: We applied for a permit to hold a garage sale this weekend.
permit.zh: 我们申请了这个周末举办车库促销的许可证。

perpendicular.en: The bookshelf stands perpendicular to the wall in the living room.
perpendicular.zh: 书架在客厅里与墙面垂直放置。

perpetuate.en: Sharing family recipes helps perpetuate our cultural traditions.
perpetuate.zh: 分享家庭食谱有助于传承我们的文化传统。

perplex.en: The math problem seemed to perplex every student in the class.
perplex.zh: 这道数学题似乎难倒了班上每个学生。

perplexing.en: The instructions for assembling the desk were truly perplexing.
perplexing.zh: 组装书桌的说明真的令人困惑。

persist.en: She decided to persist with her guitar lessons despite the difficulty.
persist.zh: 尽管很难，她还是决定坚持上吉他课。

persistent.en: His persistent cough finally made him visit the doctor.
persistent.zh: 他持续的咳嗽终于让他去看了医生。

perspective.en: Traveling gives you a fresh perspective on your own daily life.
perspective.zh: 旅行让你对自己的日常生活有了新的视角。

pervasive.en: The smell of fresh bread was pervasive throughout the house.
pervasive.zh: 新鲜面包的香味弥漫了整个房子。

pessimism.en: His pessimism about the weather almost ruined the camping trip.
pessimism.zh: 他对天气的悲观差点毁了那次露营。

pesticide.en: We avoid using pesticide in our garden to protect the bees.
pesticide.zh: 我们在花园里避免使用农药以保护蜜蜂。

petition.en: The neighbors signed a petition to save the old park.
petition.zh: 邻居们签署了一份请愿书来保护老公园。

pharmacy.en: I stopped at the pharmacy to pick up my prescription.
pharmacy.zh: 我在药店停下来取了我的处方药。

phenomenon.en: The northern lights are a beautiful natural phenomenon.
phenomenon.zh: 北极光是一种美丽的自然现象。

philanthropy.en: Her philanthropy has funded scholarships for many local students.
philanthropy.zh: 她的慈善事业为许多当地学生提供了奖学金。

philharmonic.en: We got tickets to the philharmonic concert at the city hall.
philharmonic.zh: 我们买到了市政厅爱乐乐团音乐会的票。

philosopher.en: The little boy asked questions like a true philosopher.
philosopher.zh: 这个小男孩像个真正的哲学家一样提问。

philosophy.en: Her philosophy in life is to treat everyone with kindness.
philosophy.zh: 她的人生哲学是善待每一个人。

photograph.en: She took a beautiful photograph of the family at the reunion.
photograph.zh: 她在家庭聚会上拍了一张美丽的全家福。

photographer.en: The wedding photographer captured every special moment perfectly.
photographer.zh: 婚礼摄影师完美地捕捉了每一个特别的时刻。

photography.en: He picked up photography as a hobby during the summer break.
photography.zh: 他在暑假期间把摄影作为一种爱好。

photosynthesis.en: Plants use photosynthesis to turn sunlight into food and energy.
photosynthesis.zh: 植物利用光合作用将阳光转化为食物和能量。

photovoltaic.en: They installed photovoltaic panels on the roof to save on electricity.
photovoltaic.zh: 他们在屋顶安装了光伏板以节省电费。

physician.en: Her family physician recommended more exercise and less sugar.
physician.zh: 她的家庭医生建议多锻炼少吃糖。

pillow.en: She fluffed up her pillow before settling down to sleep.
pillow.zh: 她拍松枕头然后躺下睡觉。

pinnacle.en: Winning the cooking competition was the pinnacle of her career.
pinnacle.zh: 赢得烹饪比赛是她职业生涯的巅峰。

pixel.en: The new phone camera captures images with millions of pixels.
pixel.zh: 新手机相机能拍摄数百万像素的图片。

plagiarism.en: The teacher warned students that plagiarism would result in a zero.
plagiarism.zh: 老师警告学生抄袭将得零分。

plaintiff.en: The plaintiff claimed damages for the injury in the parking lot.
plaintiff.zh: 原告就在停车场受的伤要求赔偿。

plankton.en: Tiny plankton in the ocean are food for many sea creatures.
plankton.zh: 海洋中的微小浮游生物是许多海洋生物的食物。

plasma.en: The old plasma television finally stopped working after fifteen years.
plasma.zh: 那台老等离子电视用了十五年后终于坏了。

plateau.en: After losing ten pounds, her weight loss hit a plateau.
plateau.zh: 减了十磅后，她的体重进入了平台期。

platform.en: We waited on the train platform for the next departure.
platform.zh: 我们在火车站台上等下一班车。

plausible.en: His excuse for being late sounded plausible enough to believe.
plausible.zh: 他迟到的借口听起来足够合理，让人相信。

pledge.en: She made a pledge to read one book every month this year.
pledge.zh: 她承诺今年每个月读一本书。

plethora.en: The buffet offered a plethora of dishes from around the world.
plethora.zh: 自助餐提供了来自世界各地的大量菜肴。

plugin.en: I installed a plugin to block annoying ads on my browser.
plugin.zh: 我安装了一个插件来屏蔽浏览器上烦人的广告。

plumber.en: We called a plumber to fix the leaking pipe in the kitchen.
plumber.zh: 我们叫了水管工来修厨房漏水的管子。

plunge.en: She took a plunge into the cold swimming pool on a hot day.
plunge.zh: 大热天她一头扎进了冰凉的游泳池。

pluralism.en: The city celebrates pluralism by hosting festivals from many cultures.
pluralism.zh: 这座城市通过举办多元文化节来庆祝多元主义。

point.en: The main point of the meeting was to plan the holiday party.
point.zh: 会议的重点是策划节日聚会。

police.en: The police directed traffic around the road construction site.
police.zh: 警察在道路施工现场周围指挥交通。

policy.en: The store has a thirty-day return policy for all purchases.
policy.zh: 商店对所有购买商品实行三十天退货政策。
