polite.en: It is polite to say thank you when someone holds the door.
polite.zh: 别人帮你扶门时说声谢谢是礼貌的。

political.en: They avoided political topics at the family dinner table.
political.zh: 他们在家庭餐桌上避免谈论政治话题。

politics.en: She never discusses politics with her coworkers at lunch.
politics.zh: 她从不在午餐时和同事讨论政治。

pollination.en: Bees play a key role in the pollination of garden flowers.
pollination.zh: 蜜蜂在花园花卉的授粉中起着关键作用。

pollutant.en: Car exhaust is a major pollutant in crowded urban areas.
pollutant.zh: 汽车尾气是拥挤城区的主要污染物。

polymer.en: Many everyday plastic items are made from synthetic polymers.
polymer.zh: 许多日常塑料制品由合成聚合物制成。

polymorphism.en: Polymorphism allows one function to handle different types of data.
polymorphism.zh: 多态性使一个函数可以处理不同类型的数据。

populace.en: The general populace welcomed the new public transportation system.
populace.zh: 广大民众欢迎新的公共交通系统。

popular.en: That new café has become very popular among young people.
popular.zh: 那家新咖啡馆在年轻人中变得非常受欢迎。

popularity.en: The popularity of online shopping has grown enormously in recent years.
popularity.zh: 近年来网上购物的流行度大幅增长。

popularize.en: Social media helped popularize homemade cooking during the lockdown.
popularize.zh: 社交媒体在封锁期间帮助推广了居家烹饪。

populate.en: New families continue to populate the growing suburban neighborhood.
populate.zh: 新家庭不断迁入这个日益壮大的郊区。

population.en: The population of our small town has doubled in ten years.
population.zh: 我们小镇的人口在十年内翻了一番。

porch.en: We sat on the front porch and watched the sunset together.
porch.zh: 我们坐在前廊一起看日落。

port.en: The cruise ship arrived at the port early in the morning.
port.zh: 游轮一大早到达了港口。

portable.en: She packed a portable charger in case her phone battery died.
portable.zh: 她带了一个充电宝以防手机没电。

porter.en: The hotel porter helped carry our luggage to the room.
porter.zh: 酒店行李员帮我们把行李搬到了房间。

portfolio.en: She updated her design portfolio before applying for the new job.
portfolio.zh: 她在申请新工作前更新了设计作品集。

portion.en: The restaurant serves a generous portion of pasta with each order.
portion.zh: 这家餐厅每份意面的分量都很足。

portrait.en: A beautiful family portrait hangs above the living room fireplace.
portrait.zh: 一幅漂亮的全家福挂在客厅壁炉上方。

portray.en: The movie tried to portray life in a small fishing village.
portray.zh: 这部电影试图描绘小渔村的生活。

position.en: She applied for a management position at the new office.
position.zh: 她申请了新办公室的管理职位。

positive.en: Keeping a positive attitude helps you get through tough times.
positive.zh: 保持积极的态度有助于你度过困难时期。

positivism.en: His positivism inspired the whole team to keep working hard.
positivism.zh: 他的积极态度激励了整个团队继续努力。

possess.en: She seems to possess a natural talent for playing the piano.
possess.zh: 她似乎天生具有弹钢琴的才华。

possession.en: Her grandmother's ring is her most treasured possession.
possession.zh: 祖母的戒指是她最珍贵的财物。

possibility.en: There is a possibility of rain this afternoon, so bring a jacket.
possibility.zh: 今天下午可能下雨，所以带件外套吧。

possible.en: Is it possible to change our dinner reservation to eight o'clock?
possible.zh: 能把我们的晚餐预订改到八点吗？

postscript.en: She added a postscript to the letter with a funny joke.
postscript.zh: 她在信末加了一条附言，写了个笑话。

potential.en: The teacher saw great potential in every student she taught.
potential.zh: 老师在她教的每个学生身上都看到了巨大的潜力。

power.en: The storm knocked out the power for several hours last night.
power.zh: 昨晚暴风雨导致停电了好几个小时。

powerful.en: A powerful blender can crush ice in just a few seconds.
powerful.zh: 一台强劲的搅拌机几秒钟就能碎冰。

practical.en: She gave her son practical advice about managing his first paycheck.
practical.zh: 她给儿子提了关于管理第一份工资的实用建议。

practice.en: Daily practice on the piano made her a much better player.
practice.zh: 每天练钢琴让她弹得好了很多。

practitioner.en: The medical practitioner recommended getting a flu shot this year.
practitioner.zh: 医生建议今年打流感疫苗。

pragmatic.en: She took a pragmatic approach and chose the more affordable option.
pragmatic.zh: 她采取了务实的态度，选择了更实惠的方案。

pragmatism.en: His pragmatism helped the family stick to a reasonable budget.
pragmatism.zh: 他的务实帮助家庭坚持合理的预算。

praise.en: The teacher gave praise to the students for their hard work.
praise.zh: 老师表扬了学生们的努力学习。

precarious.en: The stack of boxes looked precarious on top of the shelf.
precarious.zh: 架子上堆着的箱子看起来摇摇欲坠。

precede.en: Appetizers usually precede the main course at a formal dinner.
precede.zh: 正式晚宴上，开胃菜通常在主菜之前。

precedent.en: Her success set a precedent for other women in the company.
precedent.zh: 她的成功为公司里其他女性树立了先例。

precious.en: Time with family is precious, especially during the holidays.
precious.zh: 与家人在一起的时光很珍贵，尤其是假期。

precipitate.en: The argument seemed to precipitate a major change in their friendship.
precipitate.zh: 那场争吵似乎促使他们的友谊发生了重大变化。

precipitation.en: The forecast calls for heavy precipitation throughout the weekend.
precipitation.zh: 天气预报说整个周末都有大量降水。

preclude.en: Bad weather may preclude us from having the picnic outdoors.
preclude.zh: 坏天气可能使我们无法在户外野餐。

precursor.en: Dark clouds are often a precursor to a heavy rainstorm.
precursor.zh: 乌云通常是暴风雨的前兆。

predecessor.en: The new manager is much friendlier than her predecessor.
predecessor.zh: 新经理比她的前任友好得多。

predicament.en: Losing his wallet abroad put him in a difficult predicament.
predicament.zh: 在国外丢了钱包让他陷入了困境。

predict.en: It is hard to predict the weather more than a week ahead.
predict.zh: 很难预测一周以后的天气。

predictable.en: The ending of the movie was too predictable to be exciting.
predictable.zh: 电影的结局太容易猜到了，不够刺激。

prediction.en: Her prediction about the game's outcome turned out to be right.
prediction.zh: 她对比赛结果的预测结果证明是对的。

prefer.en: I prefer to walk to work when the weather is nice.
prefer.zh: 天气好的时候我更喜欢步行上班。

preferable.en: Cooking at home is preferable to eating out every night.
preferable.zh: 在家做饭比每晚外出吃饭更好。

preference.en: Do you have a preference for window or aisle seat?
preference.zh: 你喜欢靠窗还是靠过道的座位？

prejudice.en: She taught her children to treat everyone without prejudice.
prejudice.zh: 她教孩子们不带偏见地对待每个人。

prejudicial.en: Making assumptions about people based on looks is prejudicial.
prejudicial.zh: 根据外表对人做出假设是有偏见的。

premise.en: The premise of the movie is that a family travels back in time.
premise.zh: 这部电影的前提是一个家庭穿越回了过去。

premium.en: They paid a premium price for seats with a better view.
premium.zh: 他们为视野更好的座位付了高价。

prenatal.en: She attended prenatal classes to prepare for the baby's arrival.
prenatal.zh: 她参加了产前课程为宝宝的到来做准备。

prepare.en: We need to prepare dinner before the guests arrive tonight.
prepare.zh: 我们需要在今晚客人到来之前准备好晚饭。

prerogative.en: It is your prerogative to choose where we eat tonight.
prerogative.zh: 今晚去哪吃饭由你来选。

prescribe.en: The doctor may prescribe rest and plenty of fluids.
prescribe.zh: 医生可能会建议休息和多喝水。

prescription.en: I need to pick up my prescription from the pharmacy today.
prescription.zh: 我今天需要去药店取处方药。

preservation.en: The preservation of old buildings keeps our town's history alive.
preservation.zh: 保护老建筑让我们小镇的历史延续下去。

preserve.en: She learned to preserve fruits by making homemade jam.
preserve.zh: 她学会了通过做自制果酱来保存水果。

press.en: Press the green button to start the washing machine.
press.zh: 按绿色按钮启动洗衣机。

pressure.en: There is a lot of pressure to do well during final exams.
pressure.zh: 期末考试期间要考好压力很大。

prevail.en: Common sense should prevail when making important family decisions.
prevail.zh: 在做重要的家庭决定时应该以常识为主。

prevalent.en: Online shopping has become prevalent in everyday life.
prevalent.zh: 网上购物在日常生活中已经非常普遍。

prevent.en: Locking the door helps prevent break-ins when you are away.
prevent.zh: 出门时锁好门有助于防止入室盗窃。

prevention.en: Prevention is better than cure, so wash your hands often.
prevention.zh: 预防胜于治疗，所以要经常洗手。

preventive.en: Regular dental checkups are an important preventive health measure.
preventive.zh: 定期牙科检查是重要的预防性健康措施。

preview.en: We watched a preview of the new movie before it opened.
preview.zh: 我们在新电影上映前看了预告片。

price.en: The price of fresh vegetables has gone up this month.
price.zh: 这个月新鲜蔬菜的价格上涨了。

primarily.en: This cookbook is primarily aimed at beginners in the kitchen.
primarily.zh: 这本食谱主要面向厨房新手。

primary.en: Her primary concern is her children's safety at school.
primary.zh: 她最关心的是孩子们在学校的安全。

prime.en: The house is in a prime location near shops and schools.
prime.zh: 这栋房子位于商店和学校附近的黄金地段。

primitive.en: The cabin had only primitive cooking facilities, just a fire pit.
primitive.zh: 小木屋只有简陋的烹饪设施，只有一个火坑。

prince.en: The little boy dressed up as a prince for the school play.
prince.zh: 小男孩打扮成王子参加学校话剧。

princess.en: Her daughter wanted a princess-themed birthday party this year.
princess.zh: 她女儿今年想要一个公主主题的生日派对。

principal.en: The school principal welcomed all the new students on the first day.
principal.zh: 开学第一天校长欢迎了所有新生。

principle.en: Honesty is the most important principle she teaches her children.
principle.zh: 诚实是她教给孩子们的最重要的原则。

pristine.en: The beach was in pristine condition with crystal clear water.
pristine.zh: 海滩状况原始，海水清澈透明。

procedure.en: Follow the safety procedure before using the kitchen equipment.
procedure.zh: 使用厨房设备前请遵循安全程序。

proceed.en: After checking the map, we decided to proceed with the hike.
proceed.zh: 查看地图后，我们决定继续徒步旅行。

process.en: The process of making homemade bread takes about three hours.
process.zh: 自制面包的过程大约需要三个小时。

procession.en: A colorful procession marched through the streets during the festival.
procession.zh: 节日期间，一支五彩缤纷的游行队伍穿过街道。

processor.en: The new laptop has a faster processor for smoother performance.
processor.zh: 新笔记本电脑有更快的处理器，运行更流畅。

proclaim.en: The mayor proclaimed the first weekend of June as a town festival.
proclaim.zh: 市长宣布六月的第一个周末为城镇节日。

procrastinate.en: Stop trying to procrastinate and start cleaning your room now.
procrastinate.zh: 别再拖了，现在就开始打扫你的房间。

procurement.en: The school handled the procurement of new desks and chairs.
procurement.zh: 学校负责采购新的课桌椅。

produce.en: Local farmers produce fresh fruits and vegetables all year round.
produce.zh: 当地农民全年生产新鲜的水果和蔬菜。

producer.en: The producer of the school play managed all the backstage details.
producer.zh: 校园话剧的制作人管理了所有后台事务。

product.en: This cleaning product works great on kitchen grease stains.
product.zh: 这种清洁产品对厨房油渍效果很好。

production.en: The production of handmade soap has become her weekend hobby.
production.zh: 手工皂的制作已经成为她的周末爱好。

productive.en: She had a very productive morning and finished all her errands.
productive.zh: 她度过了一个高效的上午，办完了所有的事。

productivity.en: Taking short breaks actually boosts your productivity at work.
productivity.zh: 短暂的休息实际上能提高你的工作效率。

proficient.en: She became proficient in baking after taking several online courses.
proficient.zh: 上了几期网课后她的烘焙技术变得很娴熟了。

profound.en: Moving to a new country had a profound impact on her life.
profound.zh: 搬到一个新的国家对她的生活产生了深远的影响。

prognosis.en: The doctor said the prognosis for her recovery was very positive.
prognosis.zh: 医生说她康复的预后非常乐观。

program.en: The community center offers a free after-school program for kids.
program.zh: 社区中心为孩子们提供免费的课后项目。

programmer.en: The programmer fixed the bug in the app within an hour.
programmer.zh: 程序员在一小时内修复了应用中的错误。

programming.en: She started learning programming to build her own website.
programming.zh: 她开始学编程来建立自己的网站。

progress.en: The students have made great progress in their reading skills.
progress.zh: 学生们在阅读能力方面取得了很大进步。

progressive.en: The school adopted a more progressive approach to teaching.
progressive.zh: 学校采用了更先进的教学方法。

prohibit.en: The rules prohibit eating and drinking inside the library.
prohibit.zh: 规定禁止在图书馆内吃东西和喝饮料。

project.en: The children worked on a science project about growing plants.
project.zh: 孩子们做了一个关于种植植物的科学项目。

projectile.en: The baseball became a projectile heading straight for the window.
projectile.zh: 棒球变成了一枚飞向窗户的抛射物。

projection.en: The sales projection for next quarter looks very promising.
projection.zh: 下个季度的销售预测看起来非常有希望。

projector.en: We set up a projector in the backyard for movie night.
projector.zh: 我们在后院装了投影仪准备看电影之夜。

proletariat.en: The documentary told the story of the working-class proletariat.
proletariat.zh: 这部纪录片讲述了工人阶级无产者的故事。

proliferate.en: Coffee shops continue to proliferate in every corner of the city.
proliferate.zh: 咖啡店继续在城市的每个角落激增。

prolific.en: She is a prolific baker who makes something new every weekend.
prolific.zh: 她是个高产的烘焙师，每个周末都做新东西。

prologue.en: The prologue of the book sets the scene in a small village.
prologue.zh: 这本书的序幕以一个小村庄为背景。

prolong.en: Adding ice cubes can prolong the freshness of cut flowers.
prolong.zh: 加冰块可以延长鲜切花的保鲜时间。

prominent.en: The church steeple is the most prominent feature of the town.
prominent.zh: 教堂尖塔是这个小镇最显眼的标志。

promise.en: He made a promise to take the kids to the zoo this weekend.
promise.zh: 他答应这个周末带孩子们去动物园。

promote.en: The school held an event to promote healthy eating habits.
promote.zh: 学校举办了一次活动来推广健康的饮食习惯。

promotion.en: She got a well-deserved promotion after five years of hard work.
promotion.zh: 经过五年的努力工作，她得到了应得的晋升。

propagation.en: She learned about plant propagation by growing cuttings in water.
propagation.zh: 她通过在水中培育插枝学习了植物繁殖。

propel.en: A strong wind can propel a sailboat across the lake quickly.
propel.zh: 强风能快速推动帆船穿过湖面。

propensity.en: He has a propensity to snack late at night while watching TV.
propensity.zh: 他有看电视时深夜吃零食的倾向。

proportion.en: A large proportion of the budget goes to paying the rent.
proportion.zh: 预算的很大一部分用来付房租。

proposal.en: His proposal to renovate the kitchen was approved by the family.
proposal.zh: 他翻修厨房的提议得到了全家人的同意。

propose.en: She proposed that they go hiking instead of watching a movie.
propose.zh: 她建议他们去远足而不是看电影。

prose.en: She writes beautiful prose about her travels around the world.
prose.zh: 她写了关于环球旅行的优美散文。

prosecute.en: The city decided to prosecute people who dump trash illegally.
prosecute.zh: 市里决定起诉非法倾倒垃圾的人。

prosecution.en: The prosecution presented strong evidence in the fraud case.
prosecution.zh: 控方在欺诈案中提出了有力的证据。

prospect.en: The prospect of a long vacation made everyone at work excited.
prospect.zh: 长假的前景让单位里的每个人都很兴奋。

prospective.en: Several prospective buyers came to view the house over the weekend.
prospective.zh: 周末有几位潜在的买家来看了房子。

prosper.en: Small businesses can prosper with the support of loyal customers.
prosper.zh: 有忠实顾客的支持，小企业就能蓬勃发展。

protest.en: The students organized a peaceful protest to save the school garden.
protest.zh: 学生们组织了一次和平抗议来保护学校花园。

protocol.en: Following proper protocol is important when visiting someone's home.
protocol.zh: 拜访别人家时遵守适当的礼节很重要。

proton.en: A proton carries a positive charge inside the atom.
proton.zh: 质子在原子内部携带正电荷。

protract.en: Bad weather could protract the construction of the new playground.
protract.zh: 恶劣天气可能会延长新操场的施工时间。

proverb.en: The old proverb says that an apple a day keeps the doctor away.
proverb.zh: 老谚语说一天一苹果，医生远离我。

provide.en: The hotel provides free breakfast for all its guests.
provide.zh: 酒店为所有住客提供免费早餐。

provider.en: He is the main income provider for his family of five.
provider.zh: 他是五口之家的主要经济来源。

provision.en: We brought enough provision of food and water for the camping trip.
provision.zh: 我们带了足够的食物和水去露营。

provocative.en: The documentary raised some provocative questions about modern lifestyles.
provocative.zh: 这部纪录片提出了一些关于现代生活方式的发人深省的问题。

provoke.en: Loud music late at night can provoke complaints from the neighbors.
provoke.zh: 深夜大声放音乐会引起邻居的投诉。

proxy.en: She voted by proxy because she couldn't attend the meeting.
proxy.zh: 她因无法出席会议而委托他人投票。

prudent.en: It is prudent to save some money each month for emergencies.
prudent.zh: 每月存一些应急资金是明智的。

psychiatry.en: She studied psychiatry to help people with mental health challenges.
psychiatry.zh: 她学习精神病学以帮助有心理健康问题的人。

psychological.en: Moving to a new city can have a big psychological impact.
psychological.zh: 搬到一个新城市可能会产生很大的心理影响。

psychologist.en: The school psychologist helped the shy student build confidence.
psychologist.zh: 学校心理学家帮助那个害羞的学生建立信心。

psychology.en: Understanding basic psychology helps parents communicate with their kids.
psychology.zh: 了解基础心理学有助于父母与孩子沟通。

psychopath.en: The villain in the thriller was portrayed as a dangerous psychopath.
psychopath.zh: 惊悚片中的反派被描绘成一个危险的精神变态者。

pulse.en: The nurse checked his pulse before starting the examination.
pulse.zh: 护士在开始检查前测了他的脉搏。

punctual.en: She is always punctual and never keeps anyone waiting.
punctual.zh: 她总是很准时，从不让人等。

puncture.en: A sharp nail caused a puncture in the bicycle tire.
puncture.zh: 一颗尖钉子扎破了自行车轮胎。

purport.en: The email purported to be from the bank, but it was a scam.
purport.zh: 那封邮件声称来自银行，但其实是诈骗。

purpose.en: The purpose of the meeting is to plan the school fundraiser.
purpose.zh: 这次会议的目的是策划学校的筹款活动。

quantum.en: The professor explained quantum physics in simple terms.
quantum.zh: 教授用简单的话解释了量子物理学。

quarrel.en: The children had a quarrel over who got the last cookie.
quarrel.zh: 孩子们为谁吃最后一块饼干吵了一架。

quench.en: A glass of cold lemonade can quench your thirst on a hot day.
quench.zh: 一杯冰柠檬水能在大热天解渴。

query.en: She had a query about the store's return policy.
query.zh: 她对商店的退货政策有一个疑问。

question.en: The student raised a question about tomorrow's homework.
question.zh: 那个学生提了一个关于明天作业的问题。

quota.en: Each salesperson must meet their monthly sales quota.
quota.zh: 每个销售人员必须完成月度销售指标。

radiation.en: Wearing sunscreen protects your skin from harmful radiation.
radiation.zh: 涂防晒霜可以保护你的皮肤免受有害辐射。

radioactive.en: They disposed of the radioactive waste very carefully.
radioactive.zh: 他们非常小心地处理了放射性废物。

radiology.en: She went to the radiology department for a chest X-ray.
radiology.zh: 她去放射科拍了一张胸片。

ramification.en: Moving to a new city has many ramifications for the whole family.
ramification.zh: 搬到一个新城市对全家有很多影响。

random.en: He picked a random song from the playlist during dinner.
random.zh: 吃饭时他从歌单里随机选了一首歌。

range.en: The supermarket offers a wide range of organic products.
range.zh: 这家超市提供种类丰富的有机产品。

rank.en: She ranked first in her class this semester.
rank.zh: 这个学期她在班里排名第一。

rationalism.en: His rationalism helped the family make smart financial decisions.
rationalism.zh: 他的理性主义帮助全家做出了明智的财务决策。

react.en: She didn't know how to react when she won the prize.
react.zh: 她中奖时不知道该怎么反应。

reaction.en: His reaction to the surprise party was priceless.
reaction.zh: 他对惊喜派对的反应真是太珍贵了。

reactive.en: He is too reactive and gets upset over small things.
reactive.zh: 他太容易激动，小事就会生气。

reactor.en: The nuclear reactor supplies electricity to the entire region.
reactor.zh: 核反应堆为整个地区供电。

reagent.en: The student added a reagent to the solution in chemistry class.
reagent.zh: 学生在化学课上往溶液里加了一种试剂。

reassure.en: The doctor reassured her that the test results were normal.
reassure.zh: 医生让她放心，检查结果是正常的。

reboot.en: Try to reboot your computer if the screen freezes.
reboot.zh: 如果屏幕卡住了，试着重启电脑。

rebound.en: Sales started to rebound after the holiday season ended.
rebound.zh: 假期结束后，销售额开始回升。

recede.en: The floodwater began to recede after three days of sunshine.
recede.zh: 阳光照了三天后，洪水开始退去。

receipt.en: Please keep your receipt in case you need to return the item.
receipt.zh: 请保留好收据，以防需要退货。

receive.en: I was happy to receive a birthday card from my grandmother.
receive.zh: 收到奶奶寄来的生日贺卡我很高兴。

receiver.en: She picked up the phone receiver and called her mother.
receiver.zh: 她拿起电话听筒给妈妈打了电话。

recent.en: Have you watched any good movies in recent weeks?
recent.zh: 最近几周你看了什么好电影吗？

reception.en: The hotel reception was beautifully decorated with fresh flowers.
reception.zh: 酒店前台用鲜花装饰得很漂亮。

receptive.en: The children were receptive to the idea of getting a puppy.
receptive.zh: 孩子们很乐于接受养一只小狗的想法。

recession.en: Many families cut back on spending during the recession.
recession.zh: 经济衰退期间，许多家庭减少了开支。

recipe.en: Grandma shared her secret recipe for chocolate cake with me.
recipe.zh: 奶奶把她做巧克力蛋糕的秘方告诉了我。

reckon.en: I reckon we need about two hours to finish cooking dinner.
reckon.zh: 我估计我们大约需要两个小时做完晚饭。

reclaim.en: She went to the airport counter to reclaim her lost luggage.
reclaim.zh: 她去机场柜台领回了丢失的行李。

recommend.en: Can you recommend a good restaurant near the train station?
recommend.zh: 你能推荐一家火车站附近的好餐厅吗？

recommendation.en: I booked this hotel based on a friend's recommendation.
recommendation.zh: 我根据朋友的推荐预订了这家酒店。

reconcile.en: The two brothers finally reconciled after years of not speaking.
reconcile.zh: 两兄弟多年不说话后终于和好了。

reconstruct.en: They plan to reconstruct the old kitchen next summer.
reconstruct.zh: 他们计划明年夏天重建旧厨房。

reconstruction.en: The reconstruction of the playground took about three months.
reconstruction.zh: 操场的重建大约花了三个月。

recover.en: It took her a week to recover from the flu.
recover.zh: 她花了一周时间才从流感中恢复。

recovery.en: We wish you a speedy recovery from your surgery.
recovery.zh: 我们祝你术后早日康复。

recruitment.en: The company's recruitment drive attracted many fresh graduates.
recruitment.zh: 公司的招聘活动吸引了许多应届毕业生。

recuperate.en: He stayed home for a week to recuperate from his illness.
recuperate.zh: 他在家休息了一周来养病。

recur.en: The same plumbing problem seems to recur every winter.
recur.zh: 同样的管道问题似乎每年冬天都会复发。

recurrence.en: Regular exercise can help prevent the recurrence of back pain.
recurrence.zh: 经常锻炼有助于防止背痛复发。

recurrent.en: She has a recurrent dream about flying over her hometown.
recurrent.zh: 她反复做一个飞越家乡的梦。

recycle.en: We separate our trash so we can recycle paper and plastic.
recycle.zh: 我们把垃圾分类，以便回收纸张和塑料。

reduce.en: We are trying to reduce our electricity bill this month.
reduce.zh: 我们这个月在努力减少电费。

reduction.en: The store announced a price reduction on all winter clothing.
reduction.zh: 商店宣布所有冬装降价。

redundant.en: We have two coffee machines, so one of them is redundant.
redundant.zh: 我们有两台咖啡机，所以一台是多余的。

refer.en: My neighbor referred me to an excellent family doctor.
refer.zh: 我的邻居给我推荐了一位很好的家庭医生。

referee.en: The referee blew the whistle to start the soccer game.
referee.zh: 裁判吹哨开始了足球比赛。

reference.en: She used the cookbook as a reference while preparing dinner.
reference.zh: 她做晚饭时把菜谱当作参考。

referendum.en: The town held a referendum on building a new community center.
referendum.zh: 小镇就建设新社区中心举行了全民投票。

refine.en: She continued to refine her pasta recipe over the years.
refine.zh: 这些年来她不断改进自己的意面食谱。

refined.en: He has very refined taste in music and art.
refined.zh: 他在音乐和艺术方面品味很高雅。

reform.en: The school decided to reform its grading system this year.
reform.zh: 学校决定今年改革评分制度。

refraction.en: The refraction of light through the glass made a rainbow on the wall.
refraction.zh: 光线通过玻璃折射，在墙上形成了一道彩虹。

refrain.en: Please refrain from talking loudly in the library.
refrain.zh: 请不要在图书馆大声说话。

refrigerator.en: Put the leftover soup back in the refrigerator before bed.
refrigerator.zh: 睡觉前把剩下的汤放回冰箱。

refund.en: The store gave me a full refund for the broken headphones.
refund.zh: 商店给我全额退了坏耳机的款。

refute.en: She refuted the claim that her cake used store-bought frosting.
refute.zh: 她反驳了说她的蛋糕用的是买来的糖霜的说法。

regenerate.en: A good night's sleep helps your body regenerate and heal.
regenerate.zh: 良好的睡眠帮助身体再生和恢复。

regime.en: She follows a strict exercise regime to stay healthy.
regime.zh: 她遵循严格的锻炼计划来保持健康。

region.en: This region is famous for its delicious local cuisine.
region.zh: 这个地区以美味的地方菜肴闻名。

regional.en: We enjoy trying different regional dishes when we travel.
regional.zh: 旅行时我们喜欢品尝不同的地方菜。

register.en: You need to register your child for school before August.
register.zh: 你需要在八月前给孩子注册入学。

registration.en: Online registration for the summer camp opens next Monday.
registration.zh: 夏令营的网上报名下周一开始。

regress.en: His reading skills will regress if he stops practicing.
regress.zh: 如果他不再练习，阅读能力会退步。

regression.en: The therapist noticed a regression in the child's behavior.
regression.zh: 治疗师注意到孩子的行为出现了倒退。

regular.en: She is a regular customer at the neighborhood bakery.
regular.zh: 她是这家街坊面包店的常客。

regularly.en: He regularly goes jogging in the park every morning.
regularly.zh: 他每天早上都定期去公园慢跑。

regulate.en: A thermostat helps regulate the temperature in your home.
regulate.zh: 恒温器帮助调节家里的温度。

regulation.en: The new regulation bans plastic bags in grocery stores.
regulation.zh: 新规定禁止杂货店使用塑料袋。

regulator.en: The gas regulator on the stove needs to be replaced.
regulator.zh: 炉子上的燃气调节器需要更换。

rehabilitate.en: The program helps rehabilitate injured athletes back to full fitness.
rehabilitate.zh: 该项目帮助受伤运动员恢复到最佳状态。

rehabilitation.en: After the accident, she went through months of rehabilitation.
rehabilitation.zh: 事故之后，她进行了好几个月的康复治疗。

reign.en: Chaos reigned in the kitchen when the kids tried to cook alone.
reign.zh: 孩子们自己做饭时，厨房一片混乱。

reimbursement.en: He submitted the taxi receipt to get a reimbursement from work.
reimbursement.zh: 他提交了出租车收据以便公司报销。

reincarnation.en: The grandmother often told stories about reincarnation to the children.
reincarnation.zh: 奶奶经常给孩子们讲转世的故事。

reinforce.en: Reading every night will reinforce your child's language skills.
reinforce.zh: 每晚阅读会加强孩子的语言能力。

reinforcement.en: Positive reinforcement helps children develop good habits.
reinforcement.zh: 正面强化有助于孩子养成好习惯。

reinstate.en: The school agreed to reinstate the canceled art program.
reinstate.zh: 学校同意恢复被取消的美术课程。

reject.en: The store will reject returns without a valid receipt.
reject.zh: 没有有效收据，商店会拒绝退货。

rejection.en: He handled the job rejection with grace and moved on.
rejection.zh: 他从容地面对了求职被拒，继续前行。

relativism.en: Their family discussions often touched on cultural relativism.
relativism.zh: 他们的家庭讨论经常涉及文化相对主义。

relevant.en: Make sure your resume includes only relevant work experience.
relevant.zh: 确保你的简历只包含相关的工作经验。

relief.en: It was a relief to hear that the flight was not canceled.
relief.zh: 听到航班没有取消，真是松了一口气。

relieve.en: A warm bath can relieve stress after a long workday.
relieve.zh: 忙碌一天后，泡个热水澡可以缓解压力。

relish.en: She relished every bite of the homemade apple pie.
relish.zh: 她津津有味地吃着自制的苹果派。

relocate.en: The family decided to relocate to a smaller town.
relocate.zh: 这家人决定搬到一个小城镇去住。

remark.en: She made a kind remark about my new haircut.
remark.zh: 她对我的新发型说了句好话。

remarkable.en: The child showed remarkable talent in painting at age five.
remarkable.zh: 这个孩子五岁就展现了非凡的绘画天赋。

remedy.en: Honey and lemon tea is a popular home remedy for colds.
remedy.zh: 蜂蜜柠檬茶是治感冒的常见家庭偏方。

remember.en: Remember to lock the door before you leave the house.

remind.en: Please remind me to pick up the dry cleaning tomorrow.
remind.zh: 请提醒我明天去取干洗的衣服。

reminder.en: I set a reminder on my phone for the dentist appointment.
reminder.zh: 我在手机上设了牙医预约的提醒。

remit.en: He remits money to his parents every month.
remit.zh: 他每个月都给父母汇钱。

remittance.en: The remittance from abroad arrived in her bank account today.
remittance.zh: 从海外汇来的款项今天到了她的银行账户。

remnant.en: She used fabric remnants to make a colorful quilt.
remnant.zh: 她用布料剩余做了一条彩色被子。

remote.en: He lost the TV remote and had to change channels manually.
remote.zh: 他把电视遥控器弄丢了，只能手动换台。

removal.en: The removal of the old wallpaper took all weekend.
removal.zh: 撕掉旧墙纸花了整个周末。

remove.en: Please remove your shoes before entering the house.

renaissance.en: The old neighborhood is experiencing a cultural renaissance.
renaissance.zh: 这个老社区正在经历一场文化复兴。

render.en: The heavy snow rendered the road impassable for cars.

renewable.en: Solar panels use renewable energy to power our home.
renewable.zh: 太阳能板利用可再生能源为我们的家供电。

renovate.en: They plan to renovate the bathroom before the holidays.
renovate.zh: 他们计划在假期前翻新浴室。

renovation.en: The kitchen renovation took three weeks to complete.
renovation.zh: 厨房翻新花了三个星期完成。

repair.en: The plumber came to repair the leaking faucet this morning.
repair.zh: 水管工今天早上来修理漏水的水龙头。

repercussion.en: Skipping meals can have serious repercussions on your health.
repercussion.zh: 不吃饭会对你的健康产生严重的影响。

repertoire.en: She added several new dishes to her cooking repertoire.
repertoire.zh: 她给自己的烹饪曲目增加了几道新菜。

replenish.en: We need to replenish the snack supply before the party.
replenish.zh: 聚会前我们需要补充零食库存。

reply.en: He forgot to reply to his friend's dinner invitation.
reply.zh: 他忘了回复朋友的晚餐邀请。

report.en: The teacher asked the students to write a short report.
report.zh: 老师让学生写一篇简短的报告。

reporter.en: A reporter interviewed the local bakery owner about her success.
reporter.zh: 一名记者采访了当地面包店老板的成功故事。

repository.en: The attic became a repository for old family photographs.
repository.zh: 阁楼成了存放老家庭照片的地方。

repress.en: She tried to repress a laugh during the serious meeting.
repress.zh: 在严肃的会议上她努力忍住不笑。

repression.en: The repression of his feelings only made things worse.
repression.zh: 压抑自己的感情只会让事情更糟。

reproach.en: She reproached her son for leaving his room so messy.
reproach.zh: 她责备儿子把房间弄得那么乱。

reproduce.en: She tried to reproduce her grandmother's famous soup recipe.
reproduce.zh: 她试着重现奶奶那道有名的汤的做法。

request.en: He made a request for a window seat on the flight.
request.zh: 他要求在飞机上坐靠窗的座位。

require.en: This recipe requires fresh basil and ripe tomatoes.
require.zh: 这个食谱需要新鲜的罗勒和熟番茄。

requirement.en: A valid passport is a requirement for international travel.
requirement.zh: 有效护照是国际旅行的必要条件。

resemblance.en: The daughter bears a strong resemblance to her mother.
resemblance.zh: 女儿和她妈妈长得非常像。

resemble.en: This cake doesn't resemble the one in the picture at all.
resemble.zh: 这个蛋糕和图片上的一点都不像。

resent.en: She resented having to work late every Friday evening.
resent.zh: 她很不满每个周五晚上都要加班。

resentment.en: He felt resentment toward his neighbor for the loud parties.
resentment.zh: 他对邻居开吵闹派对感到不满。

reservation.en: I made a reservation at the Italian restaurant for tonight.
reservation.zh: 我在那家意大利餐厅预订了今晚的座位。

reserve.en: We should reserve a table for six people this weekend.
reserve.zh: 我们应该这个周末预订一张六人桌。

reservoir.en: The city gets its drinking water from a nearby reservoir.
reservoir.zh: 这座城市的饮用水来自附近的水库。

resign.en: He decided to resign from his job to spend time with family.
resign.zh: 他决定辞职，花更多时间陪家人。

resignation.en: Her resignation surprised everyone in the office.
resignation.zh: 她的辞职让办公室所有人都很惊讶。

resilient.en: Children are more resilient than adults often think.
resilient.zh: 孩子比大人通常认为的更有韧性。

resist.en: I could not resist buying the shoes on sale.
resist.zh: 我忍不住买了打折的那双鞋。

resistance.en: The new paint offers great resistance to water and moisture.
resistance.zh: 这种新油漆具有很好的防水防潮性。

resistant.en: This phone case is resistant to scratches and drops.

resolution.en: Her New Year's resolution is to cook at home more often.
resolution.zh: 她的新年愿望是更多地在家做饭。

resolve.en: They managed to resolve the parking dispute with their neighbors.
resolve.zh: 他们成功地和邻居解决了停车纠纷。

resort.en: The family booked a week at a beach resort for vacation.
resort.zh: 这家人预订了一周的海滨度假村假期。

respect.en: The students showed great respect for their elderly teacher.
respect.zh: 学生们对年长的老师表现出极大的尊重。

respectful.en: He was always respectful toward the elderly in the community.
respectful.zh: 他对社区里的老人总是很尊敬。

respective.en: The children went to their respective classrooms after assembly.
respective.zh: 集会后孩子们各自回到自己的教室。

restrain.en: She had to restrain herself from eating too many cookies.
restrain.zh: 她不得不克制自己不吃太多饼干。

restrict.en: The doctor advised him to restrict his sugar intake.
restrict.zh: 医生建议他限制糖的摄入。

restriction.en: There is a restriction on bringing liquids through airport security.
restriction.zh: 机场安检对携带液体有限制。

restructure.en: The company decided to restructure its customer service department.
restructure.zh: 公司决定重组客户服务部门。

retain.en: She managed to retain all the vocabulary she studied last week.
retain.zh: 她成功记住了上周学的所有单词。

retention.en: Good sleep improves memory retention for students.
retention.zh: 良好的睡眠能提高学生的记忆力。

retract.en: He had to retract his comment after realizing he was wrong.
retract.zh: 意识到自己错了之后，他不得不收回自己的话。

retrieve.en: The dog loves to retrieve the ball from the backyard.
retrieve.zh: 那只狗喜欢从后院把球捡回来。

retrospect.en: In retrospect, buying that house was the best decision ever.
retrospect.zh: 回想起来，买那栋房子是最好的决定。

revenue.en: The small bookstore saw a rise in revenue this quarter.
revenue.zh: 这家小书店本季度收入有所增长。

reversal.en: The reversal of the school policy made parents very happy.
reversal.zh: 学校政策的撤销让家长们非常高兴。

reverse.en: She put the car in reverse and backed out of the driveway.
reverse.zh: 她把车挂倒挡，倒出了车道。

reversible.en: This jacket is reversible, so you get two styles in one.
reversible.zh: 这件夹克是双面的，一件顶两件穿。

review.en: I always read online reviews before booking a hotel.
review.zh: 我订酒店前总是会看网上的评价。

revise.en: She needs to revise her notes before the final exam.
revise.zh: 期末考试前她需要复习笔记。

revision.en: The teacher asked for one more revision of the essay.
revision.zh: 老师要求再修改一次作文。

revival.en: There has been a revival of interest in homemade bread.
revival.zh: 人们对自制面包的兴趣重新兴起。

revive.en: A cup of strong coffee can revive you on a tired afternoon.
revive.zh: 一杯浓咖啡能在困倦的下午让你恢复精神。

revoke.en: The city may revoke your parking permit for unpaid fines.
revoke.zh: 如果罚款未缴，市里可能会撤销你的停车许可。

revolution.en: Smartphones caused a revolution in how we communicate daily.
revolution.zh: 智能手机在日常沟通方式上引发了一场革命。

revolutionary.en: The new washing machine uses a revolutionary cleaning method.
revolutionary.zh: 这款新洗衣机使用了革命性的清洁方式。

revolve.en: Her weekends revolve around family dinners and outdoor activities.
revolve.zh: 她的周末都围绕着家庭聚餐和户外活动。

rhetoric.en: His speech was full of rhetoric but lacked real solutions.
rhetoric.zh: 他的演讲充满了修辞，但缺少实际的解决方案。

rhythm.en: The children clapped their hands to the rhythm of the song.
rhythm.zh: 孩子们跟着歌曲的节拍拍手。

rift.en: A silly argument caused a rift between the two best friends.
rift.zh: 一场无聊的争吵导致两个好朋友之间产生了裂痕。

rigorous.en: The gym trainer put her through a rigorous workout routine.
rigorous.zh: 健身教练让她进行了一套严格的训练。

robust.en: He has a robust appetite after playing sports all afternoon.
robust.zh: 打了一下午球后，他胃口很好。

roundabout.en: Take the second exit at the roundabout to reach the mall.
roundabout.zh: 在环形路口走第二个出口就到商场了。

router.en: The Wi-Fi router in the living room needs to be restarted.
router.zh: 客厅里的无线路由器需要重启。

runoff.en: Heavy rain caused runoff that flooded the backyard garden.
runoff.zh: 大雨造成的径流淹没了后院的花园。

rupture.en: A rupture in the water pipe flooded the basement overnight.
rupture.zh: 水管破裂，一夜之间淹了地下室。

sabbatical.en: She took a sabbatical from work to travel around Europe.
sabbatical.zh: 她休了一个假去欧洲旅行。

sacrifice.en: Parents often sacrifice their own comfort for their children.
sacrifice.zh: 父母经常为了孩子牺牲自己的舒适。

safeguard.en: A strong password helps safeguard your online banking account.
safeguard.zh: 强密码有助于保护你的网上银行账户。

saga.en: Getting the house renovated turned into a real saga.
saga.zh: 房子翻修变成了一场漫长的折腾。

salary.en: She negotiated a higher salary before accepting the new job.
salary.zh: 她在接受新工作前谈好了更高的薪水。

salvage.en: He managed to salvage some furniture after the flood.
salvage.zh: 洪水之后他设法抢救了一些家具。

sample.en: The store offered free cheese samples to all shoppers today.
sample.zh: 今天商店给所有顾客提供了免费的奶酪试吃。

sanction.en: The school imposed sanctions on students who broke the rules.
sanction.zh: 学校对违反规定的学生进行了处罚。

sanctuary.en: The garden became her sanctuary after a stressful day at work.
sanctuary.zh: 花园成了她工作压力大时的避风港。

satisfaction.en: She felt great satisfaction after finishing the home project.
satisfaction.zh: 完成家庭项目后她感到非常满足。

scalable.en: They chose a scalable storage plan for their growing photo collection.
scalable.zh: 他们为越来越多的照片选了一个可扩展的存储方案。

scapegoat.en: The youngest child always became the scapegoat for family mishaps.
scapegoat.zh: 最小的孩子总是成为家庭意外的替罪羊。

scholarship.en: She won a scholarship to study at the university next year.
scholarship.zh: 她获得了明年上大学的奖学金。

science.en: My daughter loves science and wants to be a doctor someday.
science.zh: 我女儿热爱科学，将来想当医生。

scientific.en: The kids did a fun scientific experiment with baking soda.
scientific.zh: 孩子们用小苏打做了一个有趣的科学实验。

scientist.en: The young scientist won first prize at the school science fair.
scientist.zh: 这位小科学家在学校科学展上获了一等奖。

scissors.en: She used scissors to cut wrapping paper for the birthday gift.
scissors.zh: 她用剪刀剪了包装纸来包生日礼物。

screenshot.en: Take a screenshot of the recipe so you can follow it later.
screenshot.zh: 把食谱截个图，以后方便照着做。

scribe.en: The teacher asked one student to be the scribe for the group.
scribe.zh: 老师让一个学生做小组的记录员。

script.en: The children wrote a short script for the school play.
script.zh: 孩子们为校园剧写了一个短剧本。

scripture.en: She reads a passage of scripture every morning before breakfast.
scripture.zh: 她每天早上吃早餐前读一段经文。

scrupulous.en: He is scrupulous about keeping his kitchen perfectly clean.
scrupulous.zh: 他对保持厨房一尘不染非常讲究。

scrutinize.en: She scrutinized the grocery bill to check for any errors.
scrutinize.zh: 她仔细检查了杂货账单看有没有差错。

sculpture.en: The children admired the large sculpture in the city park.
sculpture.zh: 孩子们欣赏了城市公园里的大雕塑。

seasoning.en: Add a little more seasoning to the soup for extra flavor.
seasoning.zh: 再往汤里加点调料，味道会更好。

seclude.en: She secluded herself in the bedroom to read her novel quietly.
seclude.zh: 她把自己关在卧室里安静地看小说。

seclusion.en: They enjoyed the seclusion of their cabin in the mountains.
seclusion.zh: 他们享受着山间小屋的清静。

section.en: The kids section of the bookstore has many colorful books.
section.zh: 书店的儿童区有很多色彩鲜艳的书。

sector.en: She works in the healthcare sector at a local clinic.
sector.zh: 她在当地诊所的医疗行业工作。

securities.en: He invested in government securities for a stable return.
securities.zh: 他投资了政府证券以获得稳定回报。

sediment.en: There was a layer of sediment at the bottom of the water bottle.
sediment.zh: 水瓶底部有一层沉淀物。

seduce.en: The aroma of fresh bread seduced everyone into the bakery.
seduce.zh: 新鲜面包的香味把每个人都引进了面包店。

segregate.en: We segregate our laundry into whites and colors before washing.
segregate.zh: 我们洗衣服前把白色和彩色的分开。

segregation.en: The neighborhood promotes waste segregation for better recycling.
segregation.zh: 社区推广垃圾分类以更好地回收利用。

seismology.en: She became interested in seismology after the earthquake last year.
seismology.zh: 去年地震后她对地震学产生了兴趣。

select.en: Please select your preferred delivery date from the calendar.
select.zh: 请从日历中选择你想要的送货日期。

selection.en: The store has a great selection of fresh fruit and vegetables.
selection.zh: 这家店有很多新鲜水果和蔬菜可供选择。

selective.en: She is very selective about what her children eat for dinner.
selective.zh: 她对孩子晚饭吃什么非常挑剔。

semiconductor.en: Modern appliances use semiconductor chips to function properly.
semiconductor.zh: 现代电器使用半导体芯片来正常工作。

seminar.en: She attended a seminar on healthy meal planning for families.
seminar.zh: 她参加了一个关于家庭健康饮食规划的研讨会。

sensation.en: The cold ice cream gave a tingling sensation on her tongue.
sensation.zh: 冰凉的冰淇淋让她的舌头有一种刺痛感。

sensational.en: The homemade pizza tasted absolutely sensational tonight.
sensational.zh: 今晚自制的披萨味道好极了。

sense.en: A good sense of humor makes family gatherings more enjoyable.
sense.zh: 良好的幽默感让家庭聚会更愉快。

sensible.en: Wearing comfortable shoes for the long walk was a sensible choice.
sensible.zh: 长途步行穿舒适的鞋子是个明智的选择。

sensitive.en: Be careful with that plant because it is sensitive to sunlight.
sensitive.zh: 小心那棵植物，它对阳光很敏感。

sensitivity.en: He handled the family matter with great sensitivity and care.
sensitivity.zh: 他非常体贴地处理了家庭事务。

sensor.en: The motion sensor turns on the porch light automatically at night.
sensor.zh: 运动传感器晚上会自动打开门廊的灯。

sensory.en: The garden provides a wonderful sensory experience for children.
sensory.zh: 花园为孩子们提供了美妙的感官体验。

sentence.en: The teacher asked each student to write a sentence using the new word.
sentence.zh: 老师让每个学生用新单词造一个句子。

sentiment.en: The birthday card expressed a beautiful sentiment about friendship.
sentiment.zh: 生日贺卡表达了关于友谊的美好情感。

sentimental.en: She kept the old teddy bear for sentimental reasons.
sentimental.zh: 出于感情原因，她保留了那只旧泰迪熊。

separate.en: We use separate cutting boards for meat and vegetables.
separate.zh: 我们用不同的砧板切肉和蔬菜。

servant.en: In the old mansion, each servant had a specific daily duty.
servant.zh: 在那座老宅里，每个仆人都有特定的日常职责。

serve.en: She likes to serve breakfast in bed for her husband on Sundays.
serve.zh: 她喜欢周日给丈夫送早餐到床上。

server.en: The server at the restaurant recommended the grilled salmon.
server.zh: 餐厅的服务员推荐了烤三文鱼。

service.en: The delivery service brings fresh groceries right to our door.
service.zh: 送货服务把新鲜食材直接送到我们家门口。

shareholder.en: As a shareholder, she receives a small dividend every quarter.
shareholder.zh: 作为股东，她每个季度都能收到一小笔分红。

shatter.en: The cat knocked the vase off the table and shattered it.
shatter.zh: 猫把花瓶从桌上碰下来摔碎了。

shelf.en: Put the cereal boxes back on the top shelf after breakfast.
shelf.zh: 早餐后把麦片盒放回最上面的架子上。

shuttle.en: A free shuttle takes guests from the hotel to the airport.
shuttle.zh: 免费班车把客人从酒店送到机场。

sidewalk.en: The children rode their bikes along the sidewalk after school.
sidewalk.zh: 放学后孩子们沿着人行道骑自行车。

sign.en: There was a sign at the entrance saying the store was closed.
sign.zh: 入口处有个标志写着商店已关门。

signal.en: The traffic signal turned green and all the cars moved forward.
signal.zh: 交通信号灯变绿了，所有的车都往前开。

signature.en: Please put your signature at the bottom of the form.

significance.en: The old family photo had great significance to her grandmother.
significance.zh: 那张老家庭照对她奶奶意义重大。

significant.en: We noticed a significant improvement in her cooking skills.
significant.zh: 我们注意到她的厨艺有了明显的进步。

similar.en: Their new house looks similar to the one they sold last year.
similar.zh: 他们的新房子看起来和去年卖掉的那栋很像。

similarity.en: There is a strong similarity between the twins in appearance.
similarity.zh: 双胞胎在外貌上非常相似。

similarly.en: He enjoys hiking; similarly, his wife loves outdoor activities.
similarly.zh: 他喜欢远足；同样地，他妻子也喜欢户外活动。

simple.en: She made a simple but delicious salad for lunch today.
simple.zh: 她今天午饭做了一道简单但美味的沙拉。

simplify.en: Online banking helps simplify how we pay our monthly bills.
simplify.zh: 网上银行简化了我们每月付账单的方式。

simulate.en: The flight game can simulate a real flying experience.
simulate.zh: 这个飞行游戏可以模拟真实的飞行体验。

simulation.en: The kids enjoyed the space simulation ride at the science museum.
simulation.zh: 孩子们在科学博物馆喜欢上了太空模拟体验。

simultaneous.en: She managed simultaneous tasks of cooking and helping with homework.
simultaneous.zh: 她同时做饭和辅导作业，两不耽误。

skeptical.en: He was skeptical about the new diet plan his friend recommended.
skeptical.zh: 他对朋友推荐的新饮食计划持怀疑态度。

skepticism.en: Her skepticism about online shopping faded after a good experience.
skepticism.zh: 一次好的体验后，她对网购的怀疑消失了。

slang.en: Teenagers often use slang that their parents cannot understand.
slang.zh: 青少年经常使用父母听不懂的俚语。

slash.en: The store slashed prices on electronics for the holiday sale.
slash.zh: 商店在假日促销时大幅削减了电子产品价格。

smother.en: She likes to smother her pancakes with maple syrup and butter.
smother.zh: 她喜欢在煎饼上抹满枫糖浆和黄油。

snack.en: The kids always grab a quick snack after school.
snack.zh: 孩子们放学后总要吃点零食。

soar.en: Apartment prices in the city center continued to soar this year.
soar.zh: 今年市中心的房价继续飙升。

social.en: She enjoys social activities like book clubs and neighborhood picnics.
social.zh: 她喜欢读书会和社区野餐等社交活动。

socialization.en: Preschool helps children with early socialization and making friends.
socialization.zh: 幼儿园帮助孩子进行早期社交和交朋友。

society.en: She volunteers to make a positive contribution to society.
society.zh: 她做志愿者是为了对社会做出积极贡献。

sociology.en: Her daughter is studying sociology at the local university.
sociology.zh: 她女儿在当地大学学习社会学。

socket.en: Plug the phone charger into the socket near the bedside table.
socket.zh: 把手机充电器插到床头柜旁边的插座上。

software.en: He updated the software on his laptop to fix the bugs.
software.zh: 他更新了笔记本电脑上的软件来修复问题。

solar.en: They installed solar panels on the roof to save on electricity.
solar.zh: 他们在屋顶装了太阳能板来节省电费。

solicit.en: The school solicited donations from parents for the new playground.
solicit.zh: 学校向家长们募捐建新操场的资金。

solid.en: The old wooden table is still solid after twenty years.
solid.zh: 那张旧木桌二十年后依然结实。

solipsism.en: His solipsism made it hard for him to consider other people's feelings.
solipsism.zh: 他的唯我主义让他很难考虑别人的感受。

solitude.en: She treasures her moments of solitude in the quiet morning.
solitude.zh: 她珍惜清晨安静独处的时光。

solo.en: She went on a solo trip to the countryside for the weekend.
solo.zh: 她周末独自去了乡下旅行。

soluble.en: This powder is easily soluble in warm water for drinking.
soluble.zh: 这种粉末很容易溶解在温水里饮用。

solution.en: They found a creative solution to the storage problem at home.
solution.zh: 他们为家里的收纳问题找到了一个创意方案。

solve.en: The child managed to solve the puzzle in under ten minutes.
solve.zh: 这个孩子不到十分钟就解开了拼图。

solvency.en: They checked the company's solvency before investing their savings.
solvency.zh: 他们在投入储蓄前查看了公司的偿债能力。

solvent.en: Use a gentle solvent to remove the stain from the fabric.
solvent.zh: 用温和的溶剂去除织物上的污渍。

sonnet.en: She wrote a beautiful sonnet for her husband's birthday.
sonnet.zh: 她为丈夫的生日写了一首优美的十四行诗。

soprano.en: The soprano sang a lovely song at the school concert.
soprano.zh: 那位女高音在学校音乐会上唱了一首动听的歌。

souvenir.en: She bought a small souvenir from every country she visited.
souvenir.zh: 她每到一个国家都会买一个小纪念品。

sovereign.en: Every sovereign nation has the right to manage its own affairs.
sovereign.zh: 每个主权国家都有权管理自己的事务。

special.en: Mom cooked a special dinner for Dad's birthday tonight.
special.zh: 妈妈今晚为爸爸的生日做了一顿特别的晚餐。

specialist.en: The doctor referred her to a specialist for her knee problem.
specialist.zh: 医生把她转介给了一位膝盖方面的专科医生。

specialize.en: This bakery specializes in gluten-free cakes and pastries.
specialize.zh: 这家面包店专做无麸质蛋糕和糕点。

specialty.en: Grilled lamb chops are the restaurant's specialty dish.
specialty.zh: 烤羊排是这家餐厅的特色菜。

species.en: We spotted several species of birds at the nature reserve.
species.zh: 我们在自然保护区看到了好几种鸟。

specific.en: Can you give me a specific time for the dinner reservation?
specific.zh: 你能给我一个具体的晚餐预约时间吗？

specifically.en: I specifically asked for no onions in my salad.
specifically.zh: 我特别要求沙拉里不放洋葱。

specification.en: Check the specifications of the washing machine before buying it.
specification.zh: 买洗衣机之前先看看它的规格参数。

specify.en: Please specify your preferred room type when you book the hotel.
specify.zh: 预订酒店时请注明你想要的房间类型。

specimen.en: The museum displayed a rare butterfly specimen under glass.
specimen.zh: 博物馆在玻璃罩下展示了一个珍稀蝴蝶标本。

spectacle.en: The fireworks show was a magnificent spectacle for the whole family.
spectacle.zh: 烟花表演对全家人来说是一场壮观的视觉盛宴。

spectacular.en: The sunset over the ocean was absolutely spectacular last evening.
spectacular.zh: 昨晚海上的日落真是壮观极了。

spectator.en: Every spectator at the school sports day cheered for the runners.
spectator.zh: 学校运动会上每个观众都为跑步选手加油。

spectrum.en: The store carries a wide spectrum of paint colors for your walls.
spectrum.zh: 这家店有各种各样的墙漆颜色供你选择。

speculate.en: Neighbors began to speculate about who bought the old house.
speculate.zh: 邻居们开始猜测是谁买了那栋老房子。

speculation.en: There was much speculation about the new shop opening downtown.
speculation.zh: 关于市中心新店开业有很多猜测。

spend.en: We like to spend our weekends hiking in the mountains.
spend.zh: 我们喜欢周末去山里远足。

sporadic.en: There were sporadic rain showers throughout the afternoon.
sporadic.zh: 整个下午都有零星的阵雨。

sport.en: Swimming is her favorite sport during the summer vacation.
sport.zh: 游泳是她暑假最喜欢的运动。

spreadsheet.en: She uses a spreadsheet to track the family's monthly budget.
spreadsheet.zh: 她用电子表格来记录家庭每月预算。

squander.en: Don't squander your savings on things you don't really need.
squander.zh: 不要把积蓄浪费在你不真正需要的东西上。

stable.en: After years of moving, they finally have a stable home.
stable.zh: 搬了好多年后，他们终于有了一个稳定的家。

stage.en: The children performed on stage at the school talent show.
stage.zh: 孩子们在学校才艺表演的舞台上演出。

stagger.en: He staggered to the kitchen for a glass of water at midnight.
stagger.zh: 半夜他踉跄着走到厨房喝了杯水。

staircase.en: The old wooden staircase creaks every time someone walks on it.
staircase.zh: 每次有人走过那个旧木楼梯都会吱吱响。

standard.en: The hotel room met our standard for comfort and cleanliness.
standard.zh: 酒店房间达到了我们对舒适和清洁的标准。

state.en: Please state your name and address at the registration desk.
state.zh: 请在登记台说出你的姓名和地址。

static.en: The TV screen showed nothing but static during the storm.
static.zh: 暴风雨期间电视屏幕只显示静电雪花。

station.en: We arrived at the train station ten minutes before departure.
station.zh: 我们在出发前十分钟到达了火车站。

statistics.en: According to statistics, more people work from home now.
statistics.zh: 根据统计数据，现在更多人在家办公。

statue.en: The children took a photo next to the statue in the park.
statue.zh: 孩子们在公园的雕像旁拍了一张照片。

status.en: She checked the delivery status of her online order.
status.zh: 她查看了网上订单的配送状态。

statute.en: The new statute requires all dogs to be leashed in parks.
statute.zh: 新法规要求所有狗在公园里必须拴绳。

stethoscope.en: The doctor placed the stethoscope on the child's chest gently.
stethoscope.zh: 医生轻轻地把听诊器放在孩子胸口上。

stifle.en: She tried to stifle a yawn during the long meeting.
stifle.zh: 在漫长的会议中她试图忍住哈欠。

stigma.en: There is still a stigma around asking for help with mental health.
stigma.zh: 寻求心理健康帮助仍然存在社会偏见。

stimulate.en: Reading books can stimulate a child's imagination and creativity.
stimulate.zh: 读书能激发孩子的想象力和创造力。

stimulus.en: The bright colors in the nursery provide visual stimulus for the baby.
stimulus.zh: 育儿室里鲜艳的颜色为宝宝提供了视觉刺激。

stipend.en: The intern received a small monthly stipend to cover travel costs.
stipend.zh: 实习生每月领一笔小额津贴来支付交通费。

stipulate.en: The lease stipulates that pets are not allowed in the apartment.
stipulate.zh: 租约规定公寓内不允许养宠物。

stoicism.en: Her stoicism during tough times impressed everyone in the family.
stoicism.zh: 她在困难时期的坚忍让全家人都很佩服。

strange.en: A strange noise came from the basement late at night.
strange.zh: 深夜地下室传来一声奇怪的响声。

stranger.en: Mom always told us never to accept food from a stranger.
stranger.zh: 妈妈总是告诉我们不要接受陌生人的食物。

strategic.en: Placing the bookshelf there was a strategic use of the small space.
strategic.zh: 把书架放在那里是对小空间的巧妙利用。

strategy.en: She developed a strategy for saving money on groceries each week.
strategy.zh: 她制定了一个每周节省食杂费的策略。

stratification.en: You can see the stratification of soil layers at the hillside.
stratification.zh: 你可以在山坡上看到土壤的分层。

stream.en: The children loved playing by the stream behind the farmhouse.
stream.zh: 孩子们喜欢在农舍后面的小溪边玩耍。

stress.en: Too much stress at work can affect your sleep quality.
stress.zh: 工作压力太大会影响你的睡眠质量。

strict.en: Their school has strict rules about wearing uniforms every day.
strict.zh: 他们学校对每天穿校服有严格的规定。

strife.en: The family worked hard to avoid strife during the holidays.
strife.zh: 这家人努力避免假期期间的纷争。

strike.en: The bus drivers went on strike so we walked to school.
strike.zh: 公交司机罢工了，所以我们走路去了学校。

string.en: She tied the package with a piece of brown string.
string.zh: 她用一根棕色的绳子把包裹绑好了。

stringent.en: The restaurant follows stringent food safety rules in the kitchen.
stringent.zh: 这家餐厅在厨房遵守严格的食品安全规定。

strip.en: She cut the fabric into long strips to make a woven rug.
strip.zh: 她把布料剪成长条来编织地毯。

strive.en: She always strives to be a better cook for her family.
strive.zh: 她总是努力为家人做更好的饭菜。

structural.en: The old house had some structural problems with the foundation.
structural.zh: 这栋老房子的地基有一些结构性问题。

structure.en: The wooden structure of the garden shed needs a new coat of paint.
structure.zh: 花园棚屋的木结构需要重新刷一层漆。

struggle.en: She struggled to carry all the grocery bags in one trip.
struggle.zh: 她费力地想一趟就把所有购物袋拎回去。

subconscious.en: Her subconscious fear of dogs came from a childhood experience.
subconscious.zh: 她潜意识里对狗的恐惧来自童年经历。

subject.en: Math was always her favorite subject in school.
subject.zh: 数学一直是她在学校最喜欢的科目。

subjective.en: Whether a movie is good or bad is largely subjective.
subjective.zh: 一部电影好不好在很大程度上是主观的。

submerge.en: Submerge the pasta in boiling water and cook for eight minutes.
submerge.zh: 将面条放入沸水中煮八分钟。

submission.en: The deadline for the essay submission is next Friday.
submission.zh: 论文提交的截止日期是下周五。

submit.en: Please submit your homework before the end of the day.
submit.zh: 请在今天结束前提交作业。

subordinate.en: She treats every subordinate at work with kindness and fairness.
subordinate.zh: 她对工作中的每个下属都很友善公正。

subpoena.en: He received a subpoena to appear in court next Tuesday.
subpoena.zh: 他收到了下周二出庭的传票。

subscribe.en: We decided to subscribe to a weekly meal kit delivery service.
subscribe.zh: 我们决定订阅每周的食材配送服务。

subscriber.en: The magazine offers a discount for each new subscriber.
subscriber.zh: 这本杂志为每位新订阅者提供折扣。

subscription.en: She canceled her gym subscription to save money this month.
subscription.zh: 她这个月取消了健身房会员来省钱。

subsidiary.en: The local store is a subsidiary of a larger retail chain.
subsidiary.zh: 这家本地商店是一个大型零售连锁的子公司。

subsidize.en: The government subsidizes school lunches for low-income families.
subsidize.zh: 政府为低收入家庭补贴学校午餐费。

subsidy.en: They received a subsidy to help install solar panels at home.
subsidy.zh: 他们获得了补贴来帮助在家安装太阳能板。

subsist.en: During college he had to subsist on instant noodles and rice.
subsist.zh: 上大学时他只能靠方便面和米饭度日。

substance.en: This cleaning substance removes grease from kitchen surfaces easily.
substance.zh: 这种清洁剂能轻松去除厨房表面的油污。

substitute.en: You can use honey as a substitute for sugar in this recipe.
substitute.zh: 在这个食谱中你可以用蜂蜜代替糖。

substrate.en: She used a thin substrate layer for the potted plants.
substrate.zh: 她给盆栽植物用了一层薄薄的基质。

subterranean.en: The old castle had subterranean tunnels beneath the courtyard.
subterranean.zh: 那座古堡在庭院下方有地下通道。

subtle.en: There is a subtle difference between these two shades of blue.
subtle.zh: 这两种蓝色之间有细微的差别。

subtract.en: The child learned how to subtract two-digit numbers in class.
subtract.zh: 孩子在课上学会了两位数的减法。

subtraction.en: Subtraction is one of the first math skills children learn in school.
subtraction.zh: 减法是孩子们在学校最先学到的数学技能之一。

subvert.en: The comedian tried to subvert expectations with his surprise ending.
subvert.zh: 那个喜剧演员用出人意料的结局颠覆了观众的期待。

succeed.en: With hard work and patience, you can succeed in any goal.
succeed.zh: 只要努力和耐心，你在任何目标上都能成功。

success.en: The bake sale was a huge success and raised a lot of money.
success.zh: 义卖活动非常成功，筹集了很多钱。

successful.en: She runs a very successful online clothing store from home.
successful.zh: 她在家经营着一家非常成功的网上服装店。

succession.en: Three rainy days came in rapid succession this week.

successive.en: He won the school chess tournament for three successive years.
successive.zh: 他连续三年赢得了学校国际象棋锦标赛。

successor.en: The retiring manager chose her successor from within the team.
successor.zh: 即将退休的经理从团队内部选了继任者。

suffer.en: Many people suffer from allergies during the spring season.
suffer.zh: 很多人在春季会受过敏困扰。

suffering.en: The community rallied to reduce the suffering caused by the flood.
suffering.zh: 社区团结起来减轻洪灾造成的苦难。

sufficiency.en: They grow enough vegetables to achieve food sufficiency at home.
sufficiency.zh: 他们种了足够的蔬菜来实现家庭食物自给自足。

sufficient.en: Make sure you have sufficient water for the whole day hike.
sufficient.zh: 确保你有足够的水来完成一整天的远足。

suffocate.en: Open the windows so we don't suffocate in this stuffy room.
suffocate.zh: 打开窗户，免得我们在这闷热的房间里喘不过气。

suffrage.en: Women's suffrage was a long and hard-fought struggle for equality.
suffrage.zh: 妇女争取选举权是一场漫长而艰苦的平等斗争。

suitcase.en: She packed her suitcase the night before the trip.
suitcase.zh: 她在出发前一晚收拾好了行李箱。

summon.en: She had to summon all her courage to speak at the meeting.
summon.zh: 她不得不鼓起全部勇气在会议上发言。

superfluous.en: Remove any superfluous items from the closet to save space.
superfluous.zh: 把衣柜里多余的东西清理掉以节省空间。

supermarket.en: We go to the supermarket every Saturday to buy groceries.
supermarket.zh: 我们每周六去超市买食品杂货。

supersede.en: This new phone model will supersede the one released last year.
supersede.zh: 这款新手机将取代去年发布的那款。

supersonic.en: A supersonic plane can fly faster than the speed of sound.
supersonic.zh: 超音速飞机的速度比声速还快。

supervise.en: Someone needs to supervise the children at the swimming pool.
supervise.zh: 需要有人在游泳池边看着孩子们。

supervision.en: Young children should use scissors only under adult supervision.
supervision.zh: 小孩子只能在大人监督下使用剪刀。

supervisor.en: Her supervisor approved her request for a day off next Friday.
supervisor.zh: 她的主管批准了她下周五的请假申请。

supplant.en: Streaming services have begun to supplant traditional cable TV.
supplant.zh: 流媒体服务已经开始取代传统的有线电视。

supplement.en: She takes a vitamin D supplement every morning with breakfast.
supplement.zh: 她每天早餐时吃一片维生素D补充剂。

supplier.en: The restaurant found a new supplier for fresh organic vegetables.
supplier.zh: 餐厅找到了一个新的有机蔬菜供应商。

supply.en: The school asked parents to supply pencils and notebooks.
supply.zh: 学校让家长提供铅笔和笔记本。

support.en: Her family gave her great support during the difficult time.
support.zh: 在困难时期，她的家人给了她很大的支持。

supporter.en: He has been a loyal supporter of the local football team.
supporter.zh: 他一直是当地足球队的忠实支持者。

supportive.en: Having supportive friends makes a big difference in tough times.
supportive.zh: 有支持你的朋友在困难时期真的很不一样。

suppose.en: I suppose we should leave early to avoid the traffic.
suppose.zh: 我想我们应该早点出发以避开堵车。

supposition.en: His supposition that the shop was closed turned out to be wrong.
supposition.zh: 他以为商店关门了，结果猜错了。

suppress.en: She tried to suppress her laughter at the funny moment.
suppress.zh: 在那个搞笑时刻她努力忍住不笑。

suppression.en: The suppression of noise helps create a peaceful home environment.
suppression.zh: 抑制噪音有助于营造安静的家居环境。

surge.en: There was a surge of customers at the mall during the sale.
surge.zh: 促销期间商场里的顾客突然激增。

surgical.en: She wore a surgical mask while cleaning the dusty attic.
surgical.zh: 打扫布满灰尘的阁楼时她戴着医用口罩。

surmise.en: I can only surmise that the neighbors went on vacation.
surmise.zh: 我只能猜测邻居们去度假了。

surmount.en: She managed to surmount all obstacles and finish the marathon.
surmount.zh: 她克服了所有困难，完成了马拉松。

surplus.en: We donated the surplus food from the party to a local shelter.
surplus.zh: 我们把聚会多余的食物捐给了当地收容所。

survey.en: The store sent a customer satisfaction survey after our purchase.
survey.zh: 我们购物后商店发来了一份顾客满意度调查。

survival.en: Learning to cook is a basic survival skill for living alone.
survival.zh: 学会做饭是独自生活的一项基本生存技能。

survive.en: The plants managed to survive the harsh winter on the balcony.
survive.zh: 阳台上的植物成功熬过了严冬。

survivor.en: She is a cancer survivor and now helps others going through treatment.
survivor.zh: 她是一名癌症幸存者，现在帮助其他正在治疗的人。

susceptible.en: Young children are more susceptible to colds during winter.
susceptible.zh: 小孩子在冬天更容易感冒。

suspect.en: I suspect the cat knocked the glass off the kitchen counter.
suspect.zh: 我怀疑是猫把厨房台面上的杯子碰下去了。

suspend.en: The school decided to suspend classes due to the heavy snowfall.
suspend.zh: 由于大雪，学校决定停课。

suspense.en: The movie kept everyone in suspense until the very last scene.
suspense.zh: 这部电影让每个人一直悬着心直到最后一幕。

suspension.en: The student received a one-day suspension for breaking the rules.
suspension.zh: 那个学生因违规被停学一天。

suspicious.en: The neighbor noticed a suspicious person walking around at night.
suspicious.zh: 邻居注意到有个可疑的人晚上在附近走来走去。

sustain.en: A good breakfast can sustain your energy throughout the morning.
sustain.zh: 一顿丰盛的早餐能让你整个上午精力充沛。

sustainability.en: The family cares about sustainability and buys eco-friendly products.
sustainability.zh: 这家人注重可持续发展，购买环保产品。

sustainable.en: She tries to live a sustainable lifestyle by reducing waste.
sustainable.zh: 她通过减少浪费来过一种可持续的生活方式。

syllabus.en: The teacher handed out the course syllabus on the first day.
syllabus.zh: 老师在开学第一天分发了课程大纲。

syllogism.en: The logic teacher explained syllogism with a simple everyday example.
syllogism.zh: 逻辑老师用一个简单的日常例子解释了三段论。

sympathetic.en: She was very sympathetic when her friend lost his job.
sympathetic.zh: 朋友失业时她非常同情和理解。

sympathize.en: I sympathize with you because I went through the same problem.
sympathize.zh: 我能理解你，因为我也经历过同样的问题。

sympathy.en: We sent flowers and a card to express our sympathy.
sympathy.zh: 我们送去了鲜花和卡片表示慰问。

symphony.en: The family went to hear a symphony at the concert hall.
symphony.zh: 一家人去音乐厅听了一场交响乐。

symposium.en: She attended a symposium on healthy eating habits for families.
symposium.zh: 她参加了一个关于家庭健康饮食习惯的研讨会。

symptom.en: A runny nose is a common symptom of a cold.
symptom.zh: 流鼻涕是感冒的常见症状。

synchronize.en: They synchronize their calendars to plan family events together.
synchronize.zh: 他们同步日历来一起规划家庭活动。

synopsis.en: She read the synopsis of the movie before deciding to watch it.
synopsis.zh: 她看了电影简介后才决定去看。

synthesis.en: The report was a synthesis of ideas from all family members.
synthesis.zh: 这份报告综合了所有家庭成员的想法。

tablecloth.en: She spread a clean white tablecloth before setting the dinner table.
tablecloth.zh: 摆餐具前她铺了一块干净的白色桌布。

tariff.en: The new tariff on imported goods made electronics more expensive.
tariff.zh: 对进口商品征收的新关税使电子产品更贵了。

technological.en: Technological advances have made household chores much easier.
technological.zh: 技术进步使家务变得容易多了。

technology.en: Modern technology allows us to video call relatives far away.
technology.zh: 现代科技让我们可以和远方的亲人视频通话。

tectonic.en: Tectonic activity in the region causes occasional mild earthquakes.
tectonic.zh: 该地区的地壳活动偶尔引发轻微地震。

telecommunication.en: She works in the telecommunication industry managing network services.
telecommunication.zh: 她在电信行业从事网络服务管理工作。

telegram.en: My grandfather still remembers receiving a telegram on his wedding day.
telegram.zh: 我爷爷还记得在婚礼当天收到了一封电报。

telegraph.en: The old telegraph machine is now displayed in the history museum.
telegraph.zh: 那台旧电报机现在陈列在历史博物馆里。

telemedicine.en: Telemedicine lets us consult a doctor from the comfort of home.
telemedicine.zh: 远程医疗让我们可以在家舒服地看医生。

telemetry.en: The fitness watch uses telemetry to track your heart rate.
telemetry.zh: 健身手表利用遥测技术来追踪你的心率。

telepathy.en: The twins seemed to communicate by telepathy without saying a word.
telepathy.zh: 这对双胞胎好像不用说话就能通过心灵感应沟通。

telephone.en: Grandma still prefers to use the telephone instead of texting.
telephone.zh: 奶奶仍然喜欢打电话而不是发短信。

teleport.en: I wish I could teleport to work to avoid the long commute.
teleport.zh: 我真希望能瞬间传送到公司，省去漫长的通勤。

telescope.en: They used a telescope to look at the stars in the backyard.
telescope.zh: 他们在后院用望远镜看星星。

television.en: The family watches television together every evening after dinner.
television.zh: 每天晚饭后全家一起看电视。

telework.en: She began to telework from home three days a week.
telework.zh: 她开始每周在家远程办公三天。

template.en: She used a template to design the invitations for the party.
template.zh: 她用模板设计了聚会的邀请函。

temple.en: They visited an ancient temple during their trip to Kyoto.
temple.zh: 他们去京都旅游时参观了一座古老的寺庙。

tempo.en: The dance teacher asked the students to follow the tempo of the music.
tempo.zh: 舞蹈老师让学生跟着音乐的节奏。

temporal.en: The temporal gap between the two events was only a few minutes.
temporal.zh: 这两件事的时间间隔只有几分钟。

temporarily.en: The road is temporarily closed for construction work this week.
temporarily.zh: 这条路本周因施工暂时封闭。

temporary.en: She found a temporary job at the bookstore for the summer.
temporary.zh: 她暑假在书店找了一份临时工作。

tenacious.en: Her tenacious attitude helped her finish the difficult puzzle.
tenacious.zh: 她坚韧的态度帮助她完成了那个高难度拼图。

tenant.en: The tenant pays rent on the first day of every month.

tensor.en: He studied tensors in his advanced math class at university.
tensor.zh: 他在大学高等数学课上学习了张量。

tentative.en: We have a tentative plan to visit Grandma next weekend.
tentative.zh: 我们暂定下周末去看奶奶。

tenure.en: After ten years of tenure, he knows the company inside and out.
tenure.zh: 任职十年后，他对公司了如指掌。

term.en: The school term starts in September and ends in December.
term.zh: 学期九月开始，十二月结束。

terminal.en: We waited at the airport terminal for two hours before boarding.
terminal.zh: 我们在机场航站楼等了两个小时才登机。

terminate.en: The company decided to terminate the old phone service plan.
terminate.zh: 公司决定终止旧的电话服务套餐。

terminology.en: Medical terminology can be confusing for everyday patients.
terminology.zh: 医学术语对普通患者来说可能很难懂。

terra.en: The garden pots are made of beautiful red terra cotta clay.
terra.zh: 花园的花盆是用漂亮的红色陶土做的。

terrace.en: We had breakfast on the terrace overlooking the garden.
terrace.zh: 我们在可以俯瞰花园的露台上吃了早餐。

terrain.en: The hilly terrain made the bicycle ride quite challenging.
terrain.zh: 丘陵地形让这次骑行相当有挑战性。

terrarium.en: She built a small terrarium with plants and moss for her desk.
terrarium.zh: 她给书桌做了一个种着植物和苔藓的小生态瓶。

terrestrial.en: We watched a documentary about terrestrial animals of Africa.
terrestrial.zh: 我们看了一部关于非洲陆地动物的纪录片。

territorial.en: The cat is very territorial and guards the backyard from other cats.
territorial.zh: 这只猫领地意识很强，不让其他猫进后院。

territory.en: The dog considers the front yard its personal territory.
territory.zh: 那只狗把前院当成自己的领地。

test.en: The students studied hard all week to prepare for the test.
test.zh: 学生们整周努力学习为考试做准备。

testify.en: She was asked to testify about what she saw at the accident.
testify.zh: 她被要求就在事故现场看到的情况作证。

testimony.en: His testimony helped the judge understand the full story.
testimony.zh: 他的证词帮助法官了解了事情的全貌。

texture.en: The bread has a wonderful soft texture and a crispy crust.
texture.zh: 这个面包口感柔软，外皮酥脆。

therapy.en: She goes to physical therapy twice a week for her injured knee.
therapy.zh: 她每周去做两次膝盖的物理治疗。

thermal.en: He wore thermal underwear to stay warm during the winter hike.
thermal.zh: 冬天远足时他穿了保暖内衣来保暖。

thermodynamics.en: Understanding thermodynamics helps explain why ice melts in your drink.
thermodynamics.zh: 了解热力学有助于解释为什么饮料里的冰会融化。

thermometer.en: She checked the thermometer and saw the baby had a slight fever.
thermometer.zh: 她看了体温计，发现宝宝有点低烧。

thesis.en: Her daughter spent the whole semester writing her graduation thesis.
thesis.zh: 她女儿花了整个学期写毕业论文。

thorough.en: She did a thorough cleaning of the house before the guests arrived.
thorough.zh: 客人来之前她把房子彻底打扫了一遍。

threshold.en: He carried his bride across the threshold of their new home.
threshold.zh: 他把新娘抱过了新家的门槛。

thrive.en: The tomato plants thrive in the warm sunny corner of the garden.
thrive.zh: 番茄在花园温暖的阳光角落里长得很好。

tissue.en: She handed him a tissue when he started sneezing at dinner.
tissue.zh: 他吃饭时打喷嚏，她递给他一张纸巾。

toaster.en: The toaster broke so we had to heat bread in the oven.
toaster.zh: 烤面包机坏了，我们只好用烤箱热面包。

token.en: She bought a subway token at the station before boarding the train.
token.zh: 她上火车前在车站买了一个地铁代币。

toll.en: We paid a toll to cross the bridge on our road trip.
toll.zh: 自驾游时我们交了过桥费。

toolbox.en: Dad grabbed the toolbox to fix the broken cabinet door.
toolbox.zh: 爸爸拿出工具箱来修坏了的柜门。

topology.en: He explained the topology of the network to the new IT staff.
topology.zh: 他向新来的IT员工讲解了网络拓扑结构。

topple.en: The strong wind nearly toppled the bookshelf in the living room.
topple.zh: 大风差点把客厅的书架吹倒了。

towel.en: Don't forget to pack a towel for the beach trip tomorrow.
towel.zh: 别忘了为明天去海边带上毛巾。

tract.en: They bought a large tract of land to build their dream home.
tract.zh: 他们买了一大片地来建造梦想中的家。

traction.en: These winter tires provide better traction on icy roads.
traction.zh: 这些冬季轮胎在冰路上有更好的抓地力。

tractor.en: The farmer drove his tractor across the field early in the morning.
tractor.zh: 农民一大早就开着拖拉机穿过田地。

trademark.en: Her homemade lemon tart has become her trademark at family gatherings.
trademark.zh: 她自制的柠檬挞已成为家庭聚会上的招牌。

trajectory.en: Her career trajectory took an exciting turn when she changed jobs.
trajectory.zh: 换工作后，她的职业轨迹发生了令人兴奋的转变。

tranquility.en: The tranquility of the lake made it the perfect vacation spot.
tranquility.zh: 湖泊的宁静使它成为完美的度假胜地。

transaction.en: She checks every bank transaction on her phone each evening.
transaction.zh: 她每天晚上都在手机上查看每笔银行交易。

transcend.en: Good food has the ability to transcend cultural boundaries.
transcend.zh: 美食有超越文化界限的能力。

transcript.en: She requested her university transcript for the job application.
transcript.zh: 她为求职申请索取了大学成绩单。

transcription.en: She did the transcription of the meeting notes for her team.
transcription.zh: 她为团队做了会议记录的转录。

transfer.en: He used his phone to transfer money to his sister's account.
transfer.zh: 他用手机给姐姐的账户转了账。

transform.en: A fresh coat of paint can transform the look of any room.
transform.zh: 重新刷一层漆可以让任何房间焕然一新。

transformation.en: The garden's transformation from bare land was truly impressive.
transformation.zh: 花园从荒地到现在的变化真的令人印象深刻。

transfusion.en: The patient needed a blood transfusion after the serious accident.
transfusion.zh: 那位病人在严重事故后需要输血。

transgress.en: He was careful not to transgress the rules of the neighborhood.
transgress.zh: 他小心翼翼不去违反社区的规定。

transistor.en: Grandpa showed us his old transistor radio from the nineteen sixties.
transistor.zh: 爷爷给我们看了他六十年代的老晶体管收音机。

transit.en: Public transit makes commuting to work much easier in the city.
transit.zh: 公共交通使在城市上下班方便多了。

transmission.en: The car needs a transmission repair before the long road trip.
transmission.zh: 长途自驾前这辆车需要修一下变速箱。

transmit.en: This radio tower can transmit signals to homes within fifty miles.
transmit.zh: 这座无线电塔可以向五十英里内的家庭传送信号。

transparent.en: The transparent container makes it easy to see what is inside.
transparent.zh: 透明容器让你一眼就能看到里面装了什么。

transport.en: They hired a van to transport the furniture to the new apartment.
transport.zh: 他们租了一辆货车把家具运到新公寓。

transportation.en: Good public transportation saves families a lot of money on fuel.
transportation.zh: 良好的公共交通为家庭节省了大量油费。

tribunal.en: The dispute was settled by a local tribunal after several hearings.
tribunal.zh: 经过几次听证会，争议由当地仲裁庭解决了。

trigger.en: Loud noises can trigger anxiety in some small children.
trigger.zh: 大的噪音会引起一些小孩子的焦虑。

trivial.en: Don't waste time arguing over such trivial matters.
trivial.zh: 不要把时间浪费在争论这种小事上。

tsunami.en: They moved to higher ground after hearing the tsunami warning.
tsunami.zh: 听到海啸预警后他们转移到了高处。

tuition.en: Her parents saved for years to pay her college tuition.
tuition.zh: 她的父母攒了好多年的钱来付她的大学学费。

tundra.en: We watched a documentary about animals living on the arctic tundra.
tundra.zh: 我们看了一部关于北极冻原动物的纪录片。

tunnel.en: The train passed through a long tunnel under the mountain.
tunnel.zh: 火车穿过了一条山下的长隧道。

turbulence.en: The airplane passengers felt nervous during the sudden turbulence.
turbulence.zh: 飞机突遇颠簸时乘客们感到很紧张。

turmoil.en: The sudden job loss threw the family into emotional turmoil.
turmoil.zh: 突然失业让全家人陷入了情绪上的混乱。

turnover.en: The bakery has a high turnover of fresh bread every morning.
turnover.zh: 这家面包店每天早上新鲜面包的周转量很大。

tutorial.en: She watched a tutorial online to learn how to braid hair.
tutorial.zh: 她在网上看了一个教程学怎么编辫子。

tycoon.en: The real estate tycoon donated money to build a new school.
tycoon.zh: 那位房地产大亨捐钱建了一所新学校。

ubiquitous.en: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in everyday modern life.
ubiquitous.zh: 智能手机在现代日常生活中变得无处不在。

ultraviolet.en: Sunglasses protect your eyes from harmful ultraviolet rays.
ultraviolet.zh: 太阳镜保护你的眼睛免受有害紫外线的伤害。

umbrella.en: Don't forget to take your umbrella because it might rain today.
umbrella.zh: 别忘了带伞，今天可能会下雨。

unanimous.en: The family was unanimous in choosing the beach for vacation.
unanimous.zh: 全家人一致同意去海边度假。

uncertain.en: She felt uncertain about which color to paint the bedroom.
uncertain.zh: 她拿不定主意卧室该刷什么颜色。

uncertainty.en: The uncertainty about the weather ruined our picnic plans.
uncertainty.zh: 天气的不确定性打乱了我们的野餐计划。

uncomfortable.en: The new shoes were beautiful but very uncomfortable to walk in.
uncomfortable.zh: 新鞋子很好看，但穿着走路很不舒服。

uncover.en: They uncovered old family photos while cleaning out the attic.
uncover.zh: 清理阁楼时他们发现了旧的家庭照片。

undergraduate.en: She is an undergraduate student studying business at the university.
undergraduate.zh: 她是一名在大学学习商科的本科生。

undermine.en: Skipping breakfast can undermine your energy levels for the whole day.
undermine.zh: 不吃早餐会影响你一整天的精力。

undertake.en: They decided to undertake a complete renovation of the kitchen.
undertake.zh: 他们决定对厨房进行全面翻新。

underwrite.en: The insurance company agreed to underwrite the home renovation project.
underwrite.zh: 保险公司同意为房屋翻新项目承保。

unfold.en: She unfolded the map to find the best route to the campsite.
unfold.zh: 她展开地图寻找去露营地的最佳路线。

unfortunate.en: It was unfortunate that the rain canceled the outdoor wedding.
unfortunate.zh: 下雨取消了户外婚礼，真是不幸。

unfortunately.en: Unfortunately, the restaurant was fully booked for tonight.
unfortunately.zh: 很遗憾，餐厅今晚已经订满了。

uniform.en: She ironed her daughter's school uniform the night before.
uniform.zh: 她前一晚熨好了女儿的校服。

universal.en: Music is a universal language that everyone can enjoy.
universal.zh: 音乐是一种人人都能欣赏的通用语言。

universe.en: The children love learning about the planets in the universe.
universe.zh: 孩子们喜欢了解宇宙中的行星。

university.en: She dreams of attending a university in another city someday.
university.zh: 她梦想有一天能去另一个城市上大学。

unpopular.en: The decision to cancel the school trip was very unpopular.
unpopular.zh: 取消学校旅行的决定很不受欢迎。

unprecedented.en: The store offered unprecedented discounts during the holiday sale.
unprecedented.zh: 商店在假日促销期间提供了前所未有的折扣。

unravel.en: The sweater started to unravel after just one wash.
unravel.zh: 那件毛衣洗了一次就开始脱线了。

upgrade.en: We decided to upgrade our internet plan for faster speeds.
upgrade.zh: 我们决定升级网络套餐以获得更快的速度。

upheaval.en: Moving to a new country caused a major upheaval in their lives.
upheaval.zh: 搬到一个新国家给他们的生活带来了巨大的变动。

uphold.en: Parents should uphold family values and pass them to children.
uphold.zh: 父母应该坚守家庭价值观并传给孩子。

upload.en: She learned how to upload family photos to the cloud.
upload.zh: 她学会了把家庭照片上传到云端。

urbanization.en: Rapid urbanization has changed the landscape of many small towns.
urbanization.zh: 快速城市化改变了许多小城镇的面貌。

utilitarianism.en: Her utilitarianism led her to buy practical gifts for everyone.
utilitarianism.zh: 她的功利主义观念使她给每个人买实用的礼物。

utilize.en: We should utilize the garage space for storage more efficiently.
utilize.zh: 我们应该更有效地利用车库空间来储物。

utopia.en: A world without traffic jams would be a true utopia for drivers.
utopia.zh: 没有交通堵塞的世界对司机来说是真正的乌托邦。

utter.en: The kitchen was in utter chaos after the kids tried baking.
utter.zh: 孩子们试着烘焙后，厨房一片混乱。

vaccine.en: The children received their flu vaccine at the clinic today.
vaccine.zh: 孩子们今天在诊所打了流感疫苗。

vacuum.en: She uses the vacuum cleaner to clean the carpets every weekend.
vacuum.zh: 她每个周末都用吸尘器清理地毯。

valid.en: Make sure your passport is still valid before booking the trip.
valid.zh: 订旅行之前确认你的护照还在有效期内。

validity.en: She questioned the validity of the coupon before using it.
validity.zh: 她在使用优惠券前质疑了它的有效性。

valuable.en: She keeps her valuable jewelry in a safe at home.
valuable.zh: 她把贵重的珠宝放在家里的保险箱里。

value.en: Good health is the most important value in our family.
value.zh: 身体健康是我们家最看重的价值。

vanish.en: My keys seem to vanish every time I am in a hurry.
vanish.zh: 每次我赶时间的时候钥匙好像就会消失。

variable.en: The weather is quite variable in spring, so bring a jacket.
variable.zh: 春天天气变化很大，所以带件外套吧。

velocity.en: The car reached a high velocity on the open highway.
velocity.zh: 汽车在高速公路上开得很快。

vendetta.en: The two neighbors carried on a silly vendetta over a parking spot.
vendetta.zh: 两个邻居为了一个停车位你来我往地闹别扭。

vendor.en: The street vendor sells fresh fruit and juice every morning.
vendor.zh: 街头小贩每天早上卖新鲜水果和果汁。

venture.en: Starting a bakery was the best business venture she ever made.
venture.zh: 开面包店是她做过的最好的商业投资。

verdict.en: The jury reached a verdict after two days of discussion.
verdict.zh: 陪审团经过两天讨论后做出了裁决。

verify.en: Please verify your email address to complete the registration.
verify.zh: 请验证你的电子邮件地址以完成注册。

versatile.en: A slow cooker is a versatile kitchen tool for busy families.
versatile.zh: 慢炖锅是忙碌家庭的万能厨房工具。

verse.en: She memorized a verse from her favorite poem for the recital.
verse.zh: 她为朗诵会背诵了最喜欢的诗中的一段。

version.en: This is a healthier version of the classic chocolate brownie.
version.zh: 这是经典巧克力布朗尼的一个更健康的版本。

vertebrate.en: The biology teacher explained that dogs and cats are vertebrates.
vertebrate.zh: 生物老师解释说狗和猫都是脊椎动物。

vertical.en: She hung a vertical garden on the balcony wall to grow herbs.
vertical.zh: 她在阳台墙上挂了一个垂直花园来种草药。

very.en: The children were very excited about the trip to the zoo.
very.zh: 孩子们对去动物园非常兴奋。

veto.en: Mom used her veto power to cancel the idea of a pet snake.
veto.zh: 妈妈行使了否决权，取消了养宠物蛇的想法。

viable.en: Growing vegetables at home is a viable way to save money.
viable.zh: 在家种菜是省钱的可行方法。

viaduct.en: The train crosses a tall viaduct over the valley every morning.
viaduct.zh: 火车每天早上经过一座横跨山谷的高架桥。

video.en: She recorded a video of her baby's first steps.
video.zh: 她录下了宝宝第一次走路的视频。

view.en: The view from the hotel room was absolutely breathtaking.
view.zh: 酒店房间的景色美得令人窒息。

viewpoint.en: They hiked up to the viewpoint for a panoramic view of the city.
viewpoint.zh: 他们爬上观景台，俯瞰城市的全景。

vindicate.en: The good exam results vindicated her decision to study harder.
vindicate.zh: 好的考试成绩证明了她更努力学习的决定是对的。

vinegar.en: Add a splash of vinegar to the salad dressing for extra tang.
vinegar.zh: 往沙拉酱里加一点醋，味道会更酸爽。

virtual.en: The kids attended a virtual class from home during the snow day.
virtual.zh: 下雪天孩子们在家上了网课。

virtuoso.en: The young virtuoso played the piano beautifully at the school concert.
virtuoso.zh: 这位年轻的演奏家在学校音乐会上钢琴弹得非常好。

viscosity.en: Honey has a higher viscosity than water, so it flows slowly.
viscosity.zh: 蜂蜜比水粘稠，所以流得慢。

visibility.en: Fog reduced visibility on the road during the morning commute.
visibility.zh: 早上通勤时大雾降低了道路的能见度。

visible.en: The mountain peaks are visible from our kitchen window on clear days.
visible.zh: 天气晴朗时从厨房窗户能看到山顶。

vision.en: She had a clear vision of what she wanted the garden to look like.
vision.zh: 她对花园想要的样子有清晰的设想。

visionary.en: The visionary architect designed homes that use zero energy.
visionary.zh: 那位有远见的建筑师设计了零能耗住宅。

visit.en: We plan to visit our grandparents during the spring holiday.
visit.zh: 我们计划春假去看望祖父母。

visitor.en: A visitor brought flowers and fruit when they came to our home.
visitor.zh: 一位客人来我们家时带了鲜花和水果。

visual.en: The colorful chart provided a clear visual summary of the budget.
visual.zh: 彩色图表提供了预算的清晰视觉总结。

visualize.en: Try to visualize your dream house before meeting the architect.
visualize.zh: 在见建筑师之前，试着想象你的梦想之家。

vital.en: Drinking enough water is vital for your health every day.
vital.zh: 每天喝足够的水对健康至关重要。

vitality.en: Regular exercise gives her the vitality to keep up with her kids.
vitality.zh: 经常锻炼让她有精力跟上孩子们的节奏。

vitamin.en: Oranges are a great source of vitamin C for the whole family.
vitamin.zh: 橙子是全家人补充维生素C的好来源。

vivid.en: She painted a vivid picture of flowers on the bedroom wall.
vivid.zh: 她在卧室墙上画了一幅色彩鲜艳的花卉画。

vocabulary.en: Reading books regularly helps children expand their vocabulary.
vocabulary.zh: 经常阅读有助于孩子扩大词汇量。

vocal.en: She was very vocal about her preference for homemade meals.
vocal.zh: 她毫不掩饰地表达了对自制饭菜的偏爱。

vocation.en: Teaching has always felt like a true vocation for her.
vocation.zh: 教书对她来说一直像是一种真正的使命。

vocational.en: He enrolled in a vocational course to learn plumbing skills.
vocational.zh: 他报名参加了职业课程学习管道维修技术。

voice.en: Her voice was calm and soothing when she read bedtime stories.
voice.zh: 她读睡前故事时声音平静又舒缓。

volatile.en: The stock market has been quite volatile this past month.
volatile.zh: 过去一个月股市波动很大。

volcano.en: We could see the volcano from our hotel window in Iceland.
volcano.zh: 在冰岛我们能从酒店窗户看到火山。

voucher.en: She used a gift voucher to buy a new pair of shoes.
voucher.zh: 她用了一张礼品券买了一双新鞋。

vulnerability.en: Leaving the door unlocked increases the home's vulnerability to theft.
vulnerability.zh: 不锁门会增加家庭被盗的风险。

wardrobe.en: She organized her wardrobe and donated clothes she no longer wears.
wardrobe.zh: 她整理了衣柜，捐掉了不再穿的衣服。

warehouse.en: The online store ships all orders directly from their warehouse.
warehouse.zh: 这家网店所有订单都直接从仓库发货。

warrant.en: The situation did not warrant calling the police at night.
warrant.zh: 这种情况不需要在晚上报警。

watershed.en: Getting her first job was a watershed moment in her young life.
watershed.zh: 找到第一份工作是她年轻生活中的一个转折点。

watt.en: This light bulb uses only ten watts but is very bright.
watt.zh: 这个灯泡只用十瓦，但非常亮。

wavelength.en: The two friends are always on the same wavelength about everything.
wavelength.zh: 这两个朋友在任何事情上想法都一致。

welfare.en: The community center promotes the welfare of local families.
welfare.zh: 社区中心促进当地家庭的福利。

wetland.en: The nearby wetland is home to many species of birds and frogs.
wetland.zh: 附近的湿地是许多鸟类和青蛙的家园。

whole.en: The whole family gathered for dinner on Sunday evening.
whole.zh: 周日晚上全家人聚在一起吃晚饭。

wholesale.en: Buying groceries at wholesale prices saves a lot of money.
wholesale.zh: 以批发价购买食品杂货可以省很多钱。

wholesome.en: She prepares wholesome meals with fresh vegetables for her kids.
wholesome.zh: 她用新鲜蔬菜为孩子们准备健康的饭菜。

widget.en: She added a weather widget to her phone's home screen.
widget.zh: 她在手机主屏幕上添加了一个天气小组件。

wield.en: He learned how to wield a kitchen knife safely in cooking class.
wield.zh: 他在烹饪课上学会了如何安全使用菜刀。

windshield.en: A rock cracked the windshield while we were driving on the highway.
windshield.zh: 在高速公路上开车时一块石头把挡风玻璃磕裂了。

wireless.en: She bought wireless earbuds so she could listen to music while jogging.
wireless.zh: 她买了无线耳机，这样跑步时可以听音乐。

wisdom.en: Grandma always shares her wisdom about life with the grandchildren.
wisdom.zh: 奶奶总是和孙子孙女分享她的人生智慧。

withdraw.en: He went to the ATM to withdraw cash for the weekend market.
withdraw.zh: 他去自动取款机取了现金准备逛周末市场。

withhold.en: She decided to withhold the surprise news until his birthday.
withhold.zh: 她决定把惊喜消息保留到他生日那天。

withstand.en: The new windows are built to withstand strong winds and storms.
withstand.zh: 新窗户能经受住强风和暴风雨。

wound.en: She cleaned the small wound on her son's knee with warm water.
wound.zh: 她用温水清洗了儿子膝盖上的小伤口。

yearn.en: She yearns for a quiet vacation by the sea every summer.
yearn.zh: 她每年夏天都渴望在海边安静地度假。

yield.en: The garden yielded a great harvest of tomatoes this summer.
yield.zh: 今年夏天花园里收获了大量番茄。

zenith.en: Her baking skills reached their zenith at the holiday party.
zenith.zh: 她的烘焙技术在节日派对上达到了顶峰。

zoology.en: Her son loves animals and wants to study zoology at university.
zoology.zh: 她儿子喜欢动物，想在大学学习动物学。
